body:
After just one week of 2022, we can already tell that this is going to be a big year. Here’s how we’re starting the new year: | |
---
Team,

After just one week of 2022, we can already tell that this is going to be a big year. Here’s how we’re starting the new year:

👶 **MEET THE NEWEST MEMBER OF THE SULLY FAM...**

Welcome to the world, Will Sullivan!

We’re collecting well wishes from all the members of Team Sully to share with Monique and the fam as they welcome their new little one. **Take a minute to sign our digital baby card:**
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=02edf9109a744bf6be1f2daf3bb48070&_e=2SRL-YPQhpvH_BSaZateYDaLG942XFeQ06hIonROXmLvSTUOw53AurL1vk6r-1_AwjCUujseaqemBgUjxfROOJj3lFmkw8V97y6O3tj27k9Qd46xEzSo31hlOEdIuZX2Vegfa7o077wVdCFqSav6U1_DvjXBTsRlFTdlppqC3K0AatNdR2mzYU9Td7TgOQff4gCFDH8H2VUURzJ5bijTeMysrA1xyYkhbcKO7mJUHGjwFkr2kO9F3niGsg7JcHvtrgTwLNzDIeFtYw45qiwklmGRa30iCBwJ9UJN7Ug_WmfPBTLFBAnA_RRZ3EuNJ3OdUw_xuhpy44MiAJo8JD701lysoau-zqPf_x4T1uFAqzYol5QaY79ciBeECDnHbtWxch5MV3StLbQRM-KywVF07VVXxKE52mt38DHY7mTfOaUKQkxvqLMO-NIVqthbgUJPfQEepBEwaT39ndQ-kH0GqaL3JnRPof4iE1IKtcjMhWqogxwfBpCizPvCX0ARSQ6E)
🗞️ **IN THE NEWS**

We were deeply disturbed that the Chicago Teachers Union has once again overridden the preferences of most parents to force children into remote learning.

Join us in demanding that teachers get back to the classroom. **[Sign the petition.](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=02edf9109a744bf6be1f2daf3bb48070&_e=2SRL-YPQhpvH_BSaZateYDaLG942XFeQ06hIonROXmLvSTUOw53AurL1vk6r-1_AoXcceQmXM6Q-6kJ-LGgfG-TffBIdkpnzMDE-Wx4cYVh9BsqrpwE2Bw93bUTRiUKSsCgQV_RzrvTsN75wNbtTrW9T7a0ySwxygY0kY-OjYTLl8rOMKG6CnEPmQNrTiAT1GY8PqLuguG108rnkjqrSC9BmxrWNf57u_iqfsEn80yQPl6xfdBKFEK4ArA8nK71wWNxMNN9JqESGT-pf54Y---SwajpbDlNMRHZrtrjCTg-N79nKlbBA1Ou4tBkCW5V4sb3W_0LtunyNy_1BQTHIQD7PiPSAgDHtfVEkPMWXvahnl7kNjYVBGN1XLFNOzVlVnXVts1m1uak8h15dLGza7rLLAH8HdEF5tvWhCE2Kip6cT6yZsLNTwBlRjdX40_AsNS6EmSDgiDc_FurtbDmr2Tk6vI4IJVElu8iDYHOWINFB221Rr_9BumHFHVbVGn2A)**

**📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK**

Illinois broke the record for population loss this year, losing a whopping 113,776 Illinoisans. To put that number in perspective, _that’s like losing the entire population of Springfield in one year. _

We need bold, fresh leadership to reverse this trend - and Sully is up to the task!

Happy New Year!
Team Sully

Here’s how we’re starting the new year: | | Team, After just one week of 2022, we can already tell that this is going to be a big year. Here’s how we’re starting the new year: 👶 MEET THE NEWEST MEMBER OF THE SULLY FAM... Welcome to the world, Will Sullivan! We’re collecting well wishes from all the members of Team Sully to share with Monique and the fam as they welcome their new little one. Take a minute to sign our digital baby card: 🗞️ IN THE NEWS We were deeply disturbed that the Chicago Teachers Union has once again overridden the preferences of most parents to force children into remote learning. Join us in demanding that teachers get back to the classroom. Listen to how parents feel about this unnecessary strike - it’s heartbreaking. . 📲 SULLY TV As we look back on the start of this campaign, we wanted to highlight some of the people and places helping us fuel this movement to change our broken politics and make Illinois Strong! 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK Illinois broke the record for population loss this year, losing a whopping 113,776 Illinoisans. To put that number in perspective, that’s like losing the entire population of Springfield in one year. We need bold, fresh leadership to reverse this trend - and Sully is up to the task! Happy New Year! Team Sully | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

I have big news, fellow patriot – and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

I just launched my new political action committee called **Elder for America PAC!**

_Why am I doing this?_ **Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines.**

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5ddd66d49b59415fa522867cf2bee1f6&_e=mof5SHYHD2baOO0P45ZJ6a_2SvbgL603mmEYABOXESTj_s5NP2QN2RvDs7HWR12xoc_NMvovMdBbQe4MYd8Kj0vqFrXgcsOWLS4NK0DNE1BE4jBFZxtxPXTWRnzPu4_WjnUZXG9eJiviVwQ1AAXWX00SK-wTY97Gn0l5PRKa7TujO-jEaq4wTVnf-PDoPAW0qHJuCcVwSlOMOfrxiGe6jqGnMXA7ZjVSj0qIabJyBzdwEXmNhHUvS_qDJI4MNIumDwtL5zL4-SdDcjOPQUdKr20459pZNg-HNRU1aOOPVReLzuWVNwTEnsWc0tEm19rICTmOjZjkDB3GBFI2vnQYwlEFHOigJxKXDxIBSoQ9-4nrRp-y4s44_oLTScEoHGmWiS-PyLw0hnz3ptgRmZuqybT1T_R9zI96B0DrNOagUeGGnZp3qyz4VChpq0pvu0yf)
Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising **to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms.**

We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education – two key areas where Americans are being failed.

[**I’m reaching out because I cannot do this alone. If you’re ready to join me in the fight to save America, please be among the first to join my team with a Week 1 contribution of $25 or more to support the mission of Elder for America PAC.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5ddd66d49b59415fa522867cf2bee1f6&_e=mof5SHYHD2baOO0P45ZJ6a_2SvbgL603mmEYABOXESTj_s5NP2QN2RvDs7HWR12xoc_NMvovMdBbQe4MYd8Kj0vqFrXgcsOWLS4NK0DNE1BE4jBFZxtxPXTWRnzPu4_WjnUZXG9eJiviVwQ1AAXWX00SK-wTY97Gn0l5PRKa7TujO-jEaq4wTVnf-PDoPAW0qHJuCcVwSlOMOfrxiGe6jqGnMXA7ZjVSj0qIabJyBzeq31Vl2NMyjeBMjRY0LTi0UbL8PskAQpxAqTSIXT1C9BzCqKijVAMDAzwdysw8yoydPLSMmApKei568ChvnHL00xDYYj4gjMlO4t9aK6fN44aTmhiLOeIL_6-QccLF8oIRibstde-fo1Sa-ikEDeU7gAdNoEHVgRxFUQ53jm9ZbB5XIsrAETEjsgFChvX_mrbjEttZYTbkW0-FNHg8XWwP)

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5ddd66d49b59415fa522867cf2bee1f6&_e=mof5SHYHD2baOO0P45ZJ6a_2SvbgL603mmEYABOXESTj_s5NP2QN2RvDs7HWR12xoc_NMvovMdBbQe4MYd8Kj0vqFrXgcsOWLS4NK0DNE1BE4jBFZxtxPXTWRnzPu4_WjnUZXG9eJiviVwQ1AAXWX00SK-wTY97Gn0l5PRKa7TujO-jEaq4wTVnf-PDoPAW0qHJuCcVwSlOMOfrxiGe6jqGnMXA7ZjVSj0qIabJyBzf3XorPz5MZD8D2HjRDuyM8fJa1SDYf6xbQRmYEFxiBjOxH308J4nZWM0CDCq154-KjHnq-Su3mGmD95V_Mlz5JXC2MSJK8Rt2RhNsRYnD3nfUS9csbtIgB7NdhTj0GsvtoRZtvWkmlqD02u78smWnwKqmIRBcrSG0rpKjj5GdnQt--O0celdGFZmBooGLmRmPKi8s1CzU7650GF_zOluSn)
The radical left’s woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to ‘progressive’ district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies.

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated.

Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers.

Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist.

**I for one have had enough** , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome.

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5ddd66d49b59415fa522867cf2bee1f6&_e=mof5SHYHD2baOO0P45ZJ6a_2SvbgL603mmEYABOXESTj_s5NP2QN2RvDs7HWR12xoc_NMvovMdBbQe4MYd8Kj0vqFrXgcsOWLS4NK0DNE1BE4jBFZxtxPXTWRnzPu4_WjnUZXG9eJiviVwQ1AAXWX00SK-wTY97Gn0l5PRKa7TujO-jEaq4wTVnf-PDoPAW0qHJuCcVwSlOMOfrxiGe6jqGnMXA7ZjVSj0qIabJyBzdXejUaMPWXnSJzYI-RwRrG5dPidf_PnNOYf-a6l9UzvyS60osn7__P0cdbZKqEOVKInR_7TGRpgZkTzHoYmPH-LqTNmS5IS2glR3Fs_RA4mxszJCpD3XEXttX0HdtKwuIUige78atzh1SgcgsVH9x4fcR2xbJEA2SR_5MnFveg70n--ldz3hgAxXshSVhgLGlSZ0cRUsKWsJr57SnRDX8F)
Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country.

[**But to win this fight and others, I need you on my team. Be among the first to throw your hat in the ring with me by making a Week 1 contribution to Elder for America PAC of $25 or more.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5ddd66d49b59415fa522867cf2bee1f6&_e=mof5SHYHD2baOO0P45ZJ6a_2SvbgL603mmEYABOXESTj_s5NP2QN2RvDs7HWR12xoc_NMvovMdBbQe4MYd8Kj0vqFrXgcsOWLS4NK0DNE1BE4jBFZxtxPXTWRnzPu4_WjnUZXG9eJiviVwQ1AAXWX00SK-wTY97Gn0l5PRKa7TujO-jEaq4wTVnf-PDoPAW0qHJuCcVwSlOMOfrxiGe6jqGnMXA7ZjVSj0qIabJyBzeaP_LdZIrD45gxYbqCzFOfYJiGwVaD63tRRSY7ItCYwChxMD4LQoMfvdQ7TD_62DfNJGfNKvNks0vCXEyXAg4XIX8ZYlaz6QlWCtu-llOXr1VwTyZqxXRZc8GvmS55VMZAOOpSAmMlICu2Gx681J2CdL1Zbuwy89qwuMtZRrSh1ODJ8wdQJuLTOYsBQi21xQYfvg1w9oQOT_gq2JGUtaWM)

**We have a country to save** – and with patriots like you on my team, _I know we can!_

Thanks,

Larry Elder

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Michelle, Keri, Nick, and you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto's hoping he'll have your support — right on his truck’s dashboard.
#
The truth is this campaign is about so much more than just one person. **It's about ALL of us, joining together and stepping up to build a bigger, bolder vision for Texas.**
In order to do that, we'll need to form a coalition the likes of which Texas has never seen before — Democrats, Independents, Republicans, and first-time voters — and travel everywhere including to places where people are often overlooked.
Our team has some long hours ahead on the road, so Beto's hoping he'll have your support — _right on his truck’s dashboard!_
[We're typing out the names of monthly donors of $10 or more on a label maker and sticking them to the dashboard of Beto's truck. Will you make a recurring donation now to power our travels and work to elect Beto as Texas' next governor?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51600?refcode=ema20220110-170932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51601?refcode=ema20220110-170932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)
_Your name can go here!_
We're planning to travel everywhere and meet with voters in every part of the state — an expensive effort in a state as big as Texas. **That's why your monthly donation is so powerful!**
Unlike one-time donations, a monthly recurring gift is a commitment that empowers us to plan our campaign budget in much greater detail, ensuring we have the gas to get from El Paso to Laredo to Nacogdoches and everywhere in between.
**With a monthly recurring gift of $10 or more, your name will go directly on Beto's dashboard and serve as a reminder of the strength of this campaign.**
[Please, join Beto in the truck today and commit to a monthly contribution. Together, we will build the biggest people-powered movement Texas has ever seen and defeat Greg Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51600?refcode=ema20220110-170932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)
**[Contribute Monthly »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51600?refcode=ema20220110-170932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)**
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220110-170932-footer&t=5&refcode2=170932_444211_ORUk4o&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=170932%2E444211%2EORUk4o)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: 1-MINUTE POLL FOR YOU (via DCCC)
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene BANNED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
16,000 DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES REQUESTED | | | | **16,000 DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES REQUESTED**

It's been one full year since January 6th.

And still, nearly every Congressional Republican who helped plan the rally roams the halls of the Capitol.

We CANNOT trust these dangerous Republicans with power at this fragile moment for our democracy.

That's why we're collecting data on where our best supporters stand:

**Should officials who helped plan the January 6th rally be BANNED from public office?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2~j-~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

The January 6 insurrection was a deep wound on the soul of our nation.

That's why we were OUTRAGED to discover that some Republican members of Congress helped plan the rally on that horrific day.

_Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Paul Gosar.
Lauren Boebert.
Madison Cawthorn._

They all played a role in inciting the rally that led to a deadly attack on our democracy just one year ago.

_**And they 're all still sitting members of the United States Congress.**_

Worst of all, these Trump loyalists and their GOP colleagues are on the verge of retaking power in the House once and for all.

**[That's why, now more than ever, we need to hear from you: Should officials who helped plan the January 6th rally be BANNED from holding elected office?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZk_)** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2~j-~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46226735&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MTA2MDgyNgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46226735&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MTA2MDgyNgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:
Important USPS update:
| | |
---
**UPDATE: The USPS Board of Governors will meet in _just two days!_**

This is the FIRST open meeting since President Biden announced he's replacing TWO Trump loyalists on the board, **but you still haven't answered our URGENT live poll about Trump’s postmaster general:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/4665?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2539%2E9716520%2Eh-S-Tj)**Do you OPPOSE Louis DeJoy's plans to delay mail delivery, close post offices, and more?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/4665?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2539%2E9716520%2Eh-S-Tj)

---

Team -- For months, Americans have been dealing with the devastating Postal Service delays caused by Donald Trump’s postmaster general.

These delays are a key piece of Trump and the GOP's direct assault on mail-in voting, but President Biden isn’t letting them get away with it. He recently announced TWO nominees to the USPS Board of Governors who will help get the postal service back on track.

And now, the USPS Board of Governors is about to meet PUBLICLY for the first time since President Biden's announcement. Before that happens, **_Democratic strategists need to know where you stand._**

**Please, team -- we need 100,000 responses by midnight, but we’re still missing your response!**

Your ID | 9716520
---|---
Response | MISSING
Deadline | TONIGHT

**Do you OPPOSE Louis DeJoy's plans to delay mail delivery, close post offices, and more?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/4665?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2539%2E9716520%2Eh-S-Tj)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/4665?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-SaveThePostOffice-USPSMeetingRF-Pros-sl1&akid=2539%2E9716520%2Eh-S-Tj)

PRESS CONTACT: [GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE:VERNON JONES CALLS ON PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN TO INSTRUCT AG GARLAND TO INVESTIGATE VIOLATIONS OF THE VOTING RIGHTS ACT
---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, January 11, 2022
Background; Vernon Jones, R Gubernatorial Candidate, is calling on President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris, while visiting Georgia to direct the Attorney General to initiate a federal investigation for violations of the Voting Rights Act.
Former State Representative Jones filed a complaint with Georgia's Secretary of State office requesting they open an investigation regarding a possible violation of the rules of the State Election Board. [RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jlhDdVzTv4p_I6mOelj_1G7YWNpFlLFmvXqP-v-ekUQFZ8OnyXz27qcqmnVwblQwI5sDK3UEASnKIFPzq3LSP9trIoTPXoTFWyQtZb1xB8-qUHxZGF3xu1GbEDAkhui677-ctzSDih9BNhjVqgcqLD0lubUMxYXJ6H8fy3eIDPI1p22ou4PPJMP2RSuWMjPRSWziMCAjt7nzKTCrj0HNsHM2oVqCU7iX&c=p8ZDDgoO33EByennNLSefbWyhJTfDMa5PujBSim0Sz79bixv1LyPVA==&ch=8ftbfRzU6yeLZ_JHJHJNpScLG3as79e0liwJ681XiJ6N5mglq9V-bA==) Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (2)A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public.
His filed alleged complaint involves Dekalb County's placement of an absentee drop box on privately owned property. The name and address of the drop box location in question is The Sterling at Candler, 2536 Mellville Avenue Decatur Georgia 30032. It was located, advertised, listed, and used in violation of the state election laws.
In addition there is a possible violation involving the destruction of drop box video footage prior to the 22 month minimum retention period, required by federal law. See Cobb County's Elections Registrar.
[52 USC 20701:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jlhDdVzTv4p_I6mOelj_1G7YWNpFlLFmvXqP-v-ekUQFZ8OnyXz27qcqmnVwblQwU1gb7O3ZSDRYsSxpcmqcA8_rB-ySyNWp46YfYuvI2BEbFerG-Pp9hnV8eo5H9rLLa6_5S-K8KfhbUF9ENTEbgpV_8Z9sfL8dfzuXjeTXNkUv6lSQixyYsJZp0Du2ap3PcCnK2LPVBA2hBU_yS4JUevUHFrFTJXhj3GBlRM0mmS60Z88UnP0QEN0ryrtGFQASHoCjZfzpvWc=&c=p8ZDDgoO33EByennNLSefbWyhJTfDMa5PujBSim0Sz79bixv1LyPVA==&ch=8ftbfRzU6yeLZ_JHJHJNpScLG3as79e0liwJ681XiJ6N5mglq9V-bA==) Retention and preservation of records and papers by officers of elections; deposit with custodian; penalty for violation. Every officer of election shall retain and preserve, for a period of twenty-two months from the date of any general, special, or primary election of which candidates for the office of President, Vice President, presidential elector, Member of the Senate, Member of the House of Representatives, or Resident Commissioner from the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico are voted for, all records and papers which come into his possession relating to any application, registration, payment of poll tax, or other act requisite to voting in such election, except that, when required by law, such records and papers may be delivered to another officer of election and except that, if a State or the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico designates a custodian to retain and preserve these records and papers at a specified place, then such records and papers may be deposited with such custodian, and the duty to retain and preserve any record or paper so deposited shall devolve upon such custodian. Any officer of election or custodian who willfully fails to comply with this section shall be fined not more than $1,000 or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.

"President Biden & VP Harris coming to visit Georgia to speak about election integrity and the urgent need to pass legislation to protect the constitutional right to vote is like being called 'ugly by a hog.' Currently, there are laws on the books not being enforced. President Biden should instruct U.S. Attorney General Garland to investigate the violations during the 2020 Presidential Election and 2021 Senate Runoff. President Biden's recent comment that he was coming to the belly of the beast; exemplifies his lack of knowledge of prevalent issues and violations throughout the 2020 elections and 2021 runoff. His political theatrics is disrespectful not only to black voters but to all voters."
---
|
---
| |
---
| About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.
---

|

body:

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

I’M HUMBLY ASKING. The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below. | I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up. | | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. **Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target - banning Christianity _and the Bible._
"This is about control, not public health," he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ** _U_**** _rgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy - the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the "most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America." I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z65goj1ucv63ig4g76bmfjqk43f8p28epsr8k9f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_**_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1cesa8bffgjc2jugelqvusoahibgna72pa9bg00_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z08ggoc7dns3ft8btgg3e58stqmm8g3keq6kgqpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za1nvh5kiol4kso0kg24qglt4iq7d1r88cpnm0eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9r49ngugeqbbjq9ab02202361jvl97ibndlb1cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuc8hvkt710ebva5kr8tj5aaj7nj2cvoilr8vrsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_[.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9houfuv2ekrc18inshm2hvni1vlgdvvig5a7tj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zun6c3r83ibti23ndvq6kb9jis5ikhccsmpp7t10_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_**[!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z40keeu95uo09df79926814lfbs5mbv6nodgj580_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . You'll discover who was responsible . . . how the Supreme Court failed Christian America . . . why school administrators are brainwashing our kids . . . and the names of those carrying out the plan in Washington today. When you're done reading _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znnh0crv89oo4f25m52d1em5tnfurm90k0tra9sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3ie1p70s5h2bs)_ , you'll understand the deep divide in America. name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8319%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iA7NAPDJ5R9Wf8cI5nsexw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11378%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tROMJk52rY9lq2LNIoS5fQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11379%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RazHo51u1IxpDwQWSVMKjA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CcXexSZHWVvuqUIE9MCN9Q&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Thank you,

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: you've got to have faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2101-fr-text

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2101-fr-text

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2101-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d8d13bd2-1370-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/d70c1044-e372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzBjMTA0NC1lMzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bATIzlcKg9hgONcmDHcdnsn2MdjvFZfgz8I5uKMzr_I=&id=123159867

Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States

name: Iowa Senate Update
subject: an urgent request

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqpf8ksq05k0o7vgjm2qins6n7hn5kr85mpfle5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjg69or1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z579hc2s13qapn5tjnnqikdvbqq4hcjfb54hafs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjg69or1c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ugt4hgmj0k1aas206gkdj7h2ec15lj0fjs4gr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjg69or1c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a9njouf3qp7agvqr3qvkhc80p1me06q593ghco_)

body:

| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0Rnac1iy0eo4ZrCGkM7ozkHMSU-OtGISkuGVFQILebaHxF8FH61omFcV4ZssS-zt4vT8IDilcT0iE7A3LZxS4SSosJUTuLF3_NR-_7OT077jAkPsTWmSEzIs251IuhK5hH0ZR1okowNKaPCi-EpPq3w311djrL5O5qVd18fge79MnG5vsW-wQ==&c=YT7GY2-7Ek67L4i3xKXxzfmY_AaAv7k9-NaUEHmyBrYN-vuvKlneLg==&ch=GA23Vtx_XCuI4iLf9nLFowIxGiaK1dj3Y7z1IaowF7f-Hld5xVmTzw==)

| Peter,
---
| The Left knows they aren't going to hold off our 2022 America First victory by playing fair and square...
So they've concocted this latest bright idea - they want to DISQUALIFY any Republican from running who dared to challenge the results of the 2020 Election!
They seriously are trying to use the "insurrection" lies as a means of giving themselves an automatic victory at the ballot box this year. [We have to fight back!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0Rnac1iy0eo4ZrCGkM7ozkHMSU-OtGISkuGVFQILebaHxF8FH61omFcV4ZssS-zt4vT8IDilcT0iE7A3LZxS4SSosJUTuLF3_NR-_7OT077jAkPsTWmSEzIs251IuhK5hH0ZR1okowNKaPCi-EpPq3w311djrL5O5qVd18fge79MnG5vsW-wQ==&c=YT7GY2-7Ek67L4i3xKXxzfmY_AaAv7k9-NaUEHmyBrYN-vuvKlneLg==&ch=GA23Vtx_XCuI4iLf9nLFowIxGiaK1dj3Y7z1IaowF7f-Hld5xVmTzw==)

| | | [HELP ME FIGHT BACK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0Rnac1iy0eo4ZrCGkM7ozkHMSU-OtGISkuGVFQILebaHxF8FH61omFcV4ZssS-zt4vT8IDilcT0iE7A3LZxS4SSosJUTuLF3_NR-_7OT077jAkPsTWmSEzIs251IuhK5hH0ZR1okowNKaPCi-EpPq3w311djrL5O5qVd18fge79MnG5vsW-wQ==&c=YT7GY2-7Ek67L4i3xKXxzfmY_AaAv7k9-NaUEHmyBrYN-vuvKlneLg==&ch=GA23Vtx_XCuI4iLf9nLFowIxGiaK1dj3Y7z1IaowF7f-Hld5xVmTzw==)

|
---
| | |
---
| This might be one of the most deluded ideas ever hatched by the Woketopians...
Countless Democrats have objected to election results in the past, and this current effort is even being spearheaded by a Democrat attorney who pushed the Russia hoax about Trump's 2016 win!
But the irony isn't lost on them - they're going full steam ahead and even threatening litigation to make this scheme a reality. We have to fight back!
---
| | | [FIGHT THE DEMOCRAT ATTORNEYS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0Rnac1iy0eo4ZrCGkM7ozkHMSU-OtGISkuGVFQILebaHxF8FH61omFcV4ZssS-zt4vT8IDilcT0iE7A3LZxS4SSosJUTuLF3_NR-_7OT077jAkPsTWmSEzIs251IuhK5hH0ZR1okowNKaPCi-EpPq3w311djrL5O5qVd18fge79MnG5vsW-wQ==&c=YT7GY2-7Ek67L4i3xKXxzfmY_AaAv7k9-NaUEHmyBrYN-vuvKlneLg==&ch=GA23Vtx_XCuI4iLf9nLFowIxGiaK1dj3Y7z1IaowF7f-Hld5xVmTzw==)
---
| There are real questions that we need to be asking about January 6 - were federal informants inciting violence? Why are detainees being denied their civil rights? And who is Ray Epps?
Yet the only thing the Left seems to be focused on is using it as a means to crush our movement - including banning us from running for office.
So we can't afford to show weakness. We have to put on an all-out defense of our movement RIGHT NOW and show them we aren't going anywhere.
[>>DEFEND AMERICA FIRST HERE<<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0Rnac1iy0eo4ZrCGkM7ozkHMSU-OtGISkuGVFQILebaHxF8FH61omFcV4ZssS-zt4vT8IDilcT0iE7A3LZxS4SSosJUTuLF3_NR-_7OT077jAkPsTWmSEzIs251IuhK5hH0ZR1okowNKaPCi-EpPq3w311djrL5O5qVd18fge79MnG5vsW-wQ==&c=YT7GY2-7Ek67L4i3xKXxzfmY_AaAv7k9-NaUEHmyBrYN-vuvKlneLg==&ch=GA23Vtx_XCuI4iLf9nLFowIxGiaK1dj3Y7z1IaowF7f-Hld5xVmTzw==)

Peter,

Hi again, it’s Max the dog. I know it’s been a while – feels like it’s been dog years since we last spoke – but I wanted to give you a quick PUPdate on John’s campaign.

On our walk this morning, I heard John tell someone on the phone that they still need another 500 grassroots donors to pitch in before tomorrow at midnight to stay on track for his fundraising deadline.

**Now I don’t know much about grassroots fundraising (I know lots about rolling around in the grass!), but[ _I do know that if every person reading this could pitch in just a couple bucks, we’d hit this goal in no time._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40568900/324934805/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220111-1b-EM&&&&amount=5&refcode2=a26c9dc1-ef72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjZjOWRjMS1lZjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PVvmnFrcG0PAkHh7n0ey_m-bLErD1ueVNhKPUep98d0=)**

So, that’s why I’m emailing you now (which is very difficult to do without thumbs by the way). John is counting on us to support him ahead of this deadline, and I know it would mean so much to John if you chipped in however many human dollars you can to support our campaign today.

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?39g12--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39g12-1sls8-4qqlpo8/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39g12-1sls9-4qqlpo9/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39g12-1slsa-4qqlpo9/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39g12-1slsb-4qqlpo0/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39g12-1slsc-4qqlpo1/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision: I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote. Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values. While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great. Do you support this mission? There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. Friend, When Virginia's legislative session gavels in tomorrow, a new era will be underway, and all hands will be on deck to defend the tremendous progress we've made over the past four years. During my time in the legislature, I saw the lengths Republicans went through to restrict voting rights and women's access to reproductive healthcare. Virginians haven't forgotten, and we won't let Republicans in the General Assembly turn back the clocks again. **[Please contribute $20 or more to The Way Ahead 's Future Fund before our pre-session deadline tonight so we can protect our progress and keep fighting for our progressive values!](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ZRwgQONZGVfLTjlH5MnOtMUGVClXzUmzd6aA-xNY84=/l129ssyzmz6hHxHSUAQ7mxvon5f1VP8Rcs64ahQ8OUs=)** Thank you, as always, for everything you do. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Nothing is more important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Nothing is more important than the right to vote. Not the filibuster. Not this particular policy or that. _Nothing._ Protecting and expanding the right to vote is fundamental. It’s the foundational right upon which all others are built. And it is precisely why so many Republicans — inspired by Trump’s Big Lie — are desperately trying to strip away the right to vote from so many. _But for what exactly?_ To gain more power? To promote the private interest of the wealthy? To cement permanent minority rule in response to our country’s changing demographics? To appease one man’s autocratic desires? To tear down our very democracy itself? Ultimately there is no single answer to that question, but there is a solution: **Congress, and especially holdouts in the Senate, must act, and act fast.** Already, we are seeing hundreds of bills to suppress the right to vote introduced around the country by Republican State Legislatures. We are seeing Republican governors and legislatures work to strip independent election officials of their power, and also position the legislature to overturn the results of the next presidential election if their candidate loses. And we are seeing an effort by Senate Republicans to block any meaningful response. We cannot wait this out or hope it gets better. We just can’t. It requires all of the Democrats in the Senate, even those who represent red states, to find the courage to act, and act fast. Otherwise, I fear all may be lost. **If you’re with me, please consider pitching in a few dollars to my campaign. Not only are we fighting for voting rights this year, but we’re fighting for my re-election and the re-election of so many Democrats facing difficult challenges in 2022. This year isn’t going to be easy — but democracy itself is on the ballot. Anything meaningful you can pitch in right now can help:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40570270/324940954/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_AM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWI3NWU0ZC1mMTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZb-yrqclfZDRdhWhJ0vNMOUQowvBiDuVdQF1qgsOvU=)

It’s the foundational right upon which all others are built. And it is precisely why so many Republicans — inspired by Trump’s Big Lie — are desperately trying to strip away the right to vote from so many. But for what exactly? To gain more power? To promote the private interest of the wealthy? To cement permanent minority rule in response to our country’s changing demographics? To appease one man’s autocratic desires? To tear down our very democracy itself? Ultimately there is no single answer to that question, but there is a solution: Congress, and especially holdouts in the Senate, must act, and act fast. Already, we are seeing hundreds of bills to suppress the right to vote introduced around the country by Republican State Legislatures. We are seeing Republican governors and legislatures work to strip independent election officials of their power, and also position the legislature to overturn the results of the next presidential election if their candidate loses. And we are seeing an effort by Senate Republicans to block any meaningful response. We cannot wait this out or hope it gets better. We just can’t. It requires all of the Democrats in the Senate, even those who represent red states, to find the courage to act, and act fast. Otherwise, I fear all may be lost. If you’re with me, please consider pitching in a few dollars to my campaign. Not only are we fighting for voting rights this year, but we’re fighting for my re-election and the re-election of so many Democrats facing difficult challenges in 2022. This year isn’t going to be easy — but democracy itself is on the ballot. Anything meaningful you can pitch in right now can help: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for reading this and so many of my emails, I recognize they tend to be longer than most. But the reality is, this fight is so important, and I refuse to give up and I know you do too. Information is powerful — but often takes more than two sentences to explain. I appreciate that you are willing to take the time. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Not a drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Trump and his extremist allies are so obsessed with holding onto power ...
| | |
---
**Please, you cannot ignore this, Peter:****New evidence has revealed that sitting GOP lawmakers hatched plans with the Trump White House to steal the election and subvert our democracy.**
**I've said from the beginning that I’m running for Senate because I’m terrified about losing our democracy – and this is _exactly _what I've been talking about: **Politicians who are _currently serving in Congress _were knowingly and blatantly conspiring with Trump to overturn the results of the election! They failed a year ago, but our democracy is still in serious danger right now.
You see, just a year after his failed insurrection, Donald Trump has already kicked off his comeback tour. His eyes are set on 2024, but he knows that first he must take back Congress – and the path to a red Senate runs directly through Iowa. That's why he flew to Des Moines for a massive MAGA rally to endorse my far-right opponent and his top ally, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R).
This is not a drill, Peter. Trump and his extremist allies are so obsessed with holding onto power that they are willing to disenfranchise voters and destroy our democracy to do it. Just look at Sen. Grassley, who recently defended Trump's attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the 2020 election results.
It's up to grassroots teams like ours to ensure that Trump doesn't take back the Senate and destroy our democracy. With Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings, we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. But we need grassroots resources to do it. **That's why we've set a new fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight tonight. Please, can you donate now to protect our democracy and our Democratic majority from Trump's attacks?**

clean_body: Trump and his extremist allies are so obsessed with holding onto power ... | | | Please, you cannot ignore this, Peter:New evidence has revealed that sitting GOP lawmakers hatched plans with the Trump White House to steal the election and subvert our democracy. I've said from the beginning that I’m running for Senate because I’m terrified about losing our democracy – and this is exactly what I've been talking about: Politicians who are currently serving in Congress were knowingly and blatantly conspiring with Trump to overturn the results of the election! They failed a year ago, but our democracy is still in serious danger right now. You see, just a year after his failed insurrection, Donald Trump has already kicked off his comeback tour. His eyes are set on 2024, but he knows that first he must take back Congress – and the path to a red Senate runs directly through Iowa. That's why he flew to Des Moines for a massive MAGA rally to endorse my far-right opponent and his top ally, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R). This is not a drill, Peter. Trump and his extremist allies are so obsessed with holding onto power that they are willing to disenfranchise voters and destroy our democracy to do it. Just look at Sen. Grassley, who recently defended Trump's attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the 2020 election results. It's up to grassroots teams like ours to ensure that Trump doesn't take back the Senate and destroy our democracy. With Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings, we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. But we need grassroots resources to do it. That's why we've set a new fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight tonight. Please, can you donate now to protect our democracy and our Democratic majority from Trump's attacks? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with me. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Pennsylvania is *the* most consequential race of 2022
#

Did you see this headline?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40572591/324953235/-358086307?refcode2=146d4087-f772-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220111-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDZkNDA4Ny1mNzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sj7evuzdTcuyiqExxhZfiCL0Y6lQZPzI25JfwW-t-es=)
It’s like we’ve been saying — Pennsylvania is *the* most consequential race of 2022.
Our Democratic Senate majority is on the line, and Pennsylvania is a must-win state if we hope to keep it.
Democrats are just one vote away from capping insulin prices, providing universal pre-K, and taking real action against climate change. Failure is not an option.
Malcolm Kenyatta is the only candidate in this race who can excite and turn out the kind of numbers it will take to win, so we have to ask:
[Will you make a contribution to Malcolm’s campaign for the United States Senate today? Malcolm Kenyatta is the only candidate in this race who can excite and turn out the kind of numbers it will take to win, so we have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
It’s crunch-time. Starting at 12:00 PM tomorrow, we can no longer accept donations while the General Assembly enters Session. We’re looking for a groundswell of grassroots support to help us meet our final goal of $7,500 ahead of the fundraising blackout period. Click here to rush a donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?amount=20.22]
Peter Franchot is the unprecedented candidate that we need for these unprecedented times. As our state’s chief fiscal officer, he has an unparalleled understanding of the state’s budget -- a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor that cannot be learned on the job. He was the first candidate to release a detailed policy platform outlining how he’ll get to work on Day One to deliver results for our small businesses and working families. And he has more endorsements from current elected officials than any candidate in this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?amount=20.22]We have the momentum in this race -- and we need your help to keep our foot on the pedal. If you can give anything to help us reach our final fundraising goal before the fundraising blackout period begins, we would greatly appreciate it.

This could be the most expensive election in our state’s history, which is why it’s critical that we raise as much as we can ahead of the fundraising blackout period.
Thank you,
Team Franchot

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._B4QmA5BhuJhQ4I4NG-w)Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [** _That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.--c0b_4LuREPA)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._V3z2TGYcLpRQUsus0VjQ) Thank you for your support!For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDExLWQ1MjE1ZmEzZWVhZTRiYWViZjdlYzcyMThmMDJiZDc3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/zLG5aRN_iTQXYjA96PhJ-A) to unsubscribe.

| | Hi there!

Today is our first $10 Tuesday of 2022!

We started this as an easy way to rush support to Tom as we ramp up our campaign — and with all the early attack ads coming our way, it’s helped us have the resources to amplify our positive message. [But, this $10 Tuesday is the most important of the cycle so far.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40574556/324961809/-1267168964?amount=15&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_220111_1_1&refcode2=73b165ff-fb72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2IxNjVmZi1mYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70w_XH4lMxF9zg3lVvkOvFF4cUCjZTkWldfHUSCJN50=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They blacklisted me--are you next?
body:
It was only a matter of time before Twitter's Big Tech fascists came for me.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuckl9ep4k2rr7boe3dugi05j5u8if5lq7i3ui88_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3m6aobapj46drr5ctk6opb6tphc9qecopmciqrco3mc1gmadpim6or6tj16loefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jcjg7co36e4qb6p9nm2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4kbdblajbb2sb5j20u253nv20gq3h42179ovi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) [**TAKE ACTION: Join Marjorie Taylor Greene 's Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7dh4qevlfikpajis5fs3k0vo3jqaqn7vf23ikho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs)
Fellow Patriot, It was only a matter of time before Twitter's Big Tech fascists came for me. My name is Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene and I've officially been blacklisted in Washington. I'll cut straight to the chase - I need your immediate help to fight back against the forces that seek to silence conservative voices like yours and mine. **That 's because, under the cover of the New Year's weekend, Twitter took the opportunity to PERMANENTLY BAN me from their platform, just as they did to President Trump!** My crime? I DARED to challenge the narrative of the COVID tyrants about deaths related to their so-called "safe and effective vaccine." Big Tech can't stop the truth. Nor can the Communist Democrats and their friends in the Fake News Media. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpdhm032t0stj60bellh5h52slhg574nou1tb9n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) **I won 't back down, I won't stop fighting, and I will always SPEAK THE TRUT****H!** ** ** **But I need to know - are you with me?** [**If you want to fight with me to save America, I need you to join my Blacklisted Battalion RIGHT AWAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbad1qdlenp71oi2iasr4laio7lj99lhcraul9n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zulcg7ahsr2me24rhiu2rsim21rds8t5luqfebio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) The champagne socialists in Silicon Valley will stop at nothing to silence conservatives like you and me. I've already been one of their favorite targets. Before I was even elected to Congress, they kicked me off social media for posing with one of those "scary" AR-15s... In January 2021, they suspended me for objecting to the 2020 election results... And when I filed articles of impeachment against Sleepy Joe Biden the day after he took office, the D.C. Swamp has been after me ever since. I've been repeatedly censored by Big Tech, attacked by the Fake News Media, and condemned by Communist Democrats and RINOs alike. **In fact, I 'm the FIRST Member of Congress to be BANNED from Twitter.** And NOW, it's only a matter of time before they try to throw me off every digital platform...
But no matter how many times they've tried to take me down, I keep getting back up because I know I've got a country to save, and millions of patriotic Americans like you have my six. **That 's why I'm organizing this Blacklisted Battalion - and I need YOU to join me in fighting back against the Big Tech fascists and Communist Democrats today. ** [**Help me save our country by joining my Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4lm2jgj7954v9ujeg7n2bblmgoktlldkbn877so_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp8sl74r5t1m192pejcuct7opd5ui82o4frts8q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) Once you've enlisted, I'll do everything in my power to keep you updated about what's REALLY going on in Congress, while I'm fighting to stop Sleepy Joe, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the radical left from destroying America. I hate to say it, but email is now the best and most reliable way for patriots like you and me to stay connected during this era of "cancel culture" craziness. **But even if I have to handwrite a letter to every member of my Blacklisted Battalion, I 'm willing to do it, because REAL America needs to know about the schemes the radical Left is inflicting upon our country.** That's the level I'm willing to go to save America. And since you're reading this, I know you're willing to do the same... **Will you take a stand against the Big Tech fascists and Communist Democrats from destroying the country we know and love?** [**I hope so, because I NEED you to join my Blacklisted Battalion IMMEDIATELY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr9sjgfljema25kgb5tj204b47epf2s4ncob2328_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqduuncofamdk67ri86aud2emc6gfsg2pl5ine6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) Please don't delay and think "I can get to this later." Like I mentioned, it's only a matter of time before Big Tech tries to boot me from EVERY digital platform. If you want to fight with me to save our great nation from the radical Left, you and I must band together NOW before it's too late. It will only take you 30 seconds to become a member of my beloved Blacklisted Battalion... Can I count on you? **For Freedom,** **Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene** P.S. If Twitter's censors can blacklist a sitting president and a duly-elected congresswoman, what do you think they can do to you? That's why it's critically important that conservatives like you and me stick together - because they can't stop us from speaking the truth! [**Help me drive Twitter 's censors CRAZY and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress by joining my Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z442282km3fi6fsmltc0sl9fc4hnu1o7dvouprfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs) [**JOIN THE FIGHT NOW**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z37oucsus6pjv49qdfg5pm5nte6s0j57rtdivdno_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cji61or4cth2bs)

GREENE FOR CONGRESS, INC.
3 Central Plaza #142
Rome, GA 30161
---

name: Tara Pohlmeyer
subject: Check out our official campaign website!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Have you seen our new website, Peter ?
We launched this campaign on a shoestring budget with just a few days notice. We put up a quick web page, got a bunch of volunteers together, and built a movement. Now we have thousands of small donors, yard signs across our 100 mile long district, and today, a FULL website [https://www.casarforcongress.com/] !
You can read up on Greg’s vision for a better future, sign up to volunteer in your community, pick out some great merchandise, or donate directly to our get out the vote efforts. It’s never been easier to get involved. So click here to check out our new website and sign up for future volunteer opportunities! [https://www.casarforcongress.com/]
https://www.casarforcongress.com/ [https://www.casarforcongress.com/] Peter , there’s only five weeks until early voting starts. So it’s critical that we get out the vote now to reach every voter possible in the 35th District. From Austin to San Antonio and everywhere in-between, our campaign will be talking to voters directly in your community—and we would love for you to join us!
Our new website makes it easier than ever to get involved—whether you’re looking to volunteer, collect your FREE yard sign, or purchase a Greg Casar for Congress t-shirt, koozie, or tote bag from our merch store.
So check it out, share with your friends and family, and encourage them to get involved. Click here to visit our new and improved campaign website! [https://www.casarforcongress.com/]
Thank you,
-Tara
Tara Pohlmeyer, Communications Director
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Trump continues to help Elise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
I launched my campaign a few months ago to not just beat Elise Stefanik in the 2022 midterm elections, but to finally send a Representative to Washington who will fight for the sanctity of our democracy.
| Hi Team,

I launched my campaign a few months ago to not just beat Elise Stefanik in the 2022 midterm elections, but to finally send a Representative to Washington who will fight for the sanctity of our democracy.

While my team and I are working day and night to build a strong grassroots campaign grounded in democratic values, Elise Stefanik is in Mar-a-Lago with Donald Trump today for a fundraiser with some of the same people that organized and led the insurrection against our democracy on January 6th. She’s hoping to raise millions for her campaign and to help flip the house this November. If that happens, it may become impossible to protect the electoral process and the popular will of the American people in 2024 and beyond.

**[That’s why I’m asking 250 supporters to help make our grassroots team even stronger by making a donation before the end of the day today. While Elise and Donald Trump are capitalizing off those who fueled the insurrection, I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us stop them in November. Instead of working to bring the January 6th insurrectionists to justice, she’s busy cozying up to Trump and his dark money friends who helped instigate this violent attack on our democracy — and just _days_ after the one year anniversary.

Because it was thousands of $5 donations that helped us flip the Senate and it’s going to be thousands more that help us defend our majority in 2022.
But even more so than that, it was $5 that allowed us to flip the Senate and pass the _American Rescue Plan_ that cut child poverty in half thanks to the expanded Child Tax Credit.
It was $5 that allowed us to flip the Senate and pass the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — a once-in-a-generation investment to repair our crumbling infrastructure and fight climate change.
So when we ask for $5, it’s more than just the $5 you’re donating. It’s $5 that will allow Senate Democrats to keep up the fight to pass more legislation like this that will improve people’s lives.
**You can see now how critical and impactful your support is, which is why we have to ask:**

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Can you believe this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
DeSantis just finished his State of the State address

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576193/324970568/-1987745334?refcode=sosaddress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZiYzkwMS0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRtTUEA4XTEKuY-2M4Bl-tmjXn8r6uxluf4J4uy6qMI=) Peter, Governor DeSantis just finished his State of the State address to kick off this year’s legislative session. **And it was just what we expected, Peter: a whole lot of lies to justify his dangerous authoritarian agenda and promote his 2024 presidential campaign. ** There’s no doubt about it — our state is facing some of the most difficult challenges in recent memory. COVID-19 is taking a deadly toll on our communities. Housing costs are rising at an unsustainable rate. And too many Florida families are struggling to make ends meet. [**But, instead of focusing on policies that help working families and small businesses, DeSantis has decided to attack our unions, whine about “wokeness,” and double down on his efforts to strip us of our basic rights. And we need to fight back. Click here to rush a $10 donation to help us do it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576194/324970569/-1987745334?refcode=sosaddress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZiYzkwMS0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRtTUEA4XTEKuY-2M4Bl-tmjXn8r6uxluf4J4uy6qMI=) When someone tells you who they are, you believe them. And in his speech, DeSantis told us exactly who he is: a politician who cares more about his ambitions than his constituents, a Governor who puts more effort into fighting a fake culture war than helping Florida families, and a dangerous authoritarian trying to imitate Donald Trump. [**It’s time for SOMETHING NEW, Peter. It’s time for a Governor who will tackle the affordability crisis, uplift small businesses, rebuild our economy, and support Florida families.
