[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576215/324970728/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI1MTI2ZC0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cin6o7W_ve5fBfLfdR70yBxmlpOiBohd1hf5qJay7no=)

Friend,

Last year, the House passed the Build Back Better Act, setting our country down a path toward progress with real investments in critical areas of our economy.

**[To start off 2022 right, we need to make sure this historic bill is signed into law. Join us in calling on the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act and send the bill to President Biden's desk now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576216/324970729/-1692267947?ms=em21_220111_bbb&refcode=em21_220111_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI1MTI2ZC0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cin6o7W_ve5fBfLfdR70yBxmlpOiBohd1hf5qJay7no=&emci=1b984db5-3372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f725126d-0273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576217/324970730/-1692267947?ms=em21_220111_bbb&refcode=em21_220111_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI1MTI2ZC0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cin6o7W_ve5fBfLfdR70yBxmlpOiBohd1hf5qJay7no=&emci=1b984db5-3372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f725126d-0273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18516396) **Here are a just few reasons we need the Build Back Better Act:**
* It makes the **_largest investment in child care in the nation's history_** – saving American families more than half of what they currently spend on child care by expanding the Child Tax Credit and more.
* The Build Back Better Act is the **_biggest expansion of affordable health care in a decade_** – reducing prescription costs, closing the Medicaid Coverage Gap, and strengthening the Affordable Care Act to lessen the burden for folks around the country.
* It's **_the largest effort to combat climate change in American history_** – delivering tax credits to middle class families to shift to clean energy, and bolstering our resilience to climate disasters.
* It's the **_most significant effort to strengthen the middle class in generations_** – making huge investments in affordable housing, expanding access to affordable, high-quality education, and expanding the Earned Income Tax Credit.

**There's just one problem: right now, we don't have the votes to pass this landmark legislation and get working families the help they urgently need.**

If we want to enact meaningful change under the Biden administration, we need to elect more leaders who have proven their commitment to the American people, and Conor Lamb already did that by casting his vote for our families, working people, and our children's future.

**But first, we need the Senate to follow Conor's lead and put the American people first by passing the Build Back Better Act.**

**[Friend, will you add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act now? Our communities can't wait any longer for these critical investments>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576218/324970731/-1692267947?ms=em21_220111_bbb&refcode=em21_220111_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI1MTI2ZC0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cin6o7W_ve5fBfLfdR70yBxmlpOiBohd1hf5qJay7no=&emci=1b984db5-3372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f725126d-0273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18516396)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576219/324970732/-1692267947?ms=em21_220111_bbb&refcode=em21_220111_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI1MTI2ZC0wMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cin6o7W_ve5fBfLfdR70yBxmlpOiBohd1hf5qJay7no=&emci=1b984db5-3372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f725126d-0273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18516396) Thanks for taking action,

Vicky had a great interview with Asi Es Mi Gente TV on Friday. This Spanish-language news show, targeted to the Salvadoran community, asked Vicky for her insight on running against an incumbent and speaking on issues pertaining to the politics of the U.S. and El Salvador. Vicky emphasized the need for change in Virginia’s 8th Congressional District, especially when it comes to education, economy and jobs. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emjan11?refcode=jan11]
While the interview is in Spanish, we had a generous volunteer help us with closed captioning.
WATCH BELOW:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emjan11?refcode=jan11 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emjan11?refcode=jan11]
You can also watch the interview in its entirety here: https://fb.watch/asbKwwETvm/ [https://fb.watch/asbKwwETvm/]
We are always excited to keep you updated on the campaign. It is because of supporters like you who help ensure Vicky can continue sharing her vision for our district. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emjan11?refcode=jan11] Join Team Victoria today!

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers

clean_body: [, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday? Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk. We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [] Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress. Thanks for your support. ---- Begin forwarded message ---- From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com> Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m. It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter. She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation. But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress. I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022. So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [] DONATE NOW » [] Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office. And the Senate is currently sitting on legislation that could restore and protect voting rights in states across the country. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
In less than one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40576988/324974481/-368617150?refcode=20220111_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYyZTNiNC0wNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qYPEux5G2hX45iZ2-RyXMQ4GxR5Y-1hsiE4CSJ3w20=)
---

| | Derek, In less than one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important the Arizona Senate race is. That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024. Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true. That’s why we’re asking if you can split a $25 contribution between our campaign and CommonGood before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far right will be even more fired up to beat Mark. So we’re asking: [**Can you please split a $25 contribution with CommonGood to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? It all adds up when everyone is chipping in. clean_body: In less than one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. | | | = | | Derek, In less than one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important the Arizona Senate race is. That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024. Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true. That’s why we’re asking if you can split a $25 contribution between our campaign and CommonGood before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far right will be even more fired up to beat Mark. So we’re asking: = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It is absolutely critical that Mark Kelly holds this seat. And the only way that happens is if we’re all in this together. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Finally: my official 2022 district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220111_reactivation2&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220111_reactivation2&amount=28]
Team,
2022 is here, and I want to tell you about some HUGE news in our race.
Congressional district lines are redrawn every 10 years. This year, for the very first time, Michigan’s district lines were drawn by an independent citizens commission -- made up of 13 regular Michiganders from all walks of life -- instead of by the State Legislature. This is thanks to a ballot initiative that was passed in 2018 and designed to end partisan gerrymandering.
Well, the Commission recently voted on the final maps, and the results are in. I’ve decided that I will be seeking re-election to Congress in Michigan’s new 7th congressional district. Let’s take a closer look:
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220111_reactivation2&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220111_reactivation2&amount=28]
This new district layout differs from the current layout in a couple of key ways. While it still contains 2 of the 2.5 counties I currently represent (Ingham and Livingston Counties), it also adds more of the counties that make up the Lansing area – including Clinton County and most of Eaton County. It also adds all of Shiawassee County and small portions of Oakland and Genesee Counties. The district is getting bigger, and a lot more rural, with many small towns where I’ve never been on the ballot before.
It’s a pure toss-up: the district voted for Biden by 1 point in 2020 but voted for Trump by 3 points in 2016. Not only is this the most competitive House race in the state of Michigan, it’s one of the most competitive in the country.
Speaking of the most competitive House race in Michigan, I also have an opponent. He’s a former military member who resigned from the National Guard instead of getting vaccinated, and he currently serves in the state Senate, in a district that overlaps with this new Congressional district.
Luckily, I know how to campaign in rural areas, and I know how to win a tough election. To win in this new district, I’ll need to campaign like I’m running for Mayor in 30 small towns at once. It’s a matter of showing up to places that may not have seen a Democratic politician in decades, getting to know the people who have spent their entire lives there, and showing them I care. I’ll be looking to hear about all of the day-to-day, hyper-local issues that have gone unaddressed: the street that floods everytime it rains, the fire hall that’s spent years trying to buy a new fire-truck, and that one bad intersection that just needs a red light. Issues that impact you no matter your party or voting history.
And while I’m thrilled to continue running to represent the people of mid-Michigan, it is incredibly hard to think about leaving the portions of northern Oakland County that I currently represent. Even though I’m campaigning in a new area, I am still the representative for northern Oakland County until January 2023, and they will remain my priority. Even as I move to run in the newly shaped district, I will never be far.
So here’s where things stand: we’ve kicked off 2022 with a new district and a new opponent, so I’m not wasting any time. This is where I need you. Introducing myself, especially in these small towns, will take more time, more labor, and more resources. We have to reach people where they are. That means my team and I will definitely be putting more miles on our cars to meet folks who have never seen my name on their ballot, making more calls to build out additional volunteer networks, and purchasing ads in more media markets to reach people who may not be as politically engaged.
Contributions will help us hit the ground running with a sophisticated and strategic campaign. Will you consider chipping in to ensure Michigan’s most competitive House seat stays blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220106_reactivation1&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220111_reactivation2&amount=28]
THANK YOU!! Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442
campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com]
https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress] https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Holly, MI 48442

body:
Governor Greg Abbott JUST ANNOUNCED that he’s OFFICIALLY running for re-election in Texas!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;

| | **FROM THE DESK OF GOVERNOR GREG ABBOTT**

---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’m personally reaching out today to ask for your help at a pivotal moment in time.

I JUST ANNOUNCED that I’m officially running for re-election in Texas, _**[and I’m now looking for 2,022 committed conservatives to help us WIN in 2022.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39icr-1sodj-4qqlpo2/ "and I’m now looking for 2,022 committed conservatives to help us WIN in 2022.")**_

Later today I’m going to review the list of patriots who donated during the moments following our re-election bid, _**[and I’m really hoping I see your name on the list, Fellow Conservative.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39icr-1sodk-4qqlpo3/ "and I’m really hoping I see your name on the list, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%.")**_

I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t truly important, Fellow Conservative, but we need your help if we’re going to secure a win and defeat Beto.

We must start off strong, **[which is why I’m looking for 2,022 patriots to commit their support TODAY.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39icr-1sodr-4qqlpo0/ "which is why I’m looking for 2,022 patriots to commit their support TODAY.")**

Governor Greg Abbott

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The cold hard TRUTH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter --

Communist Democrats have lost their minds.

You see, their January 6th witch-hunt shows how OBSESSED they are to silence anyone who supports the America First agenda and stands up to the Swamp.

**But like President Trump, I refuse to turn my back on Americans like you.**

That's why they are so desperate to take me out. And today, I need your help. [_**CHIP IN $17.76 TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r) Peter, if Democrats and RINOs like Liz Cheney really cared about riots, why did they just watch BLM attacked police officers?

Why did they refuse to protect American businesses from being destroyed by looters?

And why did they not protect federal courthouses from vandals?

**It's because they don't care about the riots on Jan 6th.**

Democrats only care about creating a delusion to hoodwink the American people into believing that an "insurrection" happened on Jan 6th.

A delusion the complicit media eagerly helped push.

**And just like we saw with President Trump, it's a coordinated takedown of anyone that supports the America First Agenda.**

It's why the establishment sat silently while I got deplatformed on Twitter.

And that's why they put 30,000 Democrats in my district.

So it's crucial I have the support of folks like you to help me fight back and derail this witch-hunt.

**[Will you join me today by chipping in your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r)?**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r) The Jan 6 Committee led by Liz Cheney, Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Adam Kinzinger are demanding I hand over my personal phone and social media records so they can leak them to CNN...

_All because they want to remove me from Congress or even toss me in jail_!

And they are foaming at the mouth like a rabid beast just thinking about it.

Some Democrats are even trying to invoke the 14th Amendment and trying to label me a "traitor" to REMOVE me.

**But you know as well as I do, the only traitors are the Communist Democrats perverting the Constitution.** [_**CHIP IN $17.76 TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r) Peter, this is why I ran for Congress, to fight for Americans who are just as fed up with the D.C. Swamp as I am.

This is why they want to push me to the side and come after their real victims...

_America First supporters like you_!

They want to make an example out of me to show you what will happen if you refuse to bow down to their Communist Agenda.

That's the cold hard TRUTH.

Peter, I refuse to let that happen.

**I refuse to watch as they uproot everything President Trump did for America.**

And I will continue to fight the treacherous Democrats from pushing their radical Communist Agenda on good, hardworking Americans like you.

**[So please, help me fight this witch-hunt by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r)!**

Keep Fighting!

Marjorie Taylor Greene

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r) Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59464647:WJ-QzKHNq:m:1:2365227053:00580C0AA2D92D1CC0A2F38C98480BE9:r)

---

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: Can I count on you, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Hi friend, sorry to bump this in your inbox, but with time running out before tonight's deadline, I'm still falling short of my daily fundraising goal.

I can't emphasize this enough: This race could very well decide Senate control. And with the GOP pouring MILLIONS into Florida to make sure Marco Rubio defeats me , there is zero room for error.

Every single fundraising goal is critical to keeping my campaign on track to flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic majority. That's why I need to ask you again, before my midnight deadline: Can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect the Senate for Democrats?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk2111-fr-text

Thank you so much,

Val Demings

From: Demings, Val

Subject: Friend, this is BIG.

SUPPORTER RECORD
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONATION STATUS: PENDING
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. on January 11

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk2111-fr-text

Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump MILLIONS into Marco Rubio's war chest. With experts predicting this could be the most expensive Senate race EVER, missing this goal is NOT an option.

CNN UPGRADED Democrats' chances of defeating Rubio and flipping this seat blue. But political experts are saying resources will make the difference between winning and losing, so I CANNOT afford to fall short today.

Please, friend, will you rush a contribution of $5 or more before midnight to give this people-powered campaign the resources needed to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar will make a critical difference in this must-win race.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk2111-fr-text

Thank you,

Val Demings

name: Larry Klayman
subject: Help this Marine Veteran who was BETRAYED by his own Country!
body:
After spending 10 years in the United States Marine Corps, fighting for our nation, Jesus Rivera has been betrayed by his own co
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0tvtj453lv3qvk397m6po85pf23a82a29nofl50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35c5h2bs)
Patriot,

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zi8bs0e1c33v1e1pp4911mhpl0r36qa64vglkvbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35c5h2bs) After spending 10 years in the United States Marine Corps, fighting for our nation, Jesus Rivera has been betrayed by his own country at the hands of the Biden Regime and the Gestapo tactics of the FBI and it’s Department of Justice.

I’m Larry Klayman, founder of Judicial Watch and currently the founder and chairman of Freedom Watch, a non-profit government watchdog that investigates and prosecutes government corruption and abuse!

On a January morning, up to 20 heavily armed agents raided this Marine’s home, effectively ransacking his home, falsely and unconstitutionally arresting and interrogating him without legal counsel present, and seizing his personal property which he needs for his livelihood to earn a living for his family.

Mr. Rivera’s loving wife watched and pleaded with the armed agents to see a warrant as her husband was placed in handcuffs.

What was Mr. Rivera’s alleged crime that resulted in such an intimidating show of force by the FBI and law enforcement?

He was one of the hundreds of thousands of protesters in Washington on January 6th. The patriotic Marine was there to witness the final speech of his president before leaving office.

Mr. Rivera committed no crime, engaged in violence, and I have filed a class action lawsuit for constitutional violations on his behalf to make this right, and so others aren’t terrorized into submission.

[**Join me in fighting for the Marine veteran by backing this class action lawsuit.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z51dpjth38ekh209na2g8bsi6cl3biesmcabc9g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35c5h2bs)

| [**SUPPORT FREEDOM WATCH'S IMPORTANT WORK**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zro3o94ut4hdbjq3l6bagtvl76khvnlml21oata0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35c5h2bs)
---

The FBI, it’s Director Robert Wray and specifically the special agents that we’re personally suing in this case, are using their positions of power **to intimidate patriots around the nation to stay put, stay quiet and stay out of politics!**

They’re using tactics reminiscent of Adolf Hilter’s Third Riech! Read the words of the FBI Director named as a defendant in the case, Christopher Wray:

_We know who you are if you're out there, and FBI agents are coming to find you

Wray and his FBI has been pressuring spouses, siblings, children and former romantic partners who spotted their loved ones at the Capitol to rat them out and turn them in.

This tyrannical heavy handed intimidation is reminiscent of the Nazis having fellow Germans turn in German Jews during the Holocaust!_
We not only need to get justice for Mr. Rivera and other pro-Trump peaceful protesters like him, a combat Marine with 10 years of honorable service, **we need to send a message to Biden’s personal goon squad that we won’t be silenced!**

[**Help me do that now by supporting Freedom Watch’s work with your most generous tax deductible contribution today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zamb1aq5to68jltoq7qb183knsgfo61qhv9ep0r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35c5h2bs)

Thank you from the bottom of hearts for your support.

For Freedom,

Larry Klayman
Founder and General Counsel
Freedom Watch, Inc.

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zoi2pr4ndnkie2uiq2nfi6afp53d2m8jlcacoaao).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvlu8pfs17mh3fd3o9j9sebo4sbhmsrvvvdkbnsg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1chie4ob0clgm49fg)

Read the words of the FBI Director named as a defendant in the case, Christopher Wray: We know who you are if you're out there, and FBI agents are coming to find you Wray and his FBI has been pressuring spouses, siblings, children and former romantic partners who spotted their loved ones at the Capitol to rat them out and turn them in. This tyrannical heavy handed intimidation is reminiscent of the Nazis having fellow Germans turn in German Jews during the Holocaust! We not only need to get justice for Mr. Rivera and other pro-Trump peaceful protesters like him, a combat Marine with 10 years of honorable service, we need to send a message to Biden’s personal goon squad that we won’t be silenced! Thank you from the bottom of hearts for your support. For Freedom, Larry Klayman Founder and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc. subject: The Government's New 50% Retirement Tax Trap. Are You at Risk?
body:
Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!
| Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Finance. | **Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!** **The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself.** Dear Friend, If you or any of your loved ones are planning to retire in the next couple of years, please pay close attention. The government has changed the rules on you, midgame. One wrong move now could trigger a 50% tax on your retirement accounts. Which is why _Barron's_ called this rule change "the most sweeping retirement legislations in more than a decade." And _Forbes_ simply called it a "ticking time bomb." Millions of Americans are unprepared for what's about to come. That's why Newsmax has teamed up with some of the nation's top IRA experts to put together a FREE special report, **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z71cth94jkvdgfkp6v0algdfjc2t5ruqio6u7g50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35clh2bs)The 50% tax is just the beginning of all the sneaky traps that Congress has laid out for you in this new legislation. [**Click here to claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zi987bn6cjstogmkfgjckdqpnde77o9hl5g6gvv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35clh2bs) _._ Inside this brand-new special report, you'll discover: ✔ **"Uh oh... we owe the IRS now..."** Your beneficiaries might be saying this, if you don't read the fine print on your retirement account. But you can protect them from headache and hassle by including this one word... on this one form. Page 27. ✔ **The 20% tax trap.** 1 in 2 Americans make a simple money transfer move every year. But now, this same move could give you a surprise tax bill. But you can avoid this altogether with the simple "triple t" strategy. It's easy to do and it won't sound alarms at the IRS. Page 22. ✔ **WARNING: What never to do with your IRA.** This honest mistake among family members can make every dime taxable and become the kiss of death for your retirement account. See how you can avoid it. Page 27. ✔ **The sneaky IRS move that could cost you dearly.** Did you know that proposed IRS rules - years away from becoming official - could impact your taxes THIS YEAR? It's true. But you can navigate this gray area easily and avoid big surprises. Page 15. ✔ **The simple dispute that can cost you $5,000 to $10,000 or more... plus a year of your valuable time!** Read this warning before you decide to dispute anything with the IRS. Or even ask them for clarification on issues. Page 30. Everything is spelled out in detail in **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z14qs644fe6b1a5iechu7tp4ua85qac2mg2rbl3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35clh2bs)With your retirement savings at stake, this is the most important briefing you'll read in your lifetime. The stakes are higher than ever. A 50% tax could cut your savings in half. But it's 100% avoidable. This new special report from Newsmax Finance has the solution. [**Claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5cmc4elldnpinfgv5fvdo5ra1uj4t257ve1q1p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjh62o35clh2bs). Sincerely, Newsmax Finance

# Peter,

The federal government REFUSES to protect the American people from illegal aliens invading our country through our open southern borders... I will not stand by and watch as millions of American lives are jeopardized by mass immigration endorsed by the rogue Biden regime. Spineless RINOs and radical Democrats are destroying our country with their open-border immigration policies. That's why I introduced three bills in the Oklahoma State Senate this week designed to protect and secure our southern borders from future illegal invasions: SB 1226 \- Prohibits illegal alien anchor babies from receiving citizenship in Oklahoma SB 1228 \- Allows for CARES funds received by the state of Oklahoma to be used to help build the wall along the southern border of neighboring states SB 1231 \- Empowers the Governor to send members of the Oklahoma National Guard to border states in order to help secure their portion of the southern border If you want a Republican who puts the dreams of foreign kids over those of American children... there are plenty of establishment RINOs to choose from. When elected to the US Senate, I promise to continue to put the people and children of America first. The radical Biden regime is running rogue, and I refuse to stand by as they allow millions of law-breaking foreigners to illegally enter our country through our open southern borders... [Do you agree that we must close our southern borders to protect American citizens from human trafficking, illicit activity, and illegal immigrants, Peter? Click here to make an URGENT donation today >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWXSd33B81DyW8kmQGF5kfzcKW1FPBGm4D9RfnN5j5FQc3lLBmV1-WJV7CgDX2W2Bkqv_3zN5ydW8y9PwM2by5VhN4qKyRlDl-bMW164K3F5rKjtZV2hTz24-nf3pW5nMVVf4n8ylPW43NgDF5cflBpW26Nwhx5kswqFW7M2pnG1tWlXGW593GT86rbS7sW8NfYPY2w-9GTW5bPXKl10MrNBTP5YR7Fd7TlVFx84P5jQq3fW147p6r4xDVgwW8Mtwvk5Df0mJW2rb1c86z2L2tW3rpGDM1lptNwW7s8x-T5Qtq2mW2QhkGl8CJx6mW1z5Q-f7PQVvyW4DQfLH5TK-kc3cT91) As the feds refuse to take action, our economy continues to tank alongside the American Dream. clean_body: Peter, the federal government REFUSES to protect the American people from illegal aliens invading our country through our open southern borders.. | Peter, The federal government REFUSES to protect the American people from illegal aliens invading our country through our open southern borders... I will not stand by and watch as millions of American lives are jeopardized by mass immigration endorsed by the rogue Biden regime. Spineless RINOs and radical Democrats are destroying our country with their open-border immigration policies. That's why I introduced three bills in the Oklahoma State Senate this week designed to protect and secure our southern borders from future illegal invasions: SB 1226 \- Prohibits illegal alien anchor babies from receiving citizenship in Oklahoma SB 1228 \- Allows for CARES funds received by the state of Oklahoma to be used to help build the wall along the southern border of neighboring states SB 1231 \- Empowers the Governor to send members of the Oklahoma National Guard to border states in order to help secure their portion of the southern border If you want a Republican who puts the dreams of foreign kids over those of American children... there are plenty of establishment RINOs to choose from. When elected to the US Senate, I promise to continue to put the people and children of America first. The radical Biden regime is running rogue, and I refuse to stand by as they allow millions of law-breaking foreigners to illegally enter our country through our open southern borders... As the feds refuse to take action, our economy continues to tank alongside the American Dream. Let's make the American Dream a reality again by putting Americans first. You will always have my support. Senator Nathan Dahm Candidate for United States Senate Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 | | Nathan Dahm, PO Box 2323, Broken Arrow, Oklahoma 74013

body:
| | |
---
| | Friend,

For the last year, Fight for Schools has done what no one else could: show the entire world how broken and warped our kids’ education has become. Jennifer Wexton has said nothing and done nothing after a child was sexually assaulted on school grounds, the crime was covered up, and Loudoun County Schools failed to keep our children safe. We deserve a representative in Congress who will stand with parents, not with Loudoun’s woke School Board. In Congress, I will fight to keep our kids safe and ALWAYS PUT THEM FIRST.
---
| [Join Jeanine in taking the fight for parents all the way to Congress! ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=772e9ca7b2&e=fc83fb200d "Join Jeanine in taking the fight for parents all the way to Congress! ")
---
| Jennifer Wexton silently stood by while the School Board pushed Critical Race Theory and canceled advanced math classes. They even supported lawless Commonwealth Attorney Buta Biberja as she pushed her soft-on-crime agenda and put a rapist back in school with our kids.
I’m running to give parents a choice. We have been failed by state legislators who supported [HB 257.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8f946af9b3&e=fc83fb200d) We have been failed by woke school boards. We have been failed by Jennifer Wexton. In Congress, I’ll put parents and our kids before woke, soft on crime agendas. But I need your help to get there.

subject: Should the U.S. boycott the Beijing Olympics?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:
Here’s China’s track record lately... [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4ae6b6b269174235aaa5820b84fd3ede&_e=7UMDPgSuseV5h4jPSM2rD1G0u53v7UqpFYwj7wUUS3QftG2ideoKGSVIng3dRdXHseAaIt1OHARNd05Ap897YuARDLv689KPU5XhcFKBHrFfRkbAPp1nXLX_CD1SJ3tkDggvp6Taef8cFOVjYqoKkYHkNphSB802b5dAZZDVZxTQYNQtkMjU4r8AheBLRymriIF9HyS95qnZBu1ojKFrp5NVcYOWnnc0PIM8zM4rGeTAGzZ09_sUU98oAUufytZxWiakg_QqYrnks6gbWMNDONc4USMjFRCHmdTayO_WAk6ezRVXFigOcHOb9E3E4w3R76v8O44poIDJdWe2PDPWS96bnbAmiTpQfP46gfEf4tsQhl5dpFBqF1CDSR-KlpObYOi3lDi7pikKOgo2Uf4kJaMDME3OuRW0enQKMnxBtjDncYgNmyMudCZOm1rFwchCujp2GK1tt0myiBy4KChUPBnVIhc7_aJfQBj0eZLjO76WTZHTjIF2bpt3BVISdPwc) Friend, Did you know that China is hosting the 2022 Winter Olympics in Beijing? name: James Marter
subject: Friends, See you Friday?
body:
Posted at an unexpected source...
|
# You're Invited this Friday
# FREE Marter for Congress EVENT!
---
|
---
| Come on out to Plano and join me a for a great evening, learning how to shoot properly and safely! (Or show off your shooting skills!) The Second Amendment is about preserving our Constitutional right to defend ourselves and our loved ones.
* **_Date:_ Friday, January 14th, 2022 **
* **_Time:_ 4:30 pm to 7:00 pm**
* **_Where:_ RKA Gun Gallery & Indoor Range 3029 Eldamain Rd, Plano IL **

**Complimentary food, soft drinks _AND RANGE TIME_ will be provided! (4 range lanes reserved!) **There will be a complimentary instructor provided for assistance. Gun rentals available from $12.00 to $30.00 dollars. No reloads please. **Questions? Just reply to this email.** **Marter for Congress Fundraiser *** Donation $20 or more appreciated ***** *** Voluntary *** Contributions will help elect a true Constitutional Conservative and 100% 2nd Amendment Defender to represent Illinois' 14th Congressional District.**** Member: NRA, ISRA, State Line Rifle Association, & GunsSaveLIFE.com **Please come out and support the 2nd Amendment and my campaign!** **If you live in the 14th District, stop by and sign my ballot petition, even if you don't shoot!**

body:

* Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN moved my race up on their list of Top 10 seats likely to flip and said my race is the "most important race for the Dems."
* My opponent outraised me TWO QUARTERS in a row.
* Roll Call labeled me the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for reelection.

I need you to listen to me, Peter. name: Jessica Mason
subject: The myth of “unskilled” labor
body:
another excuse from corporations to avoid workers' rights

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40580916/324992230/-1288899752?refcode=220111_FR_unskilledlabor_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ3MDQ1Yy0xNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCMpPCWCR0YXl_34_kEyJU-X4uZ7fP43Z7aSrT7T29s=)

Team New Deal,

The myth of “unskilled” labor is designed by greedy corporate interests as an excuse to undermine the economic and societal value of laborers so that they can avoid providing adequate workers’ rights. **_It’s time to break the myth._**

From farming to factory operations, individuals with labor intensive jobs are what supply this country with manufactured goods, food, and critical supplies.

The pandemic has further highlighted the importance of these essential laborers — but most politicians don’t talk about the role **immigration reform** plays in providing these workers with crucial support. There are 11 million undocumented Americans, many of who are the ones picking our fruit, maintaining our crops, stocking our shelves, and working in the facilities where our other necessary products are made and shipped from.

We MUST provide support to the hard-working immigrants who call this country home but lack the security that legal status and citizenship provide. We need to ensure these workers can get their jobs done safely without worrying about being detained or separated from their families. We need to do more so that they can support their families and keep providing their work _that is so essential to keeping our country afloat._

**[I will continue to stand with our laborers and farm workers by championing livable wages and immigration reform. Will you pitch in today so I can make it to Congress and fight to ensure these essential workers receive the rights and protection they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40580917/324992231/-1288899752?refcode=220111_FR_unskilledlabor_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ3MDQ1Yy0xNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCMpPCWCR0YXl_34_kEyJU-X4uZ7fP43Z7aSrT7T29s=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40580918/324992232/-1288899752?refcode=220111_FR_unskilledlabor_ELothr&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ3MDQ1Yy0xNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCMpPCWCR0YXl_34_kEyJU-X4uZ7fP43Z7aSrT7T29s=)** In solidarity, ****Jessica**** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40580919/324992233/-1288899752?refcode=220111_FR_unskilledlabor_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ3MDQ1Yy0xNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCMpPCWCR0YXl_34_kEyJU-X4uZ7fP43Z7aSrT7T29s=)

**Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families.** **As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind.** **TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: The Progressive Caucus just endorsed Court expansion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Hello friend,
Over the past year, the far-right, 6-3 majority on the Supreme Court has rolled back Americans’ fundamental rights in cases on voting and reproductive freedom. With each decision, the Court has continued to strip away our constitutional rights and further unravel our democracy, a democracy that falls deeper into crisis every day.
But we are not powerless in this fight – and it’s critical that we take action before it’s too late.
Last week, the Congressional Progressive Caucus voted to endorse _The Judiciary Act of 2021_ — legislation I co-introduced to restore integrity and balance to the Supreme Court by expanding it.
The American people agree. Last September, a poll showed a majority of Americans agree with the statement that Supreme Court expansion is required to protect reproductive freedom.
**[Friend, I’m thrilled that our movement to expand the Supreme Court is gaining steam. Will you join the Congressional Progressive Caucus and add your name in support of _The Judiciary Act of 2021_? I need all hands on deck in this fight to save our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581050/324995215/600225136?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA4YjQwZS0xOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCE1GeHvl7CJX2PMjLD4CevWLbLfD_3Qku2veqHv1kw=&emci=7174c731-1e72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e808b40e-1973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581052/324995218/600225136?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA4YjQwZS0xOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCE1GeHvl7CJX2PMjLD4CevWLbLfD_3Qku2veqHv1kw=&emci=7174c731-1e72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e808b40e-1973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
Since Republicans rushed Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation in 2020, the Court has further gutted the _Voting Rights Act_ by allowing state-level discriminatory voting laws, effectively overturned _Roe v. Wade_ by allowing a Texas abortion ban to remain intact, and ruled against labor unions’ right to organize.
We must fight the ongoing assault on our fundamental rights and do everything in our power to save our democracy. That’s why I will be working tirelessly this year to move this critical legislation forward and restore justice to our nation’s highest court.
**[The American people understand what’s at stake, and we need my colleagues in Washington to see how critical it is to our democracy to expand the Supreme Court. Friend, add your name to support _The Judiciary Act of 2021_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581053/324995221/600225136?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA4YjQwZS0xOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCE1GeHvl7CJX2PMjLD4CevWLbLfD_3Qku2veqHv1kw=&emci=7174c731-1e72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e808b40e-1973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581054/324995222/600225136?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA4YjQwZS0xOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCE1GeHvl7CJX2PMjLD4CevWLbLfD_3Qku2veqHv1kw=&emci=7174c731-1e72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e808b40e-1973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
With midterms around the corner, it is more urgent than ever that we protect and defend our democracy ahead of this critical election year. Together, we will.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: Hello friend, Over the past year, the far-right, 6-3 majority on the Supreme Court has rolled back Americans’ fundamental rights in cases on voting and reproductive freedom. With each decision, the Court has continued to strip away our constitutional rights and further unravel our democracy, a democracy that falls deeper into crisis every day. But we are not powerless in this fight – and it’s critical that we take action before it’s too late. Last week, the Congressional Progressive Caucus voted to endorse The Judiciary Act of 2021 — legislation I co-introduced to restore integrity and balance to the Supreme Court by expanding it. The American people agree. Last September, a poll showed a majority of Americans agree with the statement that Supreme Court expansion is required to protect reproductive freedom. Since Republicans rushed Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation in 2020, the Court has further gutted the Voting Rights Act by allowing state-level discriminatory voting laws, effectively overturned Roe v. Wade by allowing a Texas abortion ban to remain intact, and ruled against labor unions’ right to organize. We must fight the ongoing assault on our fundamental rights and do everything in our power to save our democracy. That’s why I will be working tirelessly this year to move this critical legislation forward and restore justice to our nation’s highest court. With midterms around the corner, it is more urgent than ever that we protect and defend our democracy ahead of this critical election year. Together, we will. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. That’s why John SUPPORTS holding a debate before the gubernatorial primary. | | ---|--- A debate will allow the candidates to showcase their plans for our state’s future and answer critical questions about where they stand on the issues. This is information that voters NEED before voting in our primary. John is ready to explain how he led Cincinnati’s comeback and how that experience has prepared him to help write a comeback story for Ohio. Do you want to see a Democratic gubernatorial debate before the primary? Thanks for sharing your input, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: A winning strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Team — We’re almost two weeks into 2022, which means we’re officially in the “on year.” This is when campaigns kick into high gear and nasty attack ads flood the airwaves. It’s also when we need to hit every single fundraising goal from now until the March 1st primary if we want to win our race. [**Will you donate $10 or more to help us reach our FIRST fundraising goal of 2022 and give our campaign the foundational resources we need to ensure Mike will be the one to take on Dan Patrick in November? Anything you can give will go a long way toward making sure we can take back this seat this year**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581260/324995852/-839969798?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA4YjQwZS0xOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_wwBfdzUJY_3089NKJndOI8Z2G7-KapTLKosnA7APM=) Special interests and shadowy players have already poured hundreds of thousands of dollars to boost Dan Patrick and to discourage candidates from competing to flip this seat. We can’t compete with that kind of cash. But what we can do is use our momentum to out-hustle and out-work the other side. Folks, we have a winning strategy. Mike and our team have spent months going over our plan, budget, and goal. clean_body: | Team — We’re almost two weeks into 2022, which means we’re officially in the “on year.” This is when campaigns kick into high gear and nasty attack ads flood the airwaves. It’s also when we need to hit every single fundraising goal from now until the March 1st primary if we want to win our race. = Special interests and shadowy players have already poured hundreds of thousands of dollars to boost Dan Patrick and to discourage candidates from competing to flip this seat. We can’t compete with that kind of cash. But what we can do is use our momentum to out-hustle and out-work the other side. Folks, we have a winning strategy. Mike and our team have spent months going over our plan, budget, and goal. If we can make the early investments to put our strategy in motion — we can win the primary election in March and defeat Dan Patrick in November. name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Wounded Warriors
body:
A nonpartisan issue
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CrQwmz5Wve5KwzUvkVtZBHwdIDZ-FseqIBSiz2HgSBXH2dNvzHW_nTrTu0zIdJ2UrkKKIF0owQe5EU4bkwtVTE6zF2D8te38eGVIixSJll2yVMcdNTd46LUMzUjbSuz2_D_HrluayMJmUapQYxrXXRmhZ6D5kq9V&c=r6u0qYpRICqW56jjMen88st0nUECum3wwtreFxIEVPwcgGHl6ClUOA==&ch=SQVlHOAU2FE6kZU1pgLsc8URv6ISoVm9dUC1A-Yd-yajLtzlDLlA4Q==)
---
|
---
|
# I know the trauma of war
---
As a combat veteran who has served combat tours in both Afghanistan and Iraq, I know first-hand the trauma of war. The 2020 Wounded Warrior Project Survey shows that 93% of wounded warriors experienced a severe mental injury during their service and 83% reported experiencing other issues such as:

* Sleep problems 83%
* PTSD 82%
* Anxiety 76%
* Depression 72%

Veterans are committing suicide at a rate of over 22 per day. Many of them are homeless or jobless due to their inability to cope from psychological or physical wounds. Our military men and women deserve the best treatment to heal from their wounds--therapy, alternative treatments, and family support and education. As a nation we owe these warriors a debt, not just in gratitude, but in ensuring they have a path forward when they return home. I will fight for reforms in our Veterans Administration, and prioritize legislation that improves access to health care, jobs, education, and housing for veterans. These men and women who have risked their lives for us deserve every opportunity to heal and return to normal lives. We must never forget what they have given in the exercise of their duty.
This is a nonpartisan issue which will take sound leadership to see such efforts take hold. I have the leadership experience to bring about change in Washington so that we fulfill our responsibilities by taking care of our great servants. As a veteran, I understand their needs. Donate today so I may help those who have risked their lives to preserve our freedom. Together we can honor their sacrifices.
---

|

clean_body: A nonpartisan issue | | | | == | | I know the trauma of war As a combat veteran who has served combat tours in both Afghanistan and Iraq, I know first-hand the trauma of war. The 2020 Wounded Warrior Project Survey shows that 93% of wounded warriors experienced a severe mental injury during their service and 83% reported experiencing other issues such as: Sleep problems 83% PTSD 82% Anxiety 76% Depression 72% Veterans are committing suicide at a rate of over 22 per day. Many of them are homeless or jobless due to their inability to cope from psychological or physical wounds. Our military men and women deserve the best treatment to heal from their wounds--therapy, alternative treatments, and family support and education. As a nation we owe these warriors a debt, not just in gratitude, but in ensuring they have a path forward when they return home. I will fight for reforms in our Veterans Administration, and prioritize legislation that improves access to health care, jobs, education, and housing for veterans. These men and women who have risked their lives for us deserve every opportunity to heal and return to normal lives. We must never forget what they have given in the exercise of their duty. This is a nonpartisan issue which will take sound leadership to see such efforts take hold. I have the leadership experience to bring about change in Washington so that we fulfill our responsibilities by taking care of our great servants. As a veteran, I understand their needs. Donate today so I may help those who have risked their lives to preserve our freedom. Together we can honor their sacrifices. | | | | | | == | | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker in support of VA reforms to prioritize struggling veterans. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand with those who sacrificed for our country and our freedom. | | | COLORADO WILDFIRE - HOW YOU CAN HELP | Here are a number of places where you can contribute goods, funding, or even volunteer your time: | == | YMCA is accepting donations (blankets, pillows, dog and cat food) at their location: 2800 Dagny Way, Lafayette, CO 80026. You can follow their updates for what supplies are needed: | | == | | | Boulder Office of Emergency Management | * You can donate money, discounted services, or sign up to volunteer through the == form here: . | == | | | Airbnb Open Homes Program | Sign up to offer shelter. The Airbnb Open Homes Program will notify you if your offer is needed. | | == | | | Volunteer to help with clean-up and rebuilding | If you want to volunteer for ongoing clean-up and rebuilding efforts, check Samaritan's Purse below: | == | | Current Shelter Resources | KDVR has provided a list of current shelters that are available. | == | | | Animal Assistance | | == | == | | | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Kina Collins
subject: What it means that we haven’t passed Voting Rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Republicans are gutting the rights of the working class Black voters who carried Democrats into power. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s-eydEKrO4GHlVqlT7wHnF-Q2PIYf5I4KuwEb1wNof7LthRsCSAHBJOi40wSKHLagCEou09jW59Qrb0oDmFHP-fX5VgnuYmh_Usn0yrIu3LUVOmQjT5EWJICzninIZ737TghYCOOUFgG29U6Nvo5gEeDGwqj3zrTCp2LKZi6Y5X0iMEBSfK0eHebSDIELCJiO8fc9oNDDiLsR783rDUKZeN8wuGUS4J_VGoXx3saFTot/3im/CDEMDzRQTHmNU21MZBa2Ww/h0/lI3CORWu_7JWBU6bESPnhSjLyyRXw9oc4rpp1YBnXF0) team, When I look towards DC from my work on the ground in IL-7, and I see that the Senate continues to lack the courage to pass voting rights, I know what it means. **It means they’ve forgotten who gave Democrats their majority in 2020.** In Georgia, the home of our 49th and 50th Senate votes, Republicans have gutted every voting opportunity for the working class Black voters who carried Democrats into power. **As a movement organizer in Chicago, I know that when one of us is denied our rights, all of us suffer.** The destruction of voting rights isn’t just a red state issue, it isn’t just a Democratic party issue, it is an existential threat to all of us. [**Every Democratic member of Congress should be willing to do whatever it takes to protect us, our Voting Rights, and our future. Donate $15 today to make sure IL-7 has that kind of Representative.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESe3x6kJPC9xqx8Qx8EnHvmUkG0NWsTU4hLlgKDARrUD-8O4SEuPQ2kAA8jdj4iZv469W80K8YI53fxGuCCc0kObTCq6YumWaITez_N08mQ8VJy-9lh3fPQYn_o8hflkVOMy7CLLcym7neQLJUhg2yYIvoiOgvE8fMlFi9y28rq_aIaOK96I3EchQCMdAeiIZ1Ub0NF2weZrxEL8NAn1ftoyBR0nz9LSPXo7VY9Z8lK1qYIMJDBJnW21GqjY-ubd_3JsgNZCIbhq1eS7-MEMp7aPjLgf2HineRqlakGBRxhaw/3im/CDEMDzRQTHmNU21MZBa2Ww/h1/yKETujR_sGFg2rURGpHXoqbW7z2JpryLc1cgCHNwgEQ) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESV4rg8PQbf0lxDMmnMF1Ho3wxf5qY6ZxQl4j-CPRJ4Q9TsBAfF0I6vrc71xzXTuk3Nga5Sb62u42Pd3sj0r6FglWMuCsc0VO4cSbxOrs6UP6NutjaTxrejab53HVCaDEtQNJgIvDqWkPiuMfGYBNoqQcRIu6_expMphKfmQcTIAzHphBgOQo-jLr8eBkIYq_GEQl8MnWDgADv4VhWOMXzvhDtzYuNU38YWR_X6myBDvGTATMOwTIJVDgEjmBEDG0kD4QtLcB-9msCvUwAEvkO52EAC6Hqb0qACAu7A8H59zI/3im/CDEMDzRQTHmNU21MZBa2Ww/h2/j2YQAUAo7nQr-SrLB566tqzNLjFp23tynqLlIlbWI_0) Sometimes, it can seem like Congress is a place filled with people thinking about winning their next election, and extending their own careers. Where I come from, you don’t seek power as an end, you seek it as a tool for change. This is a moment for every member of Congress to ask themselves why they choose to lead. If it isn’t because they want to fight for the most fundamental right guaranteed by our Democracy, in every way they can, I don’t think they belong in Congress. [**If you agree, chip in $15 to help me fight for accountability, moral clarity, and action.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESf52EhxFuO3WqMdBxpAHtvv9tXpGCqrvEbkxkES4jTY60jTAaiGCS36XnsXdAF-g4OA95uEPIbFVLV0k5vehJYG3fBzc5VYtpuYkENgWQ-zZrowJUSHdk5foGoAw1j55-Yf9vZX2tDwgkb1VLmMipdTPvFNJrEkitaNgGdOlX6tTYMHxMSPlfb9UuTJzM20jlIVWv9jJYV3Ql3mLfL2wMngfM7yS3_Scr_EfDBhd5KLCJXwCdNfSk8mo-FiEW0UjhAbWEp_-KpoilzsezbbJFX1EVWyAGEYLG1d8-29Suvm8/3im/CDEMDzRQTHmNU21MZBa2Ww/h3/tL2ECn1pxHRB_RCA6Cv_uww0zWaIPCWLWEvlglFW30s) When I’m in Congress, no filibuster is going to stop us from fighting to expand our democracy.
In solidarity, Kina Collins [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBs0zC9IaHV702RvnHGbmb4SqL3wdPfpZtnC86nQ77J0YJNiOf6QJPb-FW3wEnx_QcPwrQPuvBC24CCJHM1prPNS7Lkt3c7E9H9csJ66E35xbMDBFWytlSG3lDvkh9zOW1dLF5S7kbxVT1tCO86JJjHusw0UclC6oalYIVfhIcr8AxmZHDjxTGrKdhOi5so9JTBrumac2JuW5uj14PZikEGFUYE77CHOsqj932BuB9ququc66-2iucWmgZf77s5q03AFisZxSUaGNfGP-aMZiC5E/3im/CDEMDzRQTHmNU21MZBa2Ww/h4/t2PHaipw5hIcnXD1BuVymn-HuNUNsu8tB9ULcp0ug9M) | To give by check:

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Please forgive me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, please excuse how blunt I’m about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...
|
---
| | Please excuse how blunt I’m about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures.[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38h8qk3lu7oml99m5n0darbgrd7te8jshia60vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjj68oj7cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6tpke1pbcc3hchrj0p1k61q3epplckrras726eorco36edjmbcj4ckp61p5mc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcclimdgefclncoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg) | Friend, please excuse how blunt I'm about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...

I've begged.
I've pleaded.
I've humbly asked.
I've even listed out the stakes - I'm the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election, my race will determine control of the Senate.

_**All this - and you STILL haven 't stepped up.**_

Maybe you haven't stepped up because you think Florida is a shoo-in but that couldn't be further from the truth. Florida's last Senate election went to a recount and Republicans BARELY won. My race is virtually tied, Friend, I'm depending on you...

I'll ask one more time, can I count on you? I really **really** need this year to start off strong.

**[SEND DESPERATELY NEEDED HELP>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt81h7dt3s5kq9v27t8ba5k344foe18kpqeuldqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjj68oj7cph2bs "SEND DESPERATELY NEEDED HELP --")**

Thank you for your support,

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znu0dgnam3jb3klrhhef1tpb4h56umbrc909vi50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjj68oj7cph2bs "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Friend, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Friend. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8brt5eunisugjk9o23gbsnrtkp2kbo3giiceeto_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjj68oj7cph2bs "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Hey, Peter.
Right before the holidays, Dr. Martin and the team wrapped our 95 Counties in 95 Days tour. From Mountain City to Memphis, we heard a call for new leadership and a demand to vote Bill Lee out.
Here are some of the policy priorities we heard from you in your communities:
* Expansion of Medicaid
* Opening access to tele-health and tele-medicine
* Updating Tennessee's antiquated marijuana laws
* Raising pay for our public school teachers
* Fixing the broken BEP formula that funds our schools
* Empowering our family farms
* Creating more green energy jobs
* Protecting our waterways from pollution
* Supporting low-interest loans for minority-owned businesses
* Reducing sentences for non-violent drug offenders
* Investing in our infrastructure

There is so much we can do with new leadership in Tennessee — but we have to do it together. Bill Lee has only ever sought to divide us, and it’s time we put an end to that. That’s why Dr. Martin, from Day One, has always said that this campaign is _**OUR**_ campaign.
[In less than eleven months, voters will go to the polls in the general election. Will you make a donation today to fuel the next phase of our campaign? We have a huge deadline coming up on Saturday that’s absolutely crucial to our success, so any amount helps!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581808/324999283/-353966433?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220111midmonth2_M4TN_opntl_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM1OTA4Ni0xYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6ci28wqO_g-rxWQZTdwqOFsjMzbnbw3iU73kK1_8Dw=)

Help a U.S. Army Captain take back the House.
| Friend,

My good friend, fellow West Point Alumni, and U.S. Army veteran Wesley Hunt needs our help.

With Texas gaining its brand-new 38th congressional district, Wesley is running in **1 of just 5 must-win congressional districts** that will decide the fate of the House majority – _**and thus, the fate of Pelosi’s retirement plans.**_

But because Pelosi knows Wesley can END her reign over the House, she’s made him her **#1 TARGET** as we officially begin the election year.

body:
Stand with Patty and help make sure we keep the Senate and Washington state blue.
#
This is urgent Peter. Fox News is pushing around a Washington state poll with Patty Murray leading by only 3 points. We can’t let extreme Washington state Republicans build momentum – so we need to respond by showing strong support for Patty right now.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to support Patty Murray and her work to bring Washington state’s progressive values to Capitol Hill?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581996/325000115/1078889854?refcode=pm_em_220111_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmVlMThhMS0xYjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAPyex2l4rTCsNZVbDQxDGrx1jUnJhSymA0PrrTF-aY=)**
Republicans are already doing everything they can to flip Senate seats across the country and put Mitch McConnell back in charge. We know what happens when the Republican Party is in control – they roll back our progress on issues like reproductive rights and child care, put politics above helping people get through this pandemic, and refuse to acknowledge the climate crisis as the imminent threat it is.
We can’t hand the Senate back over to Mitch McConnell – and to do that, we must protect every single Senate seat. Patty is working hard to hear from voters all across Washington state and taking nothing for granted, but she needs your help.
**[Will you donate today to stand with Patty and help make sure we keep the Senate – and Washington state – blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40581997/325000116/1078889854?refcode=pm_em_220111_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmVlMThhMS0xYjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAPyex2l4rTCsNZVbDQxDGrx1jUnJhSymA0PrrTF-aY=)**
There’s a long year ahead until Election Day, but it’s so important we come out strong now and make clear Washington state will stand up for its progressive values and leaders like Patty.
Thanks for being in this fight with us,
Team Murray

clean_body: | | | | Liberal’s wish list. | Friend, Have you ever heard of End Citizen’s United? They are a Washington, DC Super PAC that spends MILLIONS of dollars electing Democrats at all office levels. So why are they sending emails on behalf of Liz Cheney and Nancy Pelosi? Take a look for yourself: We need to expose Liz Cheney for who she really is. She’s not with us, she has been dogpaddling in the DC Swamp, and cares more about showboating than protecting the people of Wyoming and America from the Democrats’ disastrous policies. Don’t let the Democrats and Liz Cheney win. We DESERVE better, and we DEMAND better. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

He HATED it — because he knows he was caught lying under oath about it. He was even caught on a hot mic saying this about me.

clean_body: While we’re fighting back at the state level against attacks on direct democracy through our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, federal action is needed to protect voting rights across the country. | | Team: Over the course of the last year, extremist legislators have launched an all-out assault on our right to vote. Make no mistake — these attacks by extremist officials are a calculated effort that disproportionately targets people of color, voters with disabilities, those with limited English proficiency, and other voters who face obstacles at the ballot box. While we’re fighting back at the state level against attacks on direct democracy through our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, federal action is needed to protect voting rights across the country. The Senate is considering legislation right now that would advance protections at the ballot box. The attack on voting rights is un-American and anti-democratic, making it harder for everyday citizens to vote for ballot measures and make real change happen at the ballot box. Every single American reserves the right to cast their vote and make their voice heard. Thanks for your help in the fight to protect our democracy. — Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Today, I’m traveling down to Georgia with President Biden and Vice President Harris to talk about an issue that motivates me so much: voting rights.

I’m working alongside my Democratic colleagues in the House to make sure the horrible attacks on voting rights from Republican-led state legislatures are addressed in Washington, but there’s only so much we can do.

I proudly voted in favor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 and the For The People Act. Both of these bills would be massive steps toward ensuring voting rights are protected across the country, but _both bills have stalled in the Senate._

**_Voting rights are too important for us to let progress be stopped by process._

[Today, I’m asking you to donate $15 to my campaign not just to keep Delaware blue, but to make sure we keep the pressure on those standing in the way of safeguarding voting rights for all Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40582308/325001485/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220111voting_vtng_lbr_6_NG_Nl1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAzYmNhNy0xZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LX1AHzIrMif5B2sqVgFCigF3pjA22BT6ddI8-prFdBI=)**

clean_body: To talk about the importance of voting rights. = = | **= **=** Today, I’m traveling down to Georgia with President Biden and Vice President Harris to talk about an issue that motivates me so much: voting rights. I’m working alongside my Democratic colleagues in the House to make sure the horrible attacks on voting rights from Republican-led state legislatures are addressed in Washington, but there’s only so much we can do. I proudly voted in favor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 and the For The People Act. Both of these bills would be massive steps toward ensuring voting rights are protected across the country, but both bills have stalled in the Senate. Voting rights are too important for us to let progress be stopped by process. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Lisa Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. A few days ago, it was reported that Kern County — the county that makes up the majority of California’s 23rd District — is “bracing for a COVID surge.” This was preventable. This was something we could see coming. And our representative in Congress, Kevin McCarthy, has taken no action to stop it. He has fought against mask mandates that would have saved lives. He has fought against vaccine mandates that would have saved lives. And now that our communities are facing yet another surge, his failure to lead is evident. This surge disproportionately affects the workers that he has commended as “essential”. Our health care workers are tired. Our communities are tired. We have asked for help and he has ignored us. Every. Single. Time. **As a top Republican with leadership power in Congress, Kevin McCarthy has used that power to benefit himself and his corporate donors rather than fight for the people he claims to represent. He must be held accountable. Make a donation today and hold him accountable by kicking him out of office in November.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately._ 📈📈📈 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-poll-0110 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-poll-0110]Hi team,
We just got some incredible poll results back, and Eric asked me to share them with you.
Eric is leading with the highest name ID of any Democrat in this race. This means that more voters know and recognize Eric Lynn than the other two candidates in the race.
Eric also had the highest favorable numbers of anyone in the race. Net-favorability is an important metric when tracking a campaign, and Eric’s +25 rating is impressive, especially at this early stage.
Our poll also shows that the information voters are learning about Eric overwhelmingly makes them feel more favorable towards him. This is great information as we ramp up our communication efforts.
I know this is a lot of campaign jargon, but the bottom line is simple: Eric Lynn is in the best position to keep Florida’s 13th Congressional District blue for the Democrats.
FL-13 absolutely must stay blue if we hope to hold the Democratic Majority in Congress, and this poll confirms what we hear on the ground every day – Eric is the clear choice to win this seat.
Will you join the frontrunner’s campaign today and help us win this election? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-poll-0110]
