name: Marc For Oregon
subject: Trojan Horse of Deceit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend,

The rights and privileges that Americans take for granted are not a reality in many parts of the world. Democracy, liberty, and opportunity are now being threatened by a powerful idea called "socialism".

Some argue socialism is the road to a more just and egalitarian society. What they don't disclose is that it is part of a broader ideology of "collectivism" where the state is all-important and individual rights and liberties are sacrificed. Unfortunately, the end of all collectivist schemes is a government that alternatively coddles and opresses its citizens from cradle to grave - in other words: Marxism. According to Marxist theory, socialism is the transitional phase between the overthrow of Capitalism and the realization of Communism.
---
---
|
---
**To turn socialism on its head! That is why I'm running for governor of Oregon.**** **
---
|
---
---

| | That is why I'm in the race to become the next governor of Oregon. I want to restore Oregon to a place where folks decide for themselves whether to mask up or get the jab; to work hard and keep more of their hard-earned money; to choose the best education for their children; and to speak freely, meet freely, and live freely without the crush of government mandates and fears resulting from a lawless society.
The Left wants you to believe that catastrophe is always around the corner and the only way to avoid it is to give government more control over your individual liberty. Everything they do is a Trojan horse of deceit, carefully crafted to advance their real agenda of finishing off America as we know it.

clean_body: | | | | Friend, The rights and privileges that Americans take for granted are not a reality in many parts of the world. Democracy, liberty, and opportunity are now being threatened by a powerful idea called "socialism". Some argue socialism is the road to a more just and egalitarian society. What they don't disclose is that it is part of a broader ideology of "collectivism" where the state is all-important and individual rights and liberties are sacrificed. Unfortunately, the end of all collectivist schemes is a government that alternatively coddles and opresses its citizens from cradle to grave - in other words: Marxism. According to Marxist theory, socialism is the transitional phase between the overthrow of Capitalism and the realization of Communism. | To turn socialism on its head! That is why I'm running for governor of Oregon. | | | | That is why I'm in the race to become the next governor of Oregon. I want to restore Oregon to a place where folks decide for themselves whether to mask up or get the jab; to work hard and keep more of their hard-earned money; to choose the best education for their children; and to speak freely, meet freely, and live freely without the crush of government mandates and fears resulting from a lawless society. The Left wants you to believe that catastrophe is always around the corner and the only way to avoid it is to give government more control over your individual liberty. Everything they do is a Trojan horse of deceit, carefully crafted to advance their real agenda of finishing off America as we know it. | Let's not be afraid. | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me, Friend. Best wishes, Marc Thielman | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

name: Peter Franchot
subject: We are so close to the finish line
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Over this past week, we’ve received a flood of grassroots donations ahead of our critical fundraising deadline tomorrow. I’m sincerely humbled by and grateful for the tremendous support our campaign has received. To those that have already contributed, thank you.
When the General Assembly convenes tomorrow at noon for their 90-day legislative session, I will be forbidden to raise money for my campaign until the legislature adjourns in April. As the only sitting elected official running for governor, I am the only gubernatorial candidate who will be sidelined from fundraising activities.
RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=afternoon&amount=20.22]To all those who have yet to contribute, I am humbly asking for your support to help power our victory. The June 28th Democratic primary is just a little over five months away, and this gubernatorial primary election will surely be one of the most expensive in our state’s history — with millions of dollars flowing in from outside our state.
RUSH $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=afternoon&amount=20.22]Ours is a people-powered, Maryland-focused campaign, and this campaign depends on support from Marylanders like you. If we can sustain this energy in these final hours, then I have no doubt that we can end this fundraising period with a strong finish.
We are so close to reaching the finish line – and we need your help to keep our foot on the pedal. If you have anything to spare, will you chip in to help me meet my final fundraising goal of $7,500 by tomorrow’s 11:59 AM deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=afternoon&amount=20.22]
While I can’t take part in fundraising activities during the legislative session, my outstanding running mate, Monique Anderson-Walker, will be able to do so. Over the coming months, she will be reaching out to you and asking for your support [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moniquewalker?refcode=em011122&amount=20.22] , and I would be grateful for any support you can lend to ensure that our campaign has the financial resources we need to win this race.
Thank you for your continued support and friendship. I don’t take it for granted, and together, we will accomplish great things for the state that we love.
Best,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=afternoon&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3c1c4396-1873-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/1c00a170-2173-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwYTE3MC0yMTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKhLuDi7pMHKEZ_w9-lMy2HLcQF9g6RlPe7mquOXXRQ=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

subject: Our first goal of 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40582897/325004185/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDAwYTE3MC0yMTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P78DXRtNZRF0tIRPgJTihCDzlILDKEpN4Xyk_WRXRDc=)

| | Peter, I have an unexpected window open in my schedule today, so I wanted to send this email to you and share why you should invest in my race. This block of free time doesn’t come around often, especially when I’m juggling my family and a battleground race for Congress. But if the campaign trail has taught me anything, it’s the importance of being prepared and planning ahead. Right now, we’re figuring out the investments we can make in the months and weeks to come to win this race and replace insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn here in Western North Carolina. Cawthorn is unfit to serve public office – he’s proven to be a threat to our democracy by repeatedly spreading Trump’s Big Lie, and plotting an extremist, right-wing takeover of North Carolina and the GOP nationally. We must do everything we can to pave a new path forward for WNC and replace Cawthorn’s divisive and toxic brand of politics with a politics powered by love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. Our primary is _five months away_. Absentee voting is set to start in just over _two months_. It will be here before we know it, and we need to have the resources for the road ahead. [**That’s why we set a mid-month fundraising goal of $20,000 – our first goal of 2022 – and meeting this goal will be a strong indication of whether this team has what it takes to win. clean_body: | = | | Peter, I have an unexpected window open in my schedule today, so I wanted to send this email to you and share why you should invest in my race. This block of free time doesn’t come around often, especially when I’m juggling my family and a battleground race for Congress. But if the campaign trail has taught me anything, it’s the importance of being prepared and planning ahead. Right now, we’re figuring out the investments we can make in the months and weeks to come to win this race and replace insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn here in Western North Carolina. Cawthorn is unfit to serve public office – he’s proven to be a threat to our democracy by repeatedly spreading Trump’s Big Lie, and plotting an extremist, right-wing takeover of North Carolina and the GOP nationally. We must do everything we can to pave a new path forward for WNC and replace Cawthorn’s divisive and toxic brand of politics with a politics powered by love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. Our primary is five months away. Absentee voting is set to start in just over two months. It will be here before we know it, and we need to have the resources for the road ahead. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re not relying on donations from corporate PACs or special interests. Instead, we’re relying on your grassroots donations. Counting on you, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . | Dear Peter ,
---
| With social media platforms stifling conservative voices, Kathy Barnette's voice is not left out. Censorship is at its highest. Kathy's voice needs to be heard. Her message has to reach every Pennsylvanian if we want to help save this country. "One follower equals one voter!" This is where you come in. For every social media post, we would like you to engage with following, liking, sharing, and commenting on each of the posts on each of the social media platforms. It is calculated between 30 seconds to a minute to do this on each platform. This will ensure an organic reach that cannot be censored by the elite groups and heads of these platforms. This is a significant contribution that will help the campaign tremendously and will not take much time to do. We could not do this without grassroots volunteers like you! clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | | | | Dear Peter , | With social media platforms stifling conservative voices, Kathy Barnette's voice is not left out. Censorship is at its highest. Kathy's voice needs to be heard. Her message has to reach every Pennsylvanian if we want to help save this country. "One follower equals one voter!" This is where you come in. For every social media post, we would like you to engage with following, liking, sharing, and commenting on each of the posts on each of the social media platforms. It is calculated between 30 seconds to a minute to do this on each platform. This will ensure an organic reach that cannot be censored by the elite groups and heads of these platforms. This is a significant contribution that will help the campaign tremendously and will not take much time to do. We could not do this without grassroots volunteers like you! If anyone asks about Kathy Barnette and her views refer them to == Social Media Platforms Facebook == == Like, Comment, and Share posts. Post an encouraging comment. subject: I will always fight for you and our liberties
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Steube for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=42d0e1deebf04d8c8f677ad794a7eea4&_e=zhuUvaWTp9TXkjo0_0Akw3qg0YPMk2-zNxCxJfkvpjrzdPjJ2fhQ1VWWtyglIqP9JzV7L6K-yYCPJNxSfgvSPmbDIvWkGyPKWkMvkDfupmK38it9_J6yxCPMJ1NY6RdOK5rQZIIbb8cpWS4eVhulYfiBCzquvKwPfMn_W9h9BJWNfYg2kFQ7v3kdgsGCb5JGcavPB1MU9b0DOMqkqbSshQjhgA6ja0tZMCDHXOWqvF5v8afftIcjBeXrYsURYEz4ii6yPIm_Jbkp95B_d4CgCmqEPWQmcaty9Op0zRqx6SjIIToKMKuwQhbCuM7mXD2MYYyCLR-cnbAjYiUF3JvcJQQQWwcK9uZYub7w9QthEEmYS68vy9YBtfpTt-XTSLWi3B7_BimYzgK4tAaED_72-A%3D%3D)

Peter,

As a fifth-generation Floridian, Iraq War veteran, and proud Representative of Florida’s 17th Congressional District, I ran for Congress for the same reason I joined the U.S. Army - _I like to fight on the side of liberty._

Twenty years ago, I first answered the call to serve following the September 11, 2001 attacks and enlisted in the U.S. Army.

In the U.S. Army, I spent one year as a commissioned Airborne Infantry Officer and three years in the Army JAG Corps, serving as a Captain with the 25th Infantry Division in Operation Iraqi Freedom.

**I know firsthand that America is the greatest beacon of freedom and liberty in the history of mankind, and our U.S. Armed Forces provide the greatest defense of these values that are revered around the world.**
I use my own experience in Congress to advocate for our men and women in uniform because I understand their struggles. When Biden **FAILED** America with the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal, it was an affront to every single servicemember and their families who have sacrificed so much to this country. **Biden has made it clear that he does not prioritize Americans - the people HE is supposed to serve. **

This abdication of duty by the Commander-in-Chief must be dealt with head-on, and that means Republicans taking back the House of Representatives. We must unite as one conservative voice against this gross incompetence so we can take back the House THIS YEAR.

| [**_UNITE AS ONE CONSERVATIVE VOICE_
CONTRIBUTE TO HELP ››**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=42d0e1deebf04d8c8f677ad794a7eea4&_e=zhuUvaWTp9TXkjo0_0Akw3qg0YPMk2-zNxCxJfkvpjrzdPjJ2fhQ1VWWtyglIqP9JzV7L6K-yYCPJNxSfgvSPmbDIvWkGyPKWkMvkDfupmK38it9_J6yxCPMJ1NY6RdOK5rQZIIbb8cpWS4eVhulYfiBCzquvKwPfMn_W9h9BJWNfYg2kFQ7v3kdgsGCb5JGUc3Oya5qbBql4EU4wRa7-Jy9ZhlSReoYWJsyRAgg2YZzDnjoI0FAIYzWWHpoKW8jS4Yd4HdMc7kJqgScXSKoDiwjsn2u8W0TZCaPM4yf0mkrn8HHfdEE2Ine2w-JksSB5wTtu44HcfHmFBC9Zrm6KAoqYBpwjSxejDPaS8g7A68GdyejDL_u4Ypwf1OFhGJzxwrr03qQ19E7mMOwPJxGYQ%3D%3D)
---

We know that the issue in D.C. is Democrat leadership – plain and simple. So far, they have:

* Allowed inflation to reach all-time highs
* Stripped away your freedoms and imposed mandates that have done nothing to control the COVID-19 pandemic
* Created a border crisis that President Trump finally had under control
* Left Americans stranded in Afghanistan after one of the most embarrassing military withdrawals in U.S. history that also led to the loss of life

_And that’s just the beginning._

We need Conservative leadership BACK in D.C. to start healing our nation. [**Please, Peter, will you unite with me and the millions of other freedom-loving citizens to get our nation back on track and ensure that Americans are being put FIRST?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=42d0e1deebf04d8c8f677ad794a7eea4&_e=zhuUvaWTp9TXkjo0_0Akw3qg0YPMk2-zNxCxJfkvpjrzdPjJ2fhQ1VWWtyglIqP9JzV7L6K-yYCPJNxSfgvSPmbDIvWkGyPKWkMvkDfupmK38it9_J6yxCPMJ1NY6RdOK5rQZIIbb8cpWS4eVhulYfiBCzquvKwPfMn_W9h9BJWNfYg2kFQ7v3kdgsGCb5JG__Wgy4TVxSfQ_wBbemTjdQmEnbUiPERW3AVUU4aGeI1ecC7aAUgyLK4iuU0Soqi91sYdxRrhPsYOV6lAs8IqtovnPnsIL7_E1le0NVb_I6jFZ-Hbx0SRCDCnrp77DQH-auNb7eMmb5E2uQaTEhaNTR6RSVc3f4vcTn4eAlfpePQbKDoTnjYhly3KyDnchR6vT02UOOGXRzjxOc4Fm8ZJvg%3D%3D)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40583230/325005553/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA2MDhhYi0yMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6Des0gh7mojQZyGTEBHmaswahAK0fpAXvElcqAVfp4=) | Peter, Everything we stand for as a democracy is on the line. **If we don’t take decisive action to protect the rights of every single American to cast a ballot and have their voices heard, our democracy may very well be in peril.** We’ve seen what happens when those hellbent on holding onto power exploit loopholes and try to circumvent the electoral process with misinformation and violence. **We can’t afford for an event like the January 6th insurrection to happen again.** [**I will always fight for our sacred right to vote. If you believe that we need more leaders in Congress who will move heaven and earth to protect our greatest gift as Americans, please donate to my campaign right now. Time is running out.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40583231/325005554/694734457?refcode=votingrights011122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA2MDhhYi0yMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6Des0gh7mojQZyGTEBHmaswahAK0fpAXvElcqAVfp4=) Now is the time to ensure that no one person or political party can subvert the will of the people. **The Senate has a responsibility to do everything they can to protect voting rights by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act.** **We need leadership at all levels of government to recognize the urgency of the issue of voting rights. We need leadership that will fight back against any and all efforts to suppress the vote and subvert our elections.** [**Help me bring my commitment to democracy to Congress by making a contribution to my campaign today. With your support, we will bring the change our country needs to ensure our right to vote is not trampled on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40583232/325005555/694734457?refcode=votingrights011122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA2MDhhYi0yMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6Des0gh7mojQZyGTEBHmaswahAK0fpAXvElcqAVfp4=) We owe it to the brave and impassioned Americans that protested, marched, were arrested and gave their lives in the fight for voting equality. We owe it to our children to show that each of us holds within the power to change the world with their voice and their vote. We owe it to ourselves, right now, in this moment, to save democracy. Thank you, David Palmer

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Governor Eric Greitens Calls Out Liberals for January 6 Lies and RINOs for Cowering to the Left
---
| St. Louis, MO-- Former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens called out liberals for lying about the events of January 6th and weak, woke RINOs for cowering and repeating leftist talking points.
In an explosive op-ed [published at WarRoom.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145HWHn-QLXYv_wSw9Z7a9uCTSsU1-PchA08oRMVYmMTcqcYlqVvTqMRSnyQD0HLbZKJBWW-wViuYEt4n7Bs_1gmB1gQS-L8qhVGarD8TRfvEG_yT10_bUQlAY0bzExURBYpOdky3WUIjJX_UUVNA1hwvkx62vcWw9y2kyGxy1DnlxPrBLEko_H-moY54126ax0aB88zW7CRRlLwJi3hedSrFGdsonWBPrE4JjtRXAxTs13jgXqeuYQ==&c=0q4k4Nz97Wa7ekP3bmNfwEukbWpkaizjfqoYbIUKwJhjNfVf57CI0A==&ch=tnk2ZcPLxgOmoeJvUDEsCOt4OmOEu0csIYLfAvNZCerT5rQVTxZAwg==) and [The Gateway Pundit](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00145HWHn-QLXYv_wSw9Z7a9uCTSsU1-PchA08oRMVYmMTcqcYlqVvTqMRSnyQD0HLbrA8qY0IYDCocSreVepW6UPmkRNET9c7TRi_v91ZLnBdwZJqXlrwc_-78edMJsSN90fi1XuMiXnIj0mYKIZ66S1xs2fh3fT49f7XkWu7CJZHU1mr1WEK79dOwv1oV9OdB4KeXKXMSGuo5hXpZ6yuXYxOqWibYTPsMevhG_i5Y-5tDg7nOBn-xvFEYxmJMI7jI&c=0q4k4Nz97Wa7ekP3bmNfwEukbWpkaizjfqoYbIUKwJhjNfVf57CI0A==&ch=tnk2ZcPLxgOmoeJvUDEsCOt4OmOEu0csIYLfAvNZCerT5rQVTxZAwg==), Governor Greitens writes, "In an unholy alliance, the self-humiliating mainstream media and weak, woke RINOs have gone to great lengths to offer Joe Biden cover and concealment from the real facts of 06 January- by omission, commission, and blatant lies."
As pointed out by Missouri talk radio host Marc Cox, Governor Greitens is one of few Republicans willing to talk about the truth around the events of January 6th.
"A lot of other Republicans were oddly quiet, which is disturbing. They just let Joe Biden take the day," said Cox.
Governor Greitens' campaign released a video exposing the lies and many unanswered questions remaining including the role of Ray Epps, who is believed to have encouraged criminal behavior at the Capitol at the behest of the FBI.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Meet My Running Mate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=meet_my_running_mate&n=1)
---
Friend, It's official—my running mate to renew Illinois is Carolyn Schofield! Carolyn is the ideal choice to run on my ticket because she cares about all the important issues facing Illinoisians. Our priorities align, and we will continue to push our Parent’s Bill of Rights to give back to parents the autonomy and respect that they never should have lost in the first place. In the wake of J.B. Pritzker's failures, the state needs leaders who will take responsibility, hold themselves and others accountable, and stand up to special interests. **Carolyn and I will provide the leadership Illinoisans deserve. Together we will provide common-sense conservative leadership families can trust to fix Illinois.** During our announcement, Carolyn said, “I am honored and excited to be running with Paul as his Lieutenant Governor candidate. As a parent, I can no longer sit back and watch Illinois families face corruption in our government and danger on our streets. I’m running because Paul and I can make a difference.” | [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=meet_my_running_mate&n=2 "Chip In to Help Carolyn & Our Campaign

Here") [Chip In to Help Carolyn & Our Campaign Here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=meet_my_running_mate&n=2)
---
Help Carolyn and I share our message and let Illinoisans know why they can trust us to lead our state forward.
S/F,
Paul Schimpf
* * *
___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.

You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=meet_my_running_mate&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=meet_my_running_mate&n=5).

| Peter,

As I look ahead to this year's election, we know ours will be a close one - like both my prior races. In 2021, Virginia saw engaged Republican momentum and **the Republican Governor-elect won our district by more than 5 points.**

In swing districts like ours, we win by ensuring people know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I am seeking re-election. After redistricting, I have many new and future constituents to introduce myself to, and I need your support to ensure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter!

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40584657/325012430/-1739877693?refcode=20220111_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2Y0Mzk2MS0yYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9AoaKzsif6t38IRF_xmuhW1B6cgqrSCTvQyDbO2lSk=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40584658/325012431/-68044773?refcode=20220111_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2Y0Mzk2MS0yYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9AoaKzsif6t38IRF_xmuhW1B6cgqrSCTvQyDbO2lSk=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40584659/325012432/-1739877693?refcode=20220111_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2Y0Mzk2MS0yYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9AoaKzsif6t38IRF_xmuhW1B6cgqrSCTvQyDbO2lSk=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC stop the radical right. clean_body: | | | = Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. = = Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

**Trump's new social media app will launch on President’s Day**
_Can you believe it, Fellow Conservative???_
[**Finally! A platform built just for free-speech-loving American Patriots!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39lcw-1sqin-4qqlpo1/)

Breaking Trump News

body:
My campaign is focused on creating a more equitable Maryland for all.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585000/325013941/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220111-nd-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=695dc1e5-2b73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkYzFlNS0yYjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDXufPgt1fw9Spnqnef3pLLqBZcFAPQ8lznH2GYiqFI=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, my team announced that I’ve chosen Michelle Siri — first-generation Iranian-American, champion for women’s rights, a former Maryland Assistant Attorney General, and proud Baltimore County resident — to be my running mate for Lieutenant Governor of Maryland.

**But now, I want to tell you why.**

My campaign is focused on creating a more equitable Maryland for all, and Michelle has spent her life working to ensure everyone has equal opportunities and rights, regardless of who they are or where they come from. She is exactly the type of courageous, progressive leader that we need on our team.

In order to make our vision for Maryland a reality, we need to ensure that we meet our goal before tomorrow night’s filing deadline. [_**Can we rely on your support to help us secure the funds we need?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585001/325013942/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220111-nd-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=695dc1e5-2b73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkYzFlNS0yYjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDXufPgt1fw9Spnqnef3pLLqBZcFAPQ8lznH2GYiqFI=)

My campaign is focused on creating a more equitable Maryland for all, and Michelle has spent her life working to ensure everyone has equal opportunities and rights, regardless of who they are or where they come from. She is exactly the type of courageous, progressive leader that we need on our team. In order to make our vision for Maryland a reality, we need to ensure that we meet our goal before tomorrow night’s filing deadline. = = | = Thank you in advance for whatever you are able to give, Peter. It means everything to know that we have your support. John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . INTERVIEW ANNOUNCEMENT CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE LAUREL IMER
This afternoon Laurel Imer sat down with the Denver Channels Meghan Lopez to discuss her race in CO-07 now that Ed Perlmutter has retired.
You can watch Laurel's interview tonight at 5:00 PM on Denver 7 and Scripps National Affiliates.
###
About Laurel: Laurel Imer is a Republican candidate in Colorado's 7th Congressional District! In 2020 Laurel was hand-picked by President Donald J. Trump and his team to be his delegate to the Republican National Convention for Congressional District 7. Laurel served as Jefferson County Chair for the Donald Trump Campaign in 2016. Laurel was also picked by President Trump and his team to be one of Colorado's 9 Republican Presidential Electors at the Electoral College for the 2016 Presidential Election. When elected Laurel will work hard to align local and federal issues in education and school choice, immigration, infrastructure, and economic growth, capitalizing on the success of President Trump's America First Policies. Laurel is laser-focused on ending human trafficking, completing the southern border wall, securing election integrity, and Putting America First Again.

body:
The Ohio Supreme Court needs to make a decision.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585036/325014144/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220111supreme_N_TC_TC_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzRlNWI1MC0yYzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek2anyOl8osdSsMZOGtv0VUvSmSG8xpgBvAdYJQcyVU=)
---
Team, As you heard, the Ohio Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments last month deciding the fate of Ohio’s outrageously gerrymandered Congressional districts. We’ve been waiting for months for maps that actually reflect our state’s political makeup. We can’t wait much longer. The countdown for filing deadlines for both state and federal candidates is slowly ticking away. Every day we wait for the court’s decision is another day democratic campaigns across the state are left in the dark. Even worse, the court can at any moment decide to kick the decision back to the redistricting committee itself. **The same committee that built out the maps in the first place.** We have to be prepared for the worst at any moment, and we’re calling on you to help out while we still have time. [**Contributing to Chelsea’s campaign is the strongest way you can support our work while we’re forced to wait on the court’s final decision. We need your help to build out a strong program that can hit the ground running, once we have the final ruling. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: $104 billion a year for Michigan’s economy. 🚜
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper. | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=12f82d4f9b&e=0636b97700)
---
Agriculture is one of my top priorities.
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:

Agriculture and our farmers hold a special place in my heart.

As the _only candidate for Governor of Michigan with a farming background_ , and someone who loves getting his hands dirty, I laugh when pretenders talk about agriculture yet don’t even own a pair of work gloves

Our farmers face a multitude of challenges, whether from unnecessary regulations, excess taxation, or unfair trade policies, **I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper.**

_**But I need your help to do this.**_

Did you know Michigan agriculture adds more than $104 billion a year to Michigan’s economy? It is only second in diversity to California. Our state’s food and agriculture system also employees over 800,000 workers.

This is important for our state, and one of the reasons it is a priority for me. Here are several priorities I’ll be addressing as Governor:
* A permanent fix to the estate tax and capital gains tax for family farms.

* Protecting farmers from overseas markets for in-season fruits and vegetables.

* Strengthening right to farm laws.

* Removing bureaucrats and regulations from farming policies.

* Improving rural infrastructure including broadband internet and natural gas access.

[Read more on my website.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b0347ec36e&e=0636b97700)

Michigan has a rich and diverse economy. **While we’ve suffered tremendously the past two years under Governor Whitmer’s lockdowns and bureaucratic policies, I see a bright future ahead.**

**But we must defeat Whitmer.** That’s why it’s so important for you to get involved today. Please help me in this election.

Whether you [volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f878302784&e=0636b97700), tell your friends and family, or [make a donation](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=1ff55e89c0&e=0636b97700), every bit helps.

**Your donation of $100, $50 or $25 is needed.**

If you could donate even $10 it will help make a difference in this campaign.

---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=6ad376753c&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Think about that. Less than the cost of a pizza.

**Can you donate $10 to the campaign to help us Fix Michigan?**

I’m campaigning every day, visiting all corners of this great state. But _I can’t do it without you_.

Please consider making a generous donation today.

clean_body: I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper. | | | | | | | Agriculture is one of my top priorities. | | | Dear Peter: Agriculture and our farmers hold a special place in my heart. As the only candidate for Governor of Michigan with a farming background , and someone who loves getting his hands dirty, I laugh when pretenders talk about agriculture yet don’t even own a pair of work gloves Our farmers face a multitude of challenges, whether from unnecessary regulations, excess taxation, or unfair trade policies, I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper. But I need your help to do this. Did you know Michigan agriculture adds more than $104 billion a year to Michigan’s economy? It is only second in diversity to California. Our state’s food and agriculture system also employees over 800,000 workers. This is important for our state, and one of the reasons it is a priority for me. Here are several priorities I’ll be addressing as Governor: A permanent fix to the estate tax and capital gains tax for family farms. Protecting farmers from overseas markets for in-season fruits and vegetables. Strengthening right to farm laws. Removing bureaucrats and regulations from farming policies. Improving rural infrastructure including broadband internet and natural gas access. Michigan has a rich and diverse economy. While we’ve suffered tremendously the past two years under Governor Whitmer’s lockdowns and bureaucratic policies, I see a bright future ahead. But we must defeat Whitmer. That’s why it’s so important for you to get involved today. Please help me in this election. Whether you , tell your friends and family, or , every bit helps. Your donation of $100, $50 or $25 is needed. If you could donate even $10 it will help make a difference in this campaign. | "DONATE TODAY" | Think about that. Less than the cost of a pizza. Can you donate $10 to the campaign to help us Fix Michigan? I’m campaigning every day, visiting all corners of this great state. But I can’t do it without you. Please consider making a generous donation today. Thank you. Peter, Holly’s number one goal in this campaign is to give a voice to her community – a community that often feels left out of the conversation. With that in mind, we have big plans to reach every voter in GA-14. But to knock on every door, call every voter, and send mailers requires a lot of resources.

When Holly is out talking to the community, she often hears how no candidate has ever paid them a visit. Their faces light up when they are able to meet with Holly and get down to the issues that matter most to them.**GA-14 is ready for change**. **GA-14 is fired up about a candidate who listens.**

**[If this is enough for you to donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585309/325015559/-804235033?refcode=em0111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM1MjkwMS0yZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGw37WwScRWecRFPR1z9Qc7SO3IYSyDZwIRsi7OpeTE=)** , that's great. But here's some more information that is sure to convince you.

**It's 2022 and we don't have time to waste.**

Marjorie Taylor Greene has put in less than adequate resources into her re-election campaign. Let me clarify, Marge isn’t in the district every day. She isn’t knocking on any doors and she isn’t getting to know the folks in GA-14. But with her HUGE media presence, her radical right-wing supporters, and her dark money donors**it’s going to be hard to compete.**

To counteract her hate and lies it’s **_CRITICAL_** for us to knock on doors and talk to voters. But we can’t do this without your help.

**[Donate $15 today to help us reach every GA-14 voter we can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585310/325015560/-804235033?refcode=em0111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjM1MjkwMS0yZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGw37WwScRWecRFPR1z9Qc7SO3IYSyDZwIRsi7OpeTE=)** When we combine our resources and our strength, Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t stand a chance.

Let's make 2022 count,
Team Holly

**FIRST** : One year ago, Donald Trump’s extremist followers coordinated an attack on our Capitol and democracy, claiming widespread voter fraud — with no evidence, at all.

**THEN** : Republicans nationwide followed Trump’s lead, introducing and passing voter suppression laws. One of my GOP opponents, Rep. Lori Saine, even led the fight to do so right here in Colorado.

name: Team Warner
subject: New year, new priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
With so much work left to do, let Mark know what issues matter most to you.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585397/325015737/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRkMTUzNS0yZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iK3jzIrb5xdTD0lde_VVZ3ZzGtsMJVkqK8B7_C5nsS4=&emci=bd1fbc4a-1073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=824d1535-2e73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, 2022 is an important year. With the midterm elections on the horizon, the work the Senate does in the coming months may determine the fate of our Democratic majority. So Mark wanted us to check in on the issues that are most important to his constituents. **_[Take this quick survey today to let Mark know what issues matter most to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585398/325015738/-874035277?ms=mw_em_220111_1&refcode=mw_em_220111_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRkMTUzNS0yZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iK3jzIrb5xdTD0lde_VVZ3ZzGtsMJVkqK8B7_C5nsS4=&emci=bd1fbc4a-1073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=824d1535-2e73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4568237)_**
* Number of questions: _5_
* Time to complete: _2 minutes_

We had a lot of success in 2021. The impact of the Senate’s work on battling the pandemic and rebuilding our infrastructure will be felt for years to come. But Mark isn’t content simply hanging his hat on past work. With so much work left to do, Mark wants to make sure he knows where your head and your heart are at so he can keep working for you. **_[Take Mark’s new 2022 priorities survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40585399/325015739/-874035277?ms=mw_em_220111_1&refcode=mw_em_220111_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRkMTUzNS0yZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iK3jzIrb5xdTD0lde_VVZ3ZzGtsMJVkqK8B7_C5nsS4=&emci=bd1fbc4a-1073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=824d1535-2e73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4568237)_** Thank you for your time! name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You’ve already done so much. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6756%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=S%2b1pBlXZI%2beHsTTGsRpu0Q&sysid=1)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69662%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S8%2fMi4SQOnxv%2b6lEaxqcdQ&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.
**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.
| [**RUSH $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69663%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5UXvix9g8kPNtwQCdzB9Nw&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69664%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bQmIE97tu5Ghs2Fxt7Oi4w&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69675%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cvHqDRFPTZKgTmfgBkE6lw&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $250**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69676%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q75KS5hbc7FMDBWnmxMEDQ&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69677%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cfun%2bK00%2bWbNZ27ngFRcxA&sysid=1)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69662%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S8%2fMi4SQOnxv%2b6lEaxqcdQ&sysid=1)

Senator John Kennedy

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: [Add your name] Support The African American History Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As many of you know, I spent 20 years as an educator before Congress. I
saw firsthand how transforming a child’s learning environment can unlock
their full potential and lead us into a true and educated democracy.

But in today’s current education system, our democracy and our history is
being challenged, and this ignorance to the truth has left many students
all over the country subject to dishonest and unjust education.

That’s why I am honored to present the African American History Act. This
act will invest $10 million over a 5 year period in the National Museum of
African American History and Culture (NMAAHC) to support African American
history education programs that are available to all. This bill will fund
a variety of activities, all of which will allow the NMAAHC to continue
supporting educators, students, and families in learning about African
American history.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88787?t=1002&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm ]Peter, if you
stand with me and believe that African American history is a prevalent
part of our past, present, and future, please add your name and support
the African American History Act today.

Add your name

The African American History Act is set to increase the national capacity
for African American history education while also funding and improving
upon a variety of the NMAAHC’s resources such as:

* Developing and maintaining accessible resources to promote an
understanding of African American history.
* Engaging with local and state leaders interested in incorporating
these resources in curricula.
* Engaging with the public through programming, resources, and social
media to increase awareness of African American history through a
social justice and anti-bias lens.
* Convening experts and creating and providing scholarly work.
* Translating new and existing NMAAHC work into multiple languages for
accessibility.

Education and literacy play key roles in ensuring all of us have access to
high quality and historically accurate information. And a multiracial
democracy that ensures the social, economic, and political rights of all
in the United States requires us to tell the full truth about our
country’s history.

The truth should always be available to all and inspire us to move towards
the direction and knowledge of a true democracy. Investing and supporting
African American history to fight back against those who villainize the
truth is the antidote to organized ignorance, which in turn will support
our work to build a multiracial democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88787?t=1003&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm ]Peter, please
stand with me in support of the African American History Act and our
efforts to ensure that our students are granted an education rooted in
tolerance, love, and justice for humanity — not fear or hate — by adding
your name today.

Add your name

Peace and love,

Jamaal Bowman

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220111-21433-footer&t=1006&refcode2=21433_1203867_kxiCTm&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=21433%2E1203867%2EkxiCTm

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Do you agree with President Biden on filibuster reform?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I know that working families need a government that works for them ...
| | |
---
Peter: President Joe Biden just endorsed reforming the filibuster to protect voting rights – and I agree. It's time.
Voters sent Democratic leadership to the House, Senate _and_ White House for a reason: They trust our party to lead the country. But Republicans are wielding the filibuster to obstruct progress that would make a real difference to working families: an increase to the minimum wage, protections for workers' rights and unions, and – most egregiously – legislation to put a stop to Republican-led efforts to suppress the vote. **All of it has been blocked or threatened by the filibuster.**
Republicans have every right to disagree with the details of legislation. But they aren't using the filibuster for the sake of debate or to benefit their constituents. They are using it to embolden a far-right agenda that's out of touch with voters.
**I know that working families need a government that works for them, but with the filibuster in place, the Senate cannot even effectively protect our cherished right to vote. That's why I'm counting on this grassroots team to speak out alongside me and demand filibuster reform. I need 5,000 responses, including yours, before our midnight deadline:**

name: Jay Collins, Green Beret & Purple Heart Recipient
subject: Eight years ago
body:
I lost a leg fighting for America while Joe Biden was following Barack Obama around the White House [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6758%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zeCGFl03sWFChyoCpTiVLQ&sysid=1)
American Patriot, Eight years ago, I was being wheeled into an operating room to have my leg amputated, as a result from my combat service to this country.

What was Joe Biden doing eight years ago? Riding Barack Obama’s coattails and eating ice cream. **_Simply put, this president does not know the first damn thing about sacrifice. _** Joe Biden is a career politician who has only lasted so long because of his flip-flop politics and ability to play second fiddle. I am running for congress to stand up to Joe Biden and his reckless endangerment of my brothers and sisters in arms. [__](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69685%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QqbOV8w8vjXNh3lNJKPKBQ&sysid=1)[_**Will you join me with an immediate donation of $10 or more? >>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69686%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NJxoe0UxdLezDYuOkGRx0w&sysid=1) [**RUSH IN $10**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69687%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NzDpofPqLQVrFkOhooUiEQ&sysid=1) I can’t fight the good fight alone. In combat, I was surrounded by my fellow Green Berets. In my race for congress, I need to know that I have my fellow MAGA patriots on my side. Can I count on you, American Patriot? [**RUSH IN A CONTRIBUTION NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69688%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L1011aJ2i07%2bwCJpvErfgQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support, Jay Collins, Green Beret & Purple Heart Recipient [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69689%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a38Pru26t11thm9Y5HuYDw&sysid=1) Jay Collins is a retired Green Beret, non-profit executive, father, husband and Republican candidate for congress. Collins has fought to protect and provide for American families for over two decades. He’s ready to continue that fight in Congress and put a stop to the far left socialist agenda that hikes taxes, blows out government spending, threatens national security, and fails to put the American people first. [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69680%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fabc3sw6vEhFwox0oCg3UA&sysid=1) PAID FOR BY JAY COLLINS FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, job titles, and related details does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and text messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Jay Collins for Congress. Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. Terms & conditions/privacy policy apply: [PRIVACY POLICY & TERMS OF USE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69681%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MXkVmgQVpDR6lnVXf1nKeA&sysid=1).
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6758%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zeCGFl03sWFChyoCpTiVLQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6758%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zeCGFl03sWFChyoCpTiVLQ&sysid=1)

Help us fight back

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586069/325019106/-1987745334?refcode=hb5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM5YzcyZS0zMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXJCdnHGRo7ybc-NGOU1QOE6VCnrAnhdBcLzeNKIa7Y=) Peter, Today, the Florida GOP filed HB 5 — a bill that **bans abortion after 15 weeks of pregnancy, leaving women a**** _very_****short window to make an informed medical decision. ** **_This isn’t just immoral, it’s flat out illegal, Peter_****. ** When _Roe v. Wade_ was decided almost 50 years ago, women in this country were guaranteed the right to choose. We were guaranteed the right to make private, personal medical decisions without government interference. **And in just a few short weeks, Ron DeSantis and the GOP majority will take that right away from us. ** [**The only way we can protect women’s rights in Florida is to defeat Ron DeSantis and elect leaders who will fight for Florida women. And with your help, that’s exactly what I’ll do. Click here to chip in $10 and help us win this fight. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586071/325019107/-1987745334?refcode=hb5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM5YzcyZS0zMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXJCdnHGRo7ybc-NGOU1QOE6VCnrAnhdBcLzeNKIa7Y=) Not only does the GOP’s anti-choice bill take away women’s bodily autonomy, it doesn’t make any exception for cases of rape or incest. clean_body: = Hello, Stacey Abrams just went on MSNBC and warned Democrats that they MUST act on voting rights. Republicans will try to steal the 2022 midterm elections and the 2024 presidential race. They’re already laying the groundwork – gerrymandering new districts and passing voter suppression laws in key swing states that are akin to Jim Crow 2.0. That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so critical. If we’re going to protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority, we MUST help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. The early polls show a very close race, but with Senate control on the line, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now. We’re facing our first mid-month deadline of the year on Saturday – but time is running out, and we’re still very short of our $100,000 goal and what we need to fight back against McConnell’s Super PACs and win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Huge News (Left Action)
subject: Fox News host who called for “ambush” of Fauci just got promoted
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: Demand advertisers drop Fox for promoting Jesse Watters >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a8b774d-083f-4431-a98b-dc664eb3b544/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe94417c-36b8-48ff-8c3f-98a5dbed8683/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Last month, Fox News host Jesse Watters called on attendees at a conservative conference to “ambush” Dr. Anthony Fauci, and “go for the kill shot.” Jesse Watters should have been fired on the spot for his disgusting and threatening rhetoric. Instead, Fox News just promoted him to a primetime slot. We’ve seen the dangerous effects of rhetoric like this – the Capitol riots were incited in part by the conspiracy theories and lies about our elections that aired on Fox News. We can’t let Jesse Watters and Fox News continue to promote violence to their millions of viewers. Since Fox won’t hold Jesse Watters accountable, we’re demanding advertisers drop Fox immediately. [Add your name to our petition now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2e2a81a-dc3e-4584-b9fb-e65266e7d753/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter,

The right to vote is the cornerstone of our democracy — but for far too many Americans, this right is threatened by Republican legislators every single day. My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting every day to ensure all Americans are able to exercise their constitutional right to vote, and we need to show that the American people support these policies.

[_**I hope you’ll consider signing my petition today to demonstrate that there is massive grassroots support for protecting and expanding the voting rights of every American.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586726/325021564/644807747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTQ3OGRkYi0zMzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gZPlHsYI-K77Ie4GzClMt7LscS9x6QtP89MLYY48b_M=&emci=96ea88d6-f872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=be478ddb-3373-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5543981)

subject: I'll be the 50th vote Democrats need to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
President Biden just announced his support for reforming the filibuster
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586864/325022092/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTMzMjI0OS0zNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhxSr7T5IdSQaUvdTrZ3hDimE9bCShmT9_68Lz0PJac=)

This is _huge_ , friend: President Biden just announced his support for reforming the filibuster to finally pass crucial voting rights legislation through the Senate.
But here's the problem: It will take 50 votes to get rid of this archaic rule, which means any one senator can stand in the way of progress. That's why **Democrats _must_ expand our Senate majority – and my race in Florida can virtually _guarantee_ we do. **
As GOP lawmakers across the country enact hundreds of voter suppression bills, legislation to uphold and expand the right to vote could not be more important. **I voted to protect voting rights in the House. And when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight like hell again to make sure voting rights legislation passes, because in the words of my dear friend, the late Rep. John Lewis, "Democracy is not a state. It is an act, and each generation must do its part." **

Last week, on Jan. 6, we remembered an attack on our democracy – and it's clear our nation is at an inflection point. We need to do our part now and protect the right to vote.
That's why I'm here today personally asking you – **will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to abolish the filibuster and protect the right to vote?**
**[Please, give now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority. With polls showing this race neck and neck, every single dollar would help guarantee a Democratic Senate and enough votes to end the filibuster and pass voting rights protections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586865/325022093/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTMzMjI0OS0zNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhxSr7T5IdSQaUvdTrZ3hDimE9bCShmT9_68Lz0PJac=)**

Protecting voting rights is the kind of legislation that more than 81 million Americans voted for in 2020. **But too many elected officials continue to stand in the way – allowing outdated Senate rules like the filibuster to stop us from making progress and ensuring everyone has the right to vote.**
I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator.
**But I can't get there without your help.** **[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now to send another Democrat to the U.S. Senate who will fight for everyday Americans and secure progress like voting rights protections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40586870/325022098/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTMzMjI0OS0zNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhxSr7T5IdSQaUvdTrZ3hDimE9bCShmT9_68Lz0PJac=)**
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings

Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. name: Team Lira
subject: It’s time we change the status quo
body:
Peter, so many people have stopped believing we have the power to change Texas for the better and here’s why.
Republicans’ believed hold on the state, legislation keeping us in the past, partisan media and the status quo have dominated the narrative for years, decades even — but it’s time we change that.
The people of Texas have been asking for change for years but leaders like our current incumbent haven’t listened — instead, they lead with their own agenda.
The only way we can finally reprioritize the people is by electing a leader who understands just how serious the problems people on the ground are facing. **That leader is John Lira. **
As the son of a Mexican-American, working-class family of four in southeast San Antonio, a United States Marine Corps veteran, a dedicated father and husband, and a devoted parishioner at St. Benedict’s Catholic Church — John understands what it means to be a proud Texan and a part of a community like the ones in TX-23.
[_**We have a real chance to bring about meaningful change to Texas, and electing John Lira is a key part of that. He is our best chance to retake the district for the people. Can you make a donation to our fight to elect John Lira and start the work to address the needs of TX-23?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40587115/325023152/1615379378?refcode=em20220111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjVjNjFmYi0zNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKyFRI9dVCasullBMOF7RoIiKcB3Ka0ya7MmSCHgEL0=)
**[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40587116/325023153/1615379378?refcode=em20220111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjVjNjFmYi0zNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKyFRI9dVCasullBMOF7RoIiKcB3Ka0ya7MmSCHgEL0=)**
John is running for Congress because political posturing isn’t going to solve the problems Texans are facing. He’s all in to fight for the folks of TX-23.
And we want you with us every step of the way.
Grateful,
Team Lira

| The first Republican Senatorial primary debate is coming up TOMORROW - Wednesday, January 12th!
This is our first real chance to discuss the important issues - election security, immigration, crime, spending, inflation, and more - and I'm so excited to engage in a conversation with the other candidates!
The debate will not be shown live, but it will be on [PCN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B8k-AOEx6uYMdvtxC_FWhDA2fVzHsm4bNVjRpqfotrwe_ojDwFh58tODL6eG3mbwkanV0fjEi7bOe4_eHEle4ll3g4pJcfcAyPHVAKZdS0yy1uc6_-6TFLwZeMW0HEpsWJjuLaaBlEQ=&c=bet5Ga3eSpAUCGruQhIRQJrjwzKw8U1pqkgYHFrwRjaXytVvv87Ypw==&ch=4qmC8be2-NKMMyBXLJ_uNu3EGwEUuCptNVM9EoTxub3D_eXYcEOF_w==) on a delayed broadcast. Team,

President Biden is about to speak to the nation about the dire need to safeguard our democracy from the torrent of right-wing voter suppression laws sweeping the country.

This could be THE decisive moment for the president’s plan to strengthen our voting rights, and it couldn’t come at a more important time. **Republicans introduced _over 400 voter suppression bills_ last year alone, and President Biden is ready to fight this injustice head-on.**

We want to hear whether you support President Biden’s plan, but we’re still missing 36 responses from Pennsylvania -- **and we have no answer on file from you. Please respond NOW:**

subject: Learn More Tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
The Campaign Is Ramping Up! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-January Vol. 2, #1**
---
| | |
## 10 January 22
**Just A Friendly Reminder - It's Time To Volunteer** In just under 10 months, we'll know the general election results.

Whether you're local or across the nation, there is much that needs to be accomplished-in person or virtual.

The campaign will be holding a series of virtual volunteer interest gatherings. Each will be around 30 minutes. Please attend and invite others to restore their Constitutional power. Remember, those who govern do so at the consent of the governed (that's us) in America. It's time to make a _real _difference. Keep in mind, you are not committing to volunteering, you are simply getting information to decide if you want to volunteer and how much you'd like to volunteer. Who can you invite?
**The Next Zoom Volunteer Interest Opportunity** Tuesday, Jan 11
7-7:30p The Zoom Link
**[https://us02web.zoom.us/j/87519135219](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=3da0537194&e=12a37459a2)**
Please do not post the zoom link on social media. **Meet & Greets** The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference.
**[Email Us For More Info](mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets)**

**[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e08587cd2c&e=12a37459a2) **and Thank You For Your Amazing Support!

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff

name: Herschel Walker
subject: New polling has us up by ONE POINT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e32581f1c1f04780bb6e6d8ded0f506c&_e=D0ezibfSEo97weImLaLfObXCd3RuLJvLMDsk4NdBUSQyGuBeqGoBNkC42YEXaehjjp1UIJ0m2mA5hbW4PollK0uDYP7nWzJpT8wVxxgtip_ZBNU3dzzE9yR0ZmNZchkf5KaB5oQcZ7TozBdDXlTFwMUAiy6XgftkZcNaPILnWVoqfTn-hYFbEv5PSyEECCR5_ex9bpF0CessNibGFaACGegwGOhclKyNSocoP-Alba1JDGtmAqFNuvcsnKVFs3HA1xx9jJ9lG0mvqSRwxW2U7va2kydbHYn2Dzyiwrwb8xRCd2Jaa72TBwmxZi7iZi76LPk1H3BQ17HNWpKsnvakZpd0tQkxL2RtrbOhY_51IKdrqXapBvqds_sp6ahXkM6v3pwTwbSzG21OsepIkqiMLbb_cOkMelZukEySiWWNtUVWQIElSSEocY5lGGm63djWJ9mPkque1VuzjZh8JvugoQ%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e32581f1c1f04780bb6e6d8ded0f506c&_e=D0ezibfSEo97weImLaLfObXCd3RuLJvLMDsk4NdBUSQyGuBeqGoBNkC42YEXaehjjp1UIJ0m2mA5hbW4PollK0uDYP7nWzJpT8wVxxgtip_ZBNU3dzzE9yR0ZmNZchkf5KaB5oQcZ7TozBdDXlTFwMUAiy6XgftkZcNaPILnWVoqfTn-hYFbEv5PSyEECCR5_ex9bpF0CessNibGFaACGegwGOhclKyNSocoP-Alba1JDGtmAqFNuvcsnKVFs3HAIvr_AFRQcXEpRSb8FR4JT4eIjdHx_Qzewefxz9UA-buj0aTEvUFmbns4SpCMJUe6ygzjeAZO5ffNJ1zw0mIFtpmv6J_XkTjDS5oLeqE3qecLz9u-LC1yGz3sqO2sfd53laItESgQEOrbBxUZgt7OKDpKjkWXf5VGAYPUPjlQD5F-s3X-zUwKAL_vDO9lEfHb2j76XTXTGV8_M9DEElI82w%3D%3D)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e32581f1c1f04780bb6e6d8ded0f506c&_e=D0ezibfSEo97weImLaLfObXCd3RuLJvLMDsk4NdBUSQyGuBeqGoBNkC42YEXaehjjp1UIJ0m2mA5hbW4PollK0uDYP7nWzJpT8wVxxgtip_ZBNU3dzzE9yR0ZmNZchkf5KaB5oQcZ7TozBdDXlTFwMUAiy6XgftkZcNaPILnWVoqfTn-hYFbEv5PSyEECCR5_ex9bpF0CessNibGFaACGegwGOhclKyNSocoP-Alba1JDGtmAqFNuvcsnKVFs3HAqQPELTa_XMHAwDrmfOQf-1tIlNgN6HeUi-qU4H2rygkr-zJ4d7ax7pUSGoNzoUn46iq-y3U995_OHO5BQm_HhokBIPLLtPATdJGFWYIVwyxe8LEIF_304zRD_LRyXFCxV6MHKTqlH9vkbpGOOl79hXWpzLLLMLnwq1prE-8o46cfxK0OQm97SO1tucH72lFQ39T0c2pvDJI7kKBrsaVG9A%3D%3D)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e32581f1c1f04780bb6e6d8ded0f506c&_e=D0ezibfSEo97weImLaLfObXCd3RuLJvLMDsk4NdBUSQyGuBeqGoBNkC42YEXaehjjp1UIJ0m2mA5hbW4PollK0uDYP7nWzJpT8wVxxgtip_ZBNU3dzzE9yR0ZmNZchkf5KaB5oQcZ7TozBdDXlTFwMUAiy6XgftkZcNaPILnWVoqfTn-hYFbEv5PSyEECCR5_ex9bpF0CessNibGFaACGegwGOhclKyNSocoP-Alba2Uz9nm5zwVCp5VO-xoNoUKYpCvVD0hUTx7f7bKd234zLwwJrDzuop2-s8SCOXNAPE2l6FWiVxTi5uzM1junl5yVDKBrVyX3WpTCF7bwdEOeODJXSdIpy8Qj_nHejkLMMbNYaSwn-WhCO6s30qGqVgkPqXuPjLWuL9VLm8sKPQnaKdEwj8LnL1ToC6KIs4WO8TXOVwlHj1Tr3erlK_QPBUsCPRJtTDwMTyG1kHdqQRkAJ5vZZVIEyE8OjuAcrVcbjQ%3D)
[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BUILD EVEN MORE MOMENTUM**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e32581f1c1f04780bb6e6d8ded0f506c&_e=D0ezibfSEo97weImLaLfObXCd3RuLJvLMDsk4NdBUSQyGuBeqGoBNkC42YEXaehjjp1UIJ0m2mA5hbW4PollK0uDYP7nWzJpT8wVxxgtip_ZBNU3dzzE9yR0ZmNZchkf5KaB5oQcZ7TozBdDXlTFwMUAiy6XgftkZcNaPILnWVoqfTn-hYFbEv5PSyEECCR5_ex9bpF0CessNibGFaACGegwGOhclKyNSocoP-Alba1JDGtmAqFNuvcsnKVFs3HAevGJ9faKdpQUJgl-ADHxWBp5anTtAOMaVF-JMX_NZh2ryDOzSzQKzhUtR4mtE2iKrSWpQ8Vgu_QVDJS6vi7k-P9iKYv5Bowe2PbcWnC1QW0V1R5XMxO9sUXL4mgsNcQMSUbeQowP-IbXIcyvPeF_iz8F9LaDGRuPDpBW5jm6TGRN_DGQ8CPXKup2bu6VMvX1YffWF-kZbr_DkmvyHmjlnw%3D%3D)
Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the _MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION._

We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste.
