clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Winston Rubio
subject: All Paws on Deck, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?39mg0--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| |

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

It’s your favorite fluffy Floridian, (and your second favorite, Arthur is here too!)

I know my dad, Marco Rubio, has bugged you enough the past few weeks so I figured I would sub in for him and write you a little note right after his BIGGEST deadline yet was extended.

Arthur says hello by the way...we still haven’t taught him how to type yet, it’s my New Year’s resolution.

Anywho, I am reaching out to all of my Dad’s supporters to remind them how important this deadline will be for retaking the Senate. If we don’t hit this extended end of year’s deadline, I am not sure how much longer our team can keep going. My Dad and Mark, my dad’s Campaign Manager, have been staying up late running the numbers and something tells me things are not going well (I haven’t been getting as many belly rubs as usual).

Mark has been talking about that radical Democrat Impeachment Manager again...boy, that stresses me out, they sound scary, just like the postman! Not to mention, he hasn’t had time to throw the ball with me because he’s been working so hard for my Dad.

So what are you waiting for? 🐾 My Dad needs your help if he is going to make his financial goals! I have heard from Anna, our finance director, how important this extended deadline is, how else can I spell it out for you?

**[Well, spelling isn’t exactly my strongest suit. But who cares! Are you going to chip in? It’s the leash you can do.>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwj-4qqlpo5/ "Well, spelling isn’t exactly my strongest suit. But who cares! Are you going to chip in? It’s the leash you can do. >>")**
**[CHIP IN $250>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwk-4qqlpo6/ "CHIP IN $250 >>")
[CHIP IN $125 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwl-4qqlpo7/ "CHIP IN $125 >>")
[CHIP IN $75 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwm-4qqlpo8/ "CHIP IN $75 >>")
[CHIP IN $50 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwn-4qqlpo9/ "CHIP IN $50 >>")
[CHIP IN $35 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwo-4qqlpo0/ "CHIP IN $35 >>")
[CHIP ANOTHER AMOUNT >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqwp-4qqlpo1/ "CHIP ANOTHER AMOUNT >>")**
We need all paws on deck if we are going to make this happen! Can my Dad, Marco Rubio, count on you to fight back against those crazy Democrats? I sure hope so, especially because I told him we could count on you...

Don’t let me down!

Alright, I’ll stop hounding you...

Happy New Year!
Winston & Arthur Rubio

---

* * *
---

---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39mg0-1sqws-4qqlpo4/ "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Official Trump Alerts
subject: January 11th Update
body:
Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| |
---|---|---
|
# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump January 11th, 2022 President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidates, members of the Arizona Congressional Delegation, and other special guests on Saturday, January 15, 2022, in Florence, AZ. This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes. **_Saturday, January 15, 2022, at 7:00 PM MST_ ** President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks. ** ** **_Venue:_ ** Canyon Moon Ranch
20585 E Water Way
Florence, AZ, 85132 **_Special Guest Speakers:_ ** Kari Lake, _Donald J. Trump Endorsed_ _Candidate for Governor of Arizona_ State Representative Mark Finchem, _State Representative from Arizona’s 11 th District and Donald J. Trump Endorsed _ _Candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona_ Representative Paul Gosar, _US Representative from Arizona’s 4 th Congressional District _ Representative Andy Biggs, _US Representative from Arizona’s 5 th Congressional District _ Representative Debbie Lesko, _US Representative from Arizona’s 8 th Congressional District _ Dr. Kelli Ward, _Chairwoman of the Republican Party of Arizona _ Dr. Alveda King, _Donald J. | | | Dear Patriot, I'm proud to endorse Jarome Bell for U.S. Congress in Virginia.

Please donate to Jarome [HERE](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=57b8daac42&e=645b3b1338).
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0020cf5362&e=645b3b1338)
Jarome Bell is a true America First patriot and we need him in Congress _yesterday_. I have worked with Jarome on border issues. He's not messing around and he's ready to deport criminals and seal the border.

Jarome is one of the Republican Party’s best chances at returning honesty to Washington, D.C.

Chief Bell is fighting harder than anyone out there to
* fully investigate the November 3rd election,
* to bring awareness to the enemy invasion at the border,
* to eradicate the anti-white racism invading our schools through CRT,
* to end the satanic attacks on our Christian faith, and
* to end medical tyranny, vaccine apartheid, and totalitarian covid controls exploding across our nation.

[I give Jarome Bell my complete and unreserved endorsement in his run for U.S. House in Virginia’s 2nd district. A vote for a Jarome is a vote for America Firs](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0067383b0b&e=645b3b1338)[t](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1d3e00e7ee&e=645b3b1338).

I hope you'll consider donating generously to his campaign for Congress in this vital flip seat.

Virginia's 2nd congressional district Just Got More Red!

And [Chief Bell can win this seat](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=68b460d1b5&e=645b3b1338)!
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0c12dd281a&e=645b3b1338)
It's currently held by a Jan 6 committee member, who's not doing much to help her country. Thanks to American Patriots like you, Jarome's campaign has gained MASSIVE traction, and he's ready to join me in Congress and take the message of America First to the Democrats and lying media. [_But Jarome needs your help now more than ever._](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f7dc1126f1&e=645b3b1338) Like every campaign, we don't have the big PAC dollars the RINOs have. Jarome needs to purchase costly television and radio ads to get our message out. [**By contributing to Jarome's campaign today, you are directly helping him to spread the word about his RINO Never-Trumper opponent.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4039ffaffd&e=645b3b1338) [**And Jarome intends to work with President Trump to put America First.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=25dd186c04&e=645b3b1338) We are now in a messaging war down the homestretch. Don’t let the old GOP Establishment message -- the one you voted against when you supported President Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- win out. [**Send Jarome to Congress to help me keep the America First momentum alive by contributing $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or anything you can afford to Jarome's campaign today.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d2dcfeca88&e=645b3b1338) Thank you in advance for your generosity. Respectfully,
**Paul Gosar** **P.S.** I'm asking you to [contribute to Jarome Bell for U.S. Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=69c3b7d89f&e=645b3b1338) to help him defeat the fully funded by RINO Swamp Creatures in D.C. who have always worked AGAINST the interests of America First.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ecc3e734fc&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The Communist Democrats, RINOs, media, and even SNL are calling for my head.

**They want me gone because they hate that I'm putting America First. **

_[**_I need your support today to fend off these vicious attacks so I can continue to put America First in Washington_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5d4a996bc5&e=645b3b1338). _

Friend, The Sacramento Bee just reported some big news about my race to flip California’s 3rd District. GOP Congressman Tom McClintock has decided not to run for re-election in the 3rd District _because he’s worried he would lose._ Instead of facing me in this purple district, he’s going to run in a neighboring safe red district. _Without an incumbent in the race, we’re even MORE likely to flip this seat blue!_ But we haven’t won yet. **Since McClintock ran away, two new GOP candidates have announced campaigns against me: anti-mask career politician Kevin Kiley and QAnon internet celebrity Omar Navarro.** Trump won this newly drawn district by _just_ 2%. _We can flip it if we go all-in._ [Can you pitch in a donation of $10, $25, $50 — or any amount — to help us flip this seat blue in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40588280/325034021/218260425?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220111McClintock_DKJ_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWI1MDYzYi0zZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOV2VcpM7aecjJXPdImpV0zAhmxkIkJQjWYg9X78JuU=)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers

Rome, GA 30162

name: Anne Maher
subject: My husband’s final deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Over the last few days, we’ve received a groundswell of grassroots donations ahead of Peter’s final fundraising deadline tomorrow. To all of those who have generously donated, I’d like to thank you from the bottom of my heart. To all those who have yet to contribute, I'm humbly asking for your support to help power my husband’s campaign to victory. If we can keep the energy going in these last hours, then I'm sure we can finish this final fundraising push in a strong position.
If you are able to make a contribution, will you chip in to help Peter meet his final fundraising goal of $7,500 by tomorrow’s 11:59 AM deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Anne
Forwarded Email Below:
It’s crunch-time. Starting at 12:00 PM tomorrow, we can no longer accept donations while the General Assembly enters Session. We’re looking for a groundswell of grassroots support to help us meet our final goal of $7,500 ahead of the fundraising blackout period. Click here to rush a donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22]
Peter Franchot is the unprecedented candidate that we need for these unprecedented times. As our state’s chief fiscal officer, he has an unparalleled understanding of the state’s budget -- a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor that cannot be learned on the job. He was the first candidate to release a detailed policy platform outlining how he’ll get to work on Day One to deliver results for our small businesses and working families. And he has more endorsements from current elected officials than any candidate in this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22]We have the momentum in this race -- and we need your help to keep our foot on the pedal. If you can give anything to help us reach our final fundraising goal before the fundraising blackout period begins, we would greatly appreciate it.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker]Whether large or small, your contribution will go a long way towards securing our victory. This could be the most expensive election in our state’s history, which is why it’s critical that we raise as much as we can ahead of the fundraising blackout period.
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011122?refcode=kicker&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

I could have never imagined this
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40588523/325039937/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk398-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI0YTQ3NS0zZjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD8DaxAzr09t-uR8IW6BoUA9K1qhdsBRXydkOc1ihQU=)

Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his next big goal, and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40588524/325039938/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk398-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI0YTQ3NS0zZjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD8DaxAzr09t-uR8IW6BoUA9K1qhdsBRXydkOc1ihQU=)**

clean_body: I could have never imagined this | | | = Friend – I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona. Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco. From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for all people. But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact opposite of my son. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory. Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his next big goal, and I don't want to let him down. This Saturday, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is.

| Peter —

In a few days, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is.

That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024.

Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true.

That’s why we’re asking if you can make a $3 contribution before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far-right will be even more fired up to beat Mark.

clean_body: This Saturday, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is. | Peter — In a few days, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is. That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024. Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true. That’s why we’re asking if you can make a $3 contribution before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far-right will be even more fired up to beat Mark. So we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = It is absolutely critical that Mark Kelly holds this seat. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Forced injections for an education?
body:
Will you help Turning Point USA reach hundreds of thousands of
college students with our No Forced Vax campaign to stop this madness?

Unsubscribe
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/unsubscribe.php?M=4817296&C=bea0e1466f4e471eca4bdda65e1ba8c8&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=555&N=72989&AGENCY=BELIEVE]

[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

Friend,

I warned you that once colleges were able to essentially force college
students to receive the COVID-19 vaccine, their unconstitutional
overreaching would NOT stop.

_And I was right!_

Now colleges and universities have gone EVEN FURTHER and demanded that
students — and, sometimes, staff — receive MORE COVID-19 vaccines
as boosters or never step foot on campus again.

FRIEND, YOU CAN’T GIVE IN TO TYRANTS AND EXPECT THEM TO STOP.
THAT’S WHY TURNING POINT USA IS LEADING THE FIGHT TO STOP FORCED
COVID VACCINATIONS ON COLLEGE CAMPUSES — AND WITH YOUR SUPPORT, WE
CAN REACH EVEN MORE STUDENTS IN 2022!
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

I could never have imagined that in this great nation, the United
States of America, free citizens would be forced to choose between a
medical procedure or their God-given liberties ... let alone young
people, who statistically are at the lowest risk from the virus.

But in many states, students must meet ever-changing, overreaching
vaccine mandates — and I don’t think this dangerous cycle will
ever stop unless Real Americans like you and me speak up.

_WILL YOU HELP TURNING POINT USA REACH HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF
COLLEGE STUDENTS WITH OUR NO FORCED VAX CAMPAIGN TO STOP THIS
MADNESS?_

YOU CAN HELP TPUSA RESTORE AND PROTECT INDIVIDUAL FREEDOM ON COLLEGE
CAMPUSES WITH YOUR TAX-DEDUCTIBLE CONTRIBUTION TODAY OF $25, $50,
$100, $250, OR EVEN $500. ANY AMOUNT WILL MAKE A BIG DIFFERENCE.
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

SUPPORT TPUSA TODAY
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

Colleges and universities got away with forcing students to take the
vax to receive their education in 2021. So now these same schools are
forcing students to receive more COVID-19 shots for the booster in
2022.

Colleges that have recently announced new, draconian requirements
range from Harvard, Yale, and Princeton to the University of Notre
Dame and the University of Massachusetts at Amherst.

DO YOU THINK STUDENTS SHOULD BE FORCED TO UNDERGO MEDICAL PROCEDURES,
AND FORCED TO PROVIDE PRIVATE MEDICAL INFORMATION, IN ORDER TO RECEIVE
AN EDUCATION?

IF YOU THINK THESE PRACTICES ARE UNFAIR AND UNCONSTITUTIONAL, GIVE
TPUSA YOUR SUPPORT. A TAX-DEDUCTIBLE DONATION OF $250, $100, $75, $50,
$25 OR EVEN JUST $15 WILL ALLOW US TO CONTINUE EMPOWERING 500,000+
STUDENTS TO STAND UP AND TO FIGHT FOR THEIR RIGHTS ON 3,000+ CAMPUSES.
TAKE ACTION NOW!
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

SUPPORT TPUSA TODAY
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

Our freedoms are increasingly being put at risk as draconian COVID
mandates, and now mandatory boosters, continue to sweep across the
nation.

THIS IS NOT ABOUT VACCINES OR A BOOSTER SHOT — THIS IS ABOUT
FREEDOM.

_THAT’S WHY TURNING POINT USA NEEDS YOUR SUPPORT NOW MORE THAN EVER
AS WE EDUCATE STUDENTS ACROSS THE COUNTRY WITH OUR NO FORCED VAX
ACTIVISM CAMPAIGN._
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

Changing the official definition of what it means to be "fully
vaccinated" to include only those who have also received a booster
shot is "on the table and open for discussion," according to Dr.
Fauci.

THE FINISH LINE WILL BE CONTINUOUSLY MOVED INDEFINITELY, AND LINES
WILL CONTINUE TO BE CROSSED IF WE DON’T TAKE MAJOR ACTION QUICKLY!

TPUSA is fighting the battle on 3,000+ campuses where rogue
administrators are trying to thwart students’ educational goals and
force them to publicly share their medical history.

No person should be forced to get the vaccine or endless booster shots
against his or her will. We cannot let anti-liberty policies like this
continue.

PLEASE SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA’S CRITICAL NO FORCED VAX ACTIVISM
CAMPAIGN TO REACH HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF COLLEGE STUDENTS BEFORE
THEIR FREEDOMS ARE LOST FOR GOOD.
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

The government has taken many strides to slide their way into private
citizens’ lives —mandatory vaccine boosters are the newest way in
which they can do so. The more support we receive from patriots like
you to stand up to medical tyranny, the more positive impact we can
make.

I’m counting on your urgent support today.
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/link.php?AGENCY=BELIEVE&M=4817296&N=72989&L=41964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS8xNDYzZmM1Ni01MzMzLTRmNTEtOWMwMi0xZGNkZTdiOGNjM2U/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UEdOMjQ5NjQ=]

For the Future of America,

Charlie Kirk

Founder & President

Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

7253 Watson Rd. #1324
Saint Louis, MO 63119

©2022, All Rights Reserved

Unsubscribe
[https://clicks.alerts.progunnews.com/unsubscribe.php?M=4817296&C=bea0e1466f4e471eca4bdda65e1ba8c8&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=555&N=72989&AGENCY=BELIEVE]

This morning, Gov. DeSantis gave his State of the State address to the Florida Legislature, but I think he could’ve cut his speech down to one word.

Because the state of the state is: **_NEGLECTED._**

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Small-dollar donations are how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Hi team

Our opponents in this race include the former vice president of an oil
company and three former investment bankers. They and their wealthy donor
base are pulling out all the stops to hold on to power and keep the status
quo. They’ve already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars to defeat us,
and much of that has come from mega-donors who benefit from a
business-as-usual approach to legislating.

But unlike the lobbyists and corporate CEOs that line our opponents’
pockets with campaign cash, our team relies on small-dollar contributions
from emails just like this one to fund our fight. In fact, our average
online donation in January so far is $22.02.

Our movement is strong, and when a lot of people chip in what they can, we
have the resources we need to organize and win. When we work together,
clear-eyed and focused on fighting for all Rhode Islanders (not just the
wealthy and well-connected!), we can affect meaningful change for our
communities.

Our opponents are sure to raise outrageous amounts of money this year to
try and stop our campaign, so we’re reaching out for your help right now.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=357%2E43343%2ET0XqIS ]Friend,
can you match our average contribution of $22.02 or whatever you can give
to power our work to organize voters and build a winning campaign?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3469?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=357%2E43343%2ET0XqIS ]CHIP IN $22.02

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220111_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=357%2E43343%2ET0XqIS ]CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT

Thank you for your support. It makes a huge difference!

Team Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=357%2E43343%2ET0XqIS ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=357%2E43343%2ET0XqIS ]Privacy Policy

Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia

[4]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

name: Team Abby
subject: re: filibuster reform and Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Sen. Grassley has refused time and again to protect our sacred right to vote.
| | |
---
Peter, our democracy is in crisis. Last year, Republican-led legislatures introduced _more than 440_ voter suppression bills, but far-right extremists like Sen. Grassley (R) refused time and again to protect our sacred right to vote.

**Then, earlier this week, reports surfaced that senators have entered bipartisan talks on critical voting rights and election measures – but Sen. Grassley isn't one of them.** **H e doesn’t have the courage to put country over party and protect our democracy. ****Instead, he's called legislation to protect voting rights a "very bad thing" and has fought against Democrats' attempts to end GOP-led voter suppression at every turn.**
**It's time for Sen. Grassley to go, and it's time for us to elect leaders like Abby – who will do whatever is necessary to protect our right to vote and defend our democracy, including reforming the filibuster.**
But Sen. Grassley and his Republican cronies have made it clear they will do _anything_ to cling to power – and the GOP has already raised $30 MILLION to take back the Senate and defeat challengers like Abby. **That's why tonight, Abby is counting on grassroots supporters like you to meet her emergency $15,000 goal before her midnight deadline. **

body:
We are on the national stage... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/08831a2eca5c/your-help-is-needed-6638102?e=e67cbb3f92)

| | **Hello friend,** **My name is Neal Walia and I am running for Congress in Colorado’s First Congressional District! I am running because I want to be a champion for our most vulnerable communities. I want our communities to have a representative who lives their struggles and will fight to fix them, as if their lives depended on it, because my life does.** **Our campaign made its way to the national stage yesterday by getting former Presidential candidate Marianne Williamson’s endorsement! ** [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=baeda88e64&e=e67cbb3f92) [**Take Marianne’s lead and make a donation to our people powered campaign today!**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7e8895ec28&e=e67cbb3f92) **Marianne has been a voice on the national stage for progress in politics and advocating against the rigged political system we live in and I am proud to have her endorsement!\** **This is a major mile marker for our campaign and we need to build on this momentum if we are going to win against an establishment corporate Democrat who has held this seat for over 25 years. ** [**Can I count on you to donate $10, $50, $100, or $250 today?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=bd6fc014db&e=e67cbb3f92) **Thank you so much for the support, can’t wait to share this journey with you!**

Neal Walia
Candidate
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: ICYMI: Ron Johnson is running!
body:
We’re counting on you to ensure victory in November.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_icymi_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- In case you missed it: **Senator Johnson is running for re-election in 2022.** The pathway to regaining the Senate goes through Wisconsin – and that means that Senator Johnson has to win in November. ****[**Watch his first ad here!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZVVKkbmvCl7N_jVJemouMu&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_icymi_3&n=2) Since taking office in 2011, Ron Johnson has represented the values that the Wisconsin and American people value the most: freedom, safety, and prosperity. **Defeating Senator Johnson will be the radical left's top priority. We cannot allow that to happen.** [**Can Senator Johnson count on your support today, Friend?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw16cxariQH7DNxreNsYIXMu2HVxLLLERhJn-iIRsV9Bt&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_icymi_3&n=3) While Democrats count on coastal elites in New York and California to bankroll their campaigns, we rely on grassroots supporters like you. We hope we can count on your support. **[Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100 or more today to ensure Senator Johnson knows Wisconsin is ready to fight for him just as he has fought for us.](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw16cxariQH7DNxreNsYIXMu2HVxLLLERhJn-iIRsV9Bt&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_icymi_3&n=4)** Thanks, Mark Jefferson
Executive Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: We have one important question for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/abolish-filibuster?source=em20220111-758&t=1001&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM ]Do you agree it's time to abolish the filibuster?

[2]( ) Yes
[3]( ) No
[4]( ) Not sure

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/abolish-filibuster?source=em20220111-758&t=1002&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM ]Sign the petition →

Hey, we can’t emphasize
enough the urgency of this moment.

Senate Democrats are on the precipice of re-examining of the Jim Crow
filibuster and we may finally get rid of it once and for all.

Over the past year, our sacred right to vote has been increasingly
trampled over, and as long as the filibuster is on the books, critical
legislation — like voting rights — will continue to be blocked.

In state after state, Republican state legislatures are passing laws that
undermine our freedom to vote and our democracy. Even in our own district,
Republicans have racially gerrymandered our once safe Democratic district
to take away the power of primarily Black and brown voters.

The filibuster has been used to stall progress for far too long. What do
you think? [ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/abolish-filibuster?refcode=em20220111-1&t=1003&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM ]If you
agree, please sign our petition right now calling for an end to the
filibuster — once and for all.[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/abolish-filibuster?refcode=em20220111-758&t=1004&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM ]Sign the petition →

Together, we can ensure that the filibuster is abolished. But first, we
have to show that this is a priority.

Let’s make this clear:
[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/abolish-filibuster?refcode=em20220111-1&t=1005&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM ]Add your name right now to call for the end of the filibuster, to
protect our democracy and our voting rights.

Together,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220111-758-footer&t=1006&refcode2=758_3698_0w4peM&akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=758%2E3698%2E0w4peM

body:
we have momentum
| Look, this is a hard email to write:

1\. Democrat Raphael Warnock is down TWO POINTS behind his Republican opponent. 2\. If we lose this seat, we LOSE our slim Senate majority, and Mitch McConnell will take control of the Senate again.

**3\. So we pledged to raise $50,000 by tonight to protect Raphael Warnock -- but we’re STILL $12,374 behind!!!**

[Mitch McConnell is PRAYING you don’t click the buttons below, Team. Rush $5 NOW to protect Democrats like Senator Warnock & SAVE our Senate majority »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4801?t=8&akid=1108%2E878179%2Eaa6yoW)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Joe Biden is headed to Atlanta today where he will endorse changing the filibuster so Democrats can jam through their radical agenda, including election fraud bills.

**Without the filibuster, Senate Democrats can pass just about ANYTHING with only 50 votes.**

That means the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, higher taxes, and yes, election fraud bills that will do nothing to restore Americans’ faith in our elections.

Right now as we speak, Chuck Schumer is pressuring moderate Democrat Senators Joe Manchin of West Virginia and Kyrsten Sinema of Arizona to support his latest stunt.

We need YOUR help to stop Schumer!

body:

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Begin forwarded message: **From:** Peter Franchot **Date:** January 7, 2022 at 11:02:26 AM EST **Subject:** This podcast reports that I am the Democratic frontrunner
---
|
---
Dear Doug, I have some great news to share with you today: **the Forward Maryland podcast has just ranked me as the frontrunner in the Democratic race for Governor.** **Click here to see podcasters Bill Woodcock and Steve Hunt of Forward Maryland share how they are ranking the 2022 gubernatorial candidates.** **Here 's what podcaster Bill Woodcock had to say: **_" At Number One, and I believe we're gonna be in agreement on this one, would be Maryland Comptroller Peter Franchot. [...] Peter Franchot has been a very competent Comptroller, a visionary Comptroller, and a Comptroller who has moved the office forward in the tradition of other Maryland political legends. [...] He's very plain spoken, very truthful, [and] very authentic."_ **Here 's what podcaster Steve Hunt had to say:** _" Franchot is definitely the Number One in my book right now."_ This latest ranking is yet another indication of the growing strength of our inclusive, people-powered movement. While our campaign consistently ranks at the top of Maryland polls and we are proud of the work we have done, there is a LOT more work ahead of us to secure the Democratic nomination for Governor on June 28th. To ensure this outcome, we need you engaged with the Franchot/Anderson-Walker Campaign. We have an important fundraising deadline approaching and really need your help to meet our fundraising goals. This deadline is even more critical because starting on January 12, 2022, I will be barred from accepting donations while the Maryland General Assembly enters the next legislative session. This fundraising blackout period means we need to make these final days of fundraising count. Thanks to your past support we are doing well on our fundraising, but we have a little bit more to do in advance of next Wednesday's deadline. **Can we count on you to chip in a little more to help us maintain our momentum ahead of our final fundraising deadline next week? We 're looking to raise an additional $3,000 by 11:59 PM tonight, and your contribution will help get us there.**
---
I can't thank you enough for your continued support of this movement. Together, we're going to change the way that government does business, and lift Maryland's communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Thank you,
---
|
---

clean_body: | Friend - Did you see this email from Peter Franchot? What he doesn't want you to know is the that I am his stiffest competition, ranked at #2 in the entire field of 10 candidates : [...] "One could see Doug Gansler emerge as that party regular candidate to oppose Comptroller Franchot." Our campaign is garnering the attention of political experts and support from people like you, just as our important MD Campaign Finance Report is due! Donate here: Thanks for your support, Doug Begin forwarded message: From: Peter Franchot Date: January 7, 2022 at 11:02:26 AM EST Subject: This podcast reports that I am the Democratic frontrunner | Dear Doug, I have some great news to share with you today: the Forward Maryland podcast has just ranked me as the frontrunner in the Democratic race for Governor. Click here to see podcasters Bill Woodcock and Steve Hunt of Forward Maryland share how they are ranking the 2022 gubernatorial candidates. Here 's what podcaster Bill Woodcock had to say: " At Number One, and I believe we're gonna be in agreement on this one, would be Maryland Comptroller Peter Franchot. [...] Peter Franchot has been a very competent Comptroller, a visionary Comptroller, and a Comptroller who has moved the office forward in the tradition of other Maryland political legends. [...] He's very plain spoken, very truthful, [and] very authentic." Here 's what podcaster Steve Hunt had to say: " Franchot is definitely the Number One in my book right now." This latest ranking is yet another indication of the growing strength of our inclusive, people-powered movement. While our campaign consistently ranks at the top of Maryland polls and we are proud of the work we have done, there is a LOT more work ahead of us to secure the Democratic nomination for Governor on June 28th. To ensure this outcome, we need you engaged with the Franchot/Anderson-Walker Campaign. We have an important fundraising deadline approaching and really need your help to meet our fundraising goals. This deadline is even more critical because starting on January 12, 2022, I will be barred from accepting donations while the Maryland General Assembly enters the next legislative session. This fundraising blackout period means we need to make these final days of fundraising count. Thanks to your past support we are doing well on our fundraising, but we have a little bit more to do in advance of next Wednesday's deadline. Can we count on you to chip in a little more to help us maintain our momentum ahead of our final fundraising deadline next week? We 're looking to raise an additional $3,000 by 11:59 PM tonight, and your contribution will help get us there. I can't thank you enough for your continued support of this movement. Together, we're going to change the way that government does business, and lift Maryland's communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Thank you, | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: For the People Act, Equality Act, Dream Act (and much more)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It all hinges on action by Senate Democrats.
#
Peter,
Senate Democrats are ready to hold a vote on amending the filibuster in order to pass historic voting rights legislation. If Democrats in the Senate all vote together, we will protect voting rights, free and fair elections, and our democracy.
But that’s only the big first step, Peter.
**We don’t just need to amend the filibuster, we need to END the filibuster.** That’s the only way Senate Democrats can pass critical reforms without McConnell and the GOP blocking our progress each step of the way.
Here are just _a few_ of the progressive bills that Pramila helped pass through the House that are stuck in the Senate without nixing the filibuster:
* **The Equality Act** would provide non-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people across the country. This bill is so critical for protecting LGBTQ folks in America, but the filibuster is blocking its passage.
* **The Dream Act** would create a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers and other immigrants who have been in America for years. Immigrants should be able to live in this country without fear of persecution, detention, or deportation.
* **The PRO Act** to protect workers and their right to organize. Workers have power when they organize their workplaces, and we must make it easier for people to join unions.
* **The Women’s Health Protection Act** to protect abortion rights across America.

There are too many to list: gun safety, environmental protections, raising the minimum wage, policing reform — it’s all on the line when we talk about the filibuster.
[**Senate Democrats must end the filibuster immediately, for our democracy and so much more. Can you chip in towards our continued fight for voting rights, the Equality Act, Dream Act, PRO Act, and so much more? We need to get this done before it’s too late.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9360?refcode=em20220111-950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=950%2E420207%2ENiM8Fq)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9360?refcode=em20220111-950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=950%2E420207%2ENiM8Fq)**
We can only make this change together, and we need to be all-in on this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220111-950-footer&t=21&refcode2=950_420207_NiM8Fq&akid=950%2E420207%2ENiM8Fq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=950%2E420207%2ENiM8Fq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=950%2E420207%2ENiM8Fq)

body:
YUGE endorsement announcement inside this message, you dont want to miss this!
---
| | | | | | |
---
🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x-OcBEAqhpkf_2Mtf7R1KQLkX6_wZa2OpCcDpGzypFFOCs53LxsyS-FZaSXML-RL1TWdB8A0rcpfBQzw-3U5IApeTa4Yc_ZSQ7e6HXUKzw15gs-aN37pyVW6PYqkUd23hnhykxSHjaIQd6j7G7Pw6aazbnPbzgqfgeZ8gfmicUA_dJ64YFxtbXlocfgAK5jt&c=n7-TCII3gYRDeqzPuPQGxuleIVXnNzKKk-XIp3JGdFXbx6z53-95PA==&ch=9st-SXYepSv59tMmW_QsRXhPYHz_arHngGOO8wz49akEdlsFi1eJ7A==)

| Patriot, My friend and colleague, Stephen (Steve) Barlock has officially announced his endorsement of our campaign for CD7!
Steve is a Former Trump Campaign official as well as a 2018 candidate for Colorado Governor. Over the past 5 years, Steve and I have served together as Chairs of President Trump's Campaign in Colorado leading the two most populous counties in 2016. Together we have also served as national delegates to the RNC and we served as 2 of Colorado's 9 presidential electors in 2016, one of the highest honors in the conservative movement.
Steve and I have been trusted not only with the Trump and America First brand multiple times, but we have been trusted with making the people of Colorado's voices heard both locally and nationally.
Help me signify this incredible announcement with a donation to my campaign today! With your support, we can keep CD7 out of the hands of the radical left and the GOP swamp.
---
| | | [Donate Any Amount](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x-OcBEAqhpkf_2Mtf7R1KQLkX6_wZa2OpCcDpGzypFFOCs53LxsyS-FZaSXML-RL1TWdB8A0rcpfBQzw-3U5IApeTa4Yc_ZSQ7e6HXUKzw15gs-aN37pyVW6PYqkUd23hnhykxSHjaIQd6j7G7Pw6aazbnPbzgqfgeZ8gfmicUA_dJ64YFxtbXlocfgAK5jt&c=n7-TCII3gYRDeqzPuPQGxuleIVXnNzKKk-XIp3JGdFXbx6z53-95PA==&ch=9st-SXYepSv59tMmW_QsRXhPYHz_arHngGOO8wz49akEdlsFi1eJ7A==)
---
"Dear Republicans, Republican Political Supporters, and Independent Freedom-loving Coloradoans,
It is my honor to endorse Laurel Imer for Congress. As a fellow Chair for the 2016 Trump Campaign, that brought our party back into the political fight, I witnessed the truth-loving fight and tenacity of this Colorado and CD7 Native. Laurel stands for: * Our Great Centennial State and our Country. * Representing our American flag. * Fighting for our individual freedoms. * The fight to raise our families the way we choose. * Respecting and learning from our history and the symbols of the past, be they good or bad. * Pursuing our own versions of happiness. Her eyes are opened, and her goals are true and just. She fights for each individual who demands the freedoms that our Founding Fathers were willing to die for and enabled the building of this great county, that so many want to be part of. She will fight for the science of this Great Experiment of America will not be corrupted by Global powers for failure. Laurel is America First and will never fall to a Global Cabal of Sunshine Republicans and Marxist Democrats. Her eyes are wide open, and she has taken names of the Corrupt Backstabbing Globalist Ticks of the big tent we are part of. She understands the loyalties to the party of the past and their failings. She will fight the Global reset pushed by the Bush Cartel and she will continue to fight to dismantle its foundations. She will tear down the great curtain facade of the UN, NATO, and the WHO. She will never validate the Craven Sunshine Republican groups like the Lincoln Project. She will continue to Drain the Swamp in DC. She will support the sovereign will of Our Great American Republic and will never accept the fake manufactured consent of the Elitist Media and their cronies in the corrupt pyramid scheme of Globalism. She will stay true to her Goals for the Individual, that we may always obtain our own versions of Happiness.
Fight for your Freedom and Vote Laurel Imer for Congress! God Bless our Great Centennial State and God Bless America!"
\-- Stephen Barlock Fmr. Chair of the Denver County Trump Campaign & 2018 Republican Candidate for CO Governor.
With your support today our mission to take back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022 can become a reality!
Can I continue to count on you in this mission Friend?
Sincerely,
---

subject: It's grassroots versus establishment!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/880ac4ede247/were-off-and-running-6636949?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |

| |
# It's grassroots vs. establishment now!

This election is so very different. Did you know 16 candidates have filed on the Republican side? While only one Republican will emerge from the primary, most of the filed candidates only serve to split off an estimated 200-5,000 votes each statewide. That adds up, and how that splitting will shake out is anyone’s guess.

I’m one of the top-tier candidates in this race. I’m different not only because I’m NOT another I-5 corridor candidate like most of my opposition, but I’m also grassroots. Even those wonderful voters inside the I-5 corridor tell me they don't want another nominee from their area. We need a governor who understands the ENTIRE state.

Mine is an old-fashioned, Reagan-style grassroots, boots-on-the-ground campaign. I won’t be endorsed by Oregon’s establishment politicians. I’m not owned and operated by lobbyists. You won’t see big pharma or giant real estate developers pumping money into my PAC. Do voters want the swamp in their candidate? They certainly have that choice again, but I don’t think so. Sometimes this race feels like David vs. Goliath. But remember - David won!

The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results. I’m offering voters not only a chance to flip the governor seat to red, but also to get us out of the swamp in one fell swoop! I’m tough enough to win this fight, but I need my army of grassroots help on the ground. We have traction - and lots of it! Please consider going to my website and donating today. Tell everyone you know about this campaign.

The power really is with the people, and your votes and donations will carry this campaign over the finish line.
_**Please chip in today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy, politically connected opposition from buying the primary. Your donations help me continue across the state on the campaign trail. They buy TV, newspaper, radio and billboard ads. They allow me to get yard signs and a listing in the Oregon Voter's Pamphlet.**I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.**

Yours,
_Kerry_

Murder, assault, rape, and robbery are skyrocketing across Texas and the first thing my Socialist opponent wants to do is take away law-abiding Texans’ most effective tool of self-defense.

As your next Governor, I have this response that will infuriate the Robert Francis O’Rourke and his army of leftist trolls: **_“Hell no, you will never take our AR-15s or any of our guns.”_**

[**Join me in our fight to keep this anti-Second Amendment fanatic out of the Texas Governor’s mansion by chipping in whatever you can afford.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=561efc37f1554625bf972be441d7bd62&_e=jqguaQMxUCpiUxei0mUStDmdtQIJ3QBK71KoF6VHzGvt_3X5BeX__xviQi2i6KY4RlgccfS4YfgPIOGkVrwqZOGym5ItEVGrO6rE5sbJ2lsLa84z4i7h5-ev8bnCZcxIdIA7SN1a2XWPR_9zPh4JM_6I4YLUyTTlTBXiC6utC8X_C8fll1v1Ud_OFGt5h7kb9oiPGYBEea-88yVedHApl3m2Y0fKQvPA8nbUwvIhdKiOtw8GwqonB2y307un5hExoPw6zL61k4ex0jTidb_zcp7oQ7j3CXLeG1jfYb6yxMSLo0JJBfvA0jP__cHJizzDRDUtIeeINt_zHi49mnzQFzndCPkL9bVTn-K7nM3ulkCMYvvzdYBuZmDWlEH9V74dxcftlEfRJl6aHHZ7cIQafg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. | Peter, I do not think my radical leftist opponent for Texas Governor could have been clearer. If Robert Francis O’Rourke is sworn into office, every gun owner in Texas will be an immediate target of the state. Murder, assault, rape, and robbery are skyrocketing across Texas and the first thing my Socialist opponent wants to do is take away law-abiding Texans’ most effective tool of self-defense. Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. If you want a leader with a proven track record for defending our Second Amendment, I am hated on the left for my unwavering support of the Second Amendment. Democrats and ultra-Leftist megadonors from across the country will spend millions to keep me out of office. As your next Governor, I have this response that will infuriate the Robert Francis O’Rourke and his army of leftist trolls: “Hell no, you will never take our AR-15s or any of our guns.” This election is about our most fundamental freedom as Americans. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: This 1 topic is a huge weakness
body:
Hi there, 20 years ago today, the first 20 prisoners arrived at Guantánamo Bay. To this day, none of them have ever been charged in the 9/11 attacks — a microcosm of the lawlessness of U.S. foreign policy. Our country’s foreign policy has caused untold suffering across the world. In Afghanistan today, our sanctions are causing mass starvation and the imminent possible death of millions of Afghans. [**I stand against U.S. imperialism, sanctions, and endless war. Unlike my opponent, I don’t take money from the military-industrial complex, so I need YOUR support instead. Can you chip in with a quick donation right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40589553/325056449/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2Q5YTk4NC00ZjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQABFY5liwlaNh23wGp62oPJ29gk-DNfejbpKD-bCgc=) Foreign policy is a topic that tends to be a weakness among anti-establishment candidates, but I grew up overseas and have lived, worked, and studied in seven countries. Like most progressives, I support Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and housing for all. I also support a humane foreign policy that would stop: 1\. Sanctions on Afghanistan that are causing mass starvation. 2\. Military assistance and the U.S. sale of weapons to Saudi Arabia — and our support of the brutal war in Yemen. 3\. Covert regime change, such as the assassination of the president of Haiti, which one of the assassination plotters and financers said had the “full support of the United States,” as the _New York Times_ reported yesterday. 4\. Funding of militias on both sides of the Syrian war (which has led to the absurd situation of militias armed by different parts of the U.S. military-industrial complex fighting each other on the battlefield). 5\. Regime change wars conducted for the purpose of resource extraction and enrichment of U.S. corporations and elites. | | Peter,

I'd like to start this email by saying **“thank you” to everybody who has donated to our campaign** , especially all of you who came through during our critical end-of-year fundraising push.

We're just about done adding up all the numbers, and I can confidently say that with the help of all of our contributors, our campaign is in a strong position to win this race and keep this seat from falling into the hands of the crazy woke Democrats!

**We would not be here without the dedication of our grassroots conservative donors** from Texas and across the nation**.****You have signaled loud and clear that you want to keep this seat Republican and you want conservatives to take back Congress!**

There is still a long way to go in this race, and I am sure that **Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Robert Francis O'Rourke, and the AOC Woke Squad will spend millions in an attempt buy this race**.

We absolutely cannot let that happen.

**The left-wing progressive socialist agenda is destroying our country!**

Just look at what they're doing:

* Open borders
* Radical classroom indoctrination
* Runaway inflation
* Reckless spending
* Class warfare
* Attacking our law enforcement
* Abortion on demand
* Waging a war on the American Dream

and the list goes on and on...

**We must stop them.**

[**If you have not yet contributed, it's not too late!**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/jGsmIo7GXF-mX-MIqC1ODg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjwIACP0UgYTllZjljNDYxMGQ5ZDA5NzUxNmIxYTczMmQ3ODk5OTJEQGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8yMXE0dGhhbmt5b3UtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgph1wL73WEvxPuEUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~) We still have a long road ahead of us before we secure a conservative victory.

Thank you again to everyone who contributed to our critical end-of-year fundraising push, thank you all for your support, and God bless!
---
**Pat Fallon**
**** Conservative Congressman TX-04

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: I’m READY.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
It’s hard to believe that it’s now been 8 months since I launched my second campaign for Congress in Oregon’s 4th congressional district I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ecb0bc5ba294bdfab5b2f9ba23b03e7&_e=WTiEwoaxEzkW9ZlQZnyxJt5DMVTQBkw0gpzMfOMrT-ORa6Zb3rmV0yXbwy-G8eTuZY1_NMiBVbyj1qt92MFT2DWv0d9eeYMODE6Apfla9_wbY82PbvrBPP54oT6yLEHGOSH64CFfAU358DSv6xZT38Gf-pqMgmGMalBhpQdPiSRqq39JZxb1SrEJhxuNP0mbPEtKdkZzqU7swYR_tXbVLMujRBKy_3TyK9eI3cj08OJ4u-ZSHYdQtUmuiZ-emMzbxIcNjwb4iJStNefUVRlepI4qNvooQ-zX1mNX0_fj76L5UT_4SqzsS-k9VXOkX6oXNG0LP3sdq5loVF738at8iPS8PRhkqqEtduGDjsa8W4DB57F95g-6EDSIAJC4Z0sNlxO_DYFULi_ZuweeGeFkwmiF_teAVCmNBkcsPg8johYzDHBn6qjAmn7CEskGCoCt954_PBZPRe18CLGgVItK3g%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

I’m not quite clear how long it’s appropriate to wish you a happy new year – the Jury is still out on that – but since this is my first email to you in 2022 I want to extend a warm welcome ELECTION YEAR welcome to you.

It’s hard to believe that it’s now been 8 months since I launched my second campaign for Congress in Oregon’s 4th congressional district. We’ve accomplished a lot over the past eight months and I’m proud every single day of the team we’ve assembled and the base of support we continue to build.

And others around the country have taken notice! **_[Since we launched this campaign on May 1st, conservatives like you have helped my campaign to raise more than $600k in online donations](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ecb0bc5ba294bdfab5b2f9ba23b03e7&_e=WTiEwoaxEzkW9ZlQZnyxJt5DMVTQBkw0gpzMfOMrT-ORa6Zb3rmV0yXbwy-G8eTuZY1_NMiBVbyj1qt92MFT2DWv0d9eeYMODE6Apfla9_wbY82PbvrBPP54oT6yLEHGOSH64CFfAU358DSv6xZT38Gf-pqMgmGMalBhpQdPiSRqq39JZxb1SrEJhxuNP0mbPEtKdkZzqU7swYR_tXbVLMujRBKy_3TyK9eI3cj08OJ4u-ZSHYdQtUmuiZ-emMzbiJ82ps4d1hjbA2p5eD1qB8vFcoB4TTClbcnR5Q8MidZgd1UHAxTF1FuluokQwXaOQYeyBPu78dVs4dI9Mjt_NwMQuRY_DbXXXAtxBa-TpIHkOsft4pqe7ErcdWwmG3NGDDSuDwVJBlzqEVYoPyyOj3KT48qkS43AytMuVQwXtSMY2TnfQFyrcSCd6HGGV99XDExAAvY2r_yKH0YVrSmO5Q%3D%3D)_**.

Your generosity inspires me every day.

While I’m confident victory will be ours in November, we are not taking anything for granted and we’re preparing for an onslaught of attacks over the next 10 months. Thankfully, leaders in the national Republican Party have once again seen the strength in our campaign and offered me their full and unconditional endorsements. I’m grateful to Leader Kevin McCarthy, Whip Steve Scalise, GOP Conference Chair Elise Stefanik and everyone else who has called and offered their support.

I’m in this race to win it. **[I’m writing today to ask for your support and your prayers as we prepare for the next 10 months](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ecb0bc5ba294bdfab5b2f9ba23b03e7&_e=WTiEwoaxEzkW9ZlQZnyxJt5DMVTQBkw0gpzMfOMrT-ORa6Zb3rmV0yXbwy-G8eTuZY1_NMiBVbyj1qt92MFT2DWv0d9eeYMODE6Apfla9_wbY82PbvrBPP54oT6yLEHGOSH64CFfAU358DSv6xZT38Gf-pqMgmGMalBhpQdPiSRqq39JZxb1SrEJhxuNP0mbPEtKdkZzqU7swYR_tXbVLMujRBKy_3TyK9eI3cj08OJ4u-ZSHYdQtUmuiZ-emMzbWzHshK9JZ3lTb1zeIrB0exZ_QpSO0oBFDt5s-vPzdPtXzCRxHCQHH2kkOojToeXVH9lSySD7ElpsvGogexQ_xsy3S2K5JtGqBemunEVLxic9cGrU3bsXO6iZICW93aayMCApaHJ5TCj5JQXKqGn8nKe_fM2L0-MM1v1vcvDBGU6c8otrM0wA2DyzXF0R0ka13TdnY_5Ul8K9UgLKxo347Q%3D%3D)**.

Please don’t hesitate to drop me a note or send us an email – we read every piece of correspondence that we receive. Knowing that you’re on the team means so much and I’d like to hear from you directly.

To victory,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**DONATE TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ecb0bc5ba294bdfab5b2f9ba23b03e7&_e=WTiEwoaxEzkW9ZlQZnyxJt5DMVTQBkw0gpzMfOMrT-ORa6Zb3rmV0yXbwy-G8eTuZY1_NMiBVbyj1qt92MFT2DWv0d9eeYMODE6Apfla9_wbY82PbvrBPP54oT6yLEHGOSH64CFfAU358DSv6xZT38Gf-pqMgmGMalBhpQdPiSRqq39JZxb1SrEJhxuNP0mbPEtKdkZzqU7swYR_tXbVLMujRBKy_3TyK9eI3cj08OJ4u-ZSHYdQtUmuiZ-emMzbHOTk33yZmD-E9PkEXOb7Xv0CMz2wHA9Im52aOtz3LcLDEW7Y2399wghem4K3wCsslzbDVOHWuXhG63e_-zrfkZSTLpZseBuf6NC0VjKwXpJH_DbFi-GByWNsRC_dosnV9PUqTJ1dMvCOwdnSG916csmNq6A7cj4jFzJ1C71sn71Ij4VZkvMk11tYIirfX0TCiIZaWPQEQI-GXAFlvfGxKQ%3D%3D)

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Please don’t hesitate to drop me a note or send us an email – we read every piece of correspondence that we receive. Knowing that you’re on the team means so much and I’d like to hear from you directly. To victory, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: My official 2022 survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Friend,

The Cook Political Report has rated three Senate Democrats running for reelection as vulnerable "toss ups."

Senators Mark Kelly (AZ), Raphael Warnock (GA), and Catherine Cortez Masto (NV) are each in tight races against multiple GOP challengers. Losing even one of their seats to a Republican could shatter any chance we have to continue making progress for the American people. Losing all of them would be devastating beyond measure.

To be frank, these incumbents are depending on supporters like you and me to make sure they finish the year strong. We need to make sure their campaigns start off 2022 with end-of-year fundraising reports that show just how many Americans are behind them.

Before their campaigns' official end-of-year fundraising deadline on Friday at midnight, will you make a donation right now to be split between Senators Kelly, Warnock, and Cortez Masto?
https://links.e.leahyforvermont.

I am proud to work alongside all three of these senators as we show up to work to deliver progress for the American people:

Senator Mark Kelly was instrumental in getting the bipartisan infrastructure bill passed and consistently bringing leadership centered on science, data, and facts to Congress. We must keep him in the Senate.

There are few voices clearer than Senator Raphael Warnock's when it comes to protecting the right to vote for all Americans. To protect our democracy, we must keep him right where he is.

Senator Cortez Masto has served alongside me since 2017, and I've been consistently impressed by her advocacy on behalf of working families, in her home state of Nevada and across the country. We can't afford for Republicans to turn her seat red, though I can tell you for certain that they're spending a lot of money trying.

Throwing our support to these three candidates now will make a significant difference in the new year. Let's keep these vulnerable incumbents in office, so we can expand our Democratic majority together.

Before their campaigns' end-of-year fundraising deadline on Friday at midnight, will you make a contribution right now to be split between these three campaigns?
https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/d3mGFgAgYXt-/dFN4eU51OVdyK2FjaG9aQ2VQdzNROFlnTWZvNEFrY0NrK2hpTUNsSW0rNVZkN1ZYbkhUK0pWdnFHNUhOZm04c1FzNkQwS0VocHN4VkwxaFlJbmloY0oxMkxpNjlHMDhjNVZzeDdrSEQzYm89S0/cFdBRk1Dek1uVmZ6NzVKdFNodXN0em9jTUpBT1ZKdTdNd09jUXhsZWt0RWZ5V3JnblBwVm5FeGtSTW5ndXRscm9uelorL3krbXE3c0ZlV2tVNXoyWkx2SjNqM21LcTlzS0

Thank you for your support -- and wishing you and your family a very happy New Year.

Sincerely,

Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator

clean_body: New polls give GOP major advantage. | Peter, For years, the Left has taken Hispanic voters across the country for granted. Hispanic voters are coming to the Republican Party because of our economic policies and belief in the American Dream. The Left is at a total loss. Their pandering and disastrous agenda is costing them voters at record pace, but with the majority on the line, I need your help to stand up to Pelosi and win this battle ground district. Liberal policies are crushing American communities. We have seen nothing but failure coming from Washington, D.C. since the Left took power, but with the help of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter, we will flip the majority and put an end to the Left’s reckless policies. Republicans have the momentum entering 2022 but Nancy Pelosi has a cash advantage and will use every last penny to defeat me and cling to power. I need your help to fight back. body:
Help us get Dr. Ameena on the ballot by collecting petition signatures. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f79abe37558f/its-petition-time?e=5fba611a2c)

| |

| |
# Help us get Dr. Ameena on the ballot!
We are excited to be launching our petition process this weekend! Come out and join us Saturday and Sunday while we collect the signatures that will help get Dr. Ameena on the ballot. Signature collection is an essential part of the campaign, and we can use your help. We need to collect 1,000 signatures to ensure our place on the ballot.

New to this process? Don't worry; we will be happy to train you. It is super easy. If you live in the 1st District, you can circulate in your neighborhood. You can also knock on doors or canvas outside a busy shopping center.

Because of Covid, we are going to forgo the traditional large kick-off. [Instead, we are asking people to sign up for a slot to come in and get their materials.](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=88a360db9b&e=5fba611a2c) We will have everything you need to collect signatures, including hand warmers! clean_body: Help a U.S. Army Captain take back the House. | Friend, My good friend, fellow West Point Alumni, and U.S. Army veteran Wesley Hunt needs our help. With Texas gaining its brand-new 38th congressional district, Wesley is running in 1 of just 5 must-win congressional districts that will decide the fate of the House majority – and thus, the fate of Pelosi’s retirement plans. But because Pelosi knows Wesley can END her reign over the House, she’s made him her #1 TARGET as we officially begin the election year. With Pelosi’s DCCC already sitting on a war chest of more than $131 MILLION this year, Wesley will need the support of every last grassroots conservative to fend off their attacks. That’s why I promised Wesley I would leave no stone unturned... I told him that I would reach out to every America First patriot across the country to ensure he has the resources to FIGHT BACK against Pelosi. And that all starts with YOU contributing just $20.22 to kick off 2022. Thank you, Mike Pompeo 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: No Filibuster
subject: SIGN ON: Voting rights > filibuster
