body:
| | | Being pro-filibuster means you’re anti-voting rights.

[**Tell the Senate: end filibusters of voting rights legislation!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx08xJpI1E58kLATMelCUen4YaQY87aY8EMqrk2CCcsXaFAo18QFFF6KQadqy7kyLSexxb1CbnparphzZ7jTYXz8NvjsDVrfeef4-th2qXaxlx4vr5vvvWgOFdCSdugAoPuBL-ys6BHN7bmjRni1QRdJuERFJQxX-4KByPAm4Q1AsecdbMUEFrSKKkVTvxDiszSLYIF9wWc0p5L7ehzsoQSg34NzNMTmcqX5jsTh1PueVBTHeeQH82Y8pbHpcOz21tqP2t0iG61r2uKvt5Tv4f7mm8VGxIVVi-SBCd-S-U99xPF3Dsavs8voDS62e2QX0CsbqPuvJC6aCVEtZnDLGItGe411EP9lMO3u8vv2JUO9KYmRR18AEPD9hA5SFBEbiEg0xeYCfJIwiFjVbRjK7X69RoRZp8LEswW5XKRq7I-LBc7rW1Z72la8gg6vOcuggOct9QLEeST6ZcYD7Zuj-9iiI9Dr5V1D-tNSn8ExwC98z412aHatgSBLuOB7X0bcf3bJUvEMU0Hzb7kcJBTjpLNdgRbLz-n0YAVqvxtPHVGtoOW/3im/YILqC1vYSNWpndV4iC4deQ/h0/PfvI6V22TezoWkWkZQe5ibFsnS6a1cjITtgheLWFdQY)
Overwhelmingly popular voting rights bills like the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act are being blocked by the Jim Crow filibuster.
But the filibuster isn’t in the Constitution – the Senate can change it whenever it wants. Just recently, it made an exception to the filibuster to raise the debt ceiling and stop a catastrophic default on America’s debts.
**If the Senate can carve out an exception to stop a catastrophic default on America’s debts, it _must_ carve out an exception for the most important thing of all – our democracy.**
**[Tell your Senators to carve out the filibuster in order to pass national standards for voting rights and restore democracy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx08xJpI1E58kLATMelCUen4YaQY87aY8EMqrk2CCcsXaFAo18QFFF6KQadqy7kyLSexxb1CbnparphzZ7jTYXz8NvjsDVrfeef4-th2qXaxlx4vr5vvvWgOFdCSdugAoPuBL-ys6BHN7bmjRni1QRdJuERFJQxX-4KByPAm4Q1AsecdbMUEFrSKKkVTvxDiszSLYIF9wWc0p5L7ehzsoQSg34NzNMTmcqX5jsTh1PueVBTHeeQH82Y8pbHpcOz21tqP2t0iG61r2uKvt5Tv4f7mm8VGxIVVi-SBCd-S-U99xPF3Dsavs8voDS62e2QX0CsbiF_W9E2myqWZYHSn9h1Vb19jSUF_XJnvMbSQHTMwFVI100OU1C7GWkdnrl9hGJCaebikR7-12onIpIOMB76B-2d94pXWWIvTRBAwtU3EoqPRkegnv7sxAvK4Dx_8Weitybu8YI9YJFkxBfKIQhrsyUu7hxeowYhYWpdanZhXE7ZZgp9ohKEUGdkfQ3leJSwJRnmnyC8IEsprtc7PIjACbHR6Jg1OthVKYiEylrRy2W6/3im/YILqC1vYSNWpndV4iC4deQ/h1/tnF0p56ifdAPD6pufc51Z3ZuZO_-OuAbClA-v6rzzyo)**
In 2020, Donald Trump and his henchmen tried to stop a peaceful transition of power, inciting an attempted coup to overturn the results of a democratic election.
Luckily, he failed _this time_.
Since then, Trump’s Republicans are working to take control of state and local elections, hoping to install officials who are willing to subvert democracy.
**Ready for the good news? We still have time to stop them.**
**[Sign the petition now urging your Senators to end the filibuster for voting rights legislation, and defend our democracy now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx08xJpI1E58kLATMelCUen4YaQY87aY8EMqrk2CCcsXaFAo18QFFF6KQadqy7kyLSexxb1CbnparphzZ7jTYXz8NvjsDVrfeef4-th2qXaxlx4vr5vvvWgOFdCSdugAoPuBL-ys6BHN7bmjRni1QRdJuERFJQxX-4KByPAm4Q1AsecdbMUEFrSKKkVTvxDiszSLYIF9wWc0p5L7ehzsoQSg34NzNMTmcqX5jsTh1PueVBTHeeQH82Y8pbHpcOz21tqP2t0iG61r2uKvt5Tv4f7mm8VGxIVVi-SBCd-S-U99xPF3Dsavs8voDS62e2QX0Csbkq4EEusfS9Ckg2iJc8JoVQt4NyLjISh1_fto3mqnGUf2wOzXybROiR-pKRi5Q2fzZAEAD4CKaQqRSRSCaivD5_t2uHJAOY3L67Nt9iH3yfVb03s3Bu3h4K3bc8rdLgWhvDbro1HLZOJdLeKYdTY6rbxuMrFROu2njYKzlMHm9geDhwHLmi0UoJxzxXeaSyeQ17o7oOGhcoUnUqKQ4ixcDo7lI6C-zbrPb1-ncfTbEWs/3im/YILqC1vYSNWpndV4iC4deQ/h2/nX7GFFvzN4pjqr0Z87z1fAjRZtH3G3Q_bH6OR4HrblY)**

clean_body: | | | Being pro-filibuster means you’re anti-voting rights. Overwhelmingly popular voting rights bills like the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act are being blocked by the Jim Crow filibuster. But the filibuster isn’t in the Constitution – the Senate can change it whenever it wants. Just recently, it made an exception to the filibuster to raise the debt ceiling and stop a catastrophic default on America’s debts. If the Senate can carve out an exception to stop a catastrophic default on America’s debts, it must carve out an exception for the most important thing of all – our democracy. In 2020, Donald Trump and his henchmen tried to stop a peaceful transition of power, inciting an attempted coup to overturn the results of a democratic election. Luckily, he failed this time. Since then, Trump’s Republicans are working to take control of state and local elections, hoping to install officials who are willing to subvert democracy. Ready for the good news? We still have time to stop them. Thanks for taking critical action. – D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: If we’re going to win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I am writing to you from our dining room table after a terrific weekend in
El Paso and just before I hit the road again to travel to other parts of
Texas.

Part of what made the weekend so good, of course, was that I had the
chance to spend so much of it with our family — going on runs with Henry,
watching Ulysses’ basketball games with Amy, and helping Molly take care
of our animals (dog, cats, hens, bearded dragon, and python).

The other reason it was special was the time I spent with people in the
community.

Saturday we brought hundreds of volunteers and supporters together to talk
about the campaign and to remind ourselves of how lucky we are to live on
the U.S. - Mexico border. At a time that Abbott is using communities like
ours as a prop in an effort to scare people about immigration and
immigrants, and after his disastrous border wall and “Operation Lone Star”
which has cost us billions of dollars and put enormous stress on members
of the Texas Guard, it’s important that we share the positive story of
border communities. We are peaceful, safe, and successful because we are
cities of immigrants, not in spite of the fact that we are cities of
immigrants.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1001&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Rally in El Paso

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1002&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Rally in El Paso

And we want more than just slogans, scare tactics, and photo ops. We
deserve investment in our schools, better jobs for our neighbors, and the
ability to see a doctor when we need to.

I know that the people of El Paso agree, because not only did hundreds
come out to join us on a blustery Saturday afternoon, but on Sunday I had
the chance to join a dedicated band of block walkers to knock on doors in
central El Paso and meet the voters who live there.

Canvassing now — in the middle of January — may sound like we’re doing too
much too soon. Usually campaigns begin door-to-door efforts in the summer,
some wait as late as the early fall. But if we’re going to win this race,
we need to be at these doors NOW, in January, and every day until election
day.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1003&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Canvassing in El Paso

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1004&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Canvassing in El Paso

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1005&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Canvassing in El Paso

It’s the most powerful way to connect with the people who will decide the
outcome of this election.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&t=1006&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]I hope that you can help me reach more voters by making a contribution.
I will use the resources we raise to support our outreach and will spend
the majority of it on direct person-to-person contact like the block walks
I joined this weekend.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51605?refcode=ema20220111-171066&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU ]Contribute $3

Now, I’m going to head upstairs to pack my bags for tomorrow, then make
some dinner for us (going simple and healthy — rice, beans, salmon, and
salad) and get to enjoy a last meal with Amy and the kids before I hit the
road.

Looking forward to it!

Thanks for helping to make it possible,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=171066%2E444211%2EXmMhjU

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

[ ]Rally in El Paso [ ]Rally in El Paso And we want more than just slogans, scare tactics, and photo ops. We deserve investment in our schools, better jobs for our neighbors, and the ability to see a doctor when we need to. I know that the people of El Paso agree, because not only did hundreds come out to join us on a blustery Saturday afternoon, but on Sunday I had the chance to join a dedicated band of block walkers to knock on doors in central El Paso and meet the voters who live there. Canvassing now — in the middle of January — may sound like we’re doing too much too soon. Usually campaigns begin door-to-door efforts in the summer, some wait as late as the early fall. But if we’re going to win this race, we need to be at these doors NOW, in January, and every day until election day. [ ]Canvassing in El Paso [ ]Canvassing in El Paso [ ]Canvassing in El Paso It’s the most powerful way to connect with the people who will decide the outcome of this election. [ ]I hope that you can help me reach more voters by making a contribution. I will use the resources we raise to support our outreach and will spend the majority of it on direct person-to-person contact like the block walks I joined this weekend. [ ]Contribute $3 Now, I’m going to head upstairs to pack my bags for tomorrow, then make some dinner for us (going simple and healthy — rice, beans, salmon, and salad) and get to enjoy a last meal with Amy and the kids before I hit the road. Looking forward to it! Thanks for helping to make it possible, Beto

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Republicans are gearing up to flood this state with even more money.
#

Friends –
It’s Dory here – and I’m reaching out to share some AMAZING news. We’ve just released our Q4 fundraising numbers, and I’m thrilled to share that **our campaign raised more than $2.1 million last quarter!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220111-1-ma&refcode2=251.357359.VBN957&t=1&akid=251%2E357359%2EVBN957)
2022 is off to a great start, thanks to you. This is a testament to the immense power of our grassroots campaign.
The end of the year was huge for our campaign. With Cheri becoming our presumptive nominee, Democrats are rallying behind our campaign to focus on our general election and turn North Carolina blue in 2022!
But with this great news comes a stark reality. Republicans are gearing up to flood this state with even more money. They are dead set on stopping Cheri from becoming our Senator because she’s the _only_ candidate in this race who’s going to represent North Carolina families and be a champion for justice.
Club for Growth’s super PAC has already spent millions on ads in this race, and Trump’s hand-picked candidate Ted Budd has already dumped $275,000 of his own money into his campaign. There’s no telling how much he’s willing to spend to buy this seat.
Our success and momentum in a race for one of the most flippable Senate seats this year puts a big target on our campaign. Republicans could launch a full-scale attack against Cheri at any moment, and we have to gear up to fight back now.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Another Lockdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Here We Go Again](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopK3Y5wXeYAIV1oc1O7nEmTl1rOmic83damcgw0Ko_6Zg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan11&n=1) Sonoma County has banned gatherings over 50 people and told residents to “shelter in place.” This is the prelude to a statewide lockdown. We can’t let it happen. If the goal is to “stop the spread,” Los Angeles is instructive. That county has by far the most cases per capita in California. The "scientific" regimen of vaccine passports and outdoor masking has somehow failed. To make things more surreal, the state is now having healthcare staff work while COVID-positive. This comes after thousands of staff were fired even if COVID-recovered. If the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over and expecting a different result, then the recipe for restoring sanity is simple: end all mandates. Pass ACR 46, my resolution to terminate the emergency. Meanwhile at the Capitol, Newsom just unveiled the largest budget in history. He spent three hours at the podium reveling in all $268 billion. I’ve never seen someone so gleeful about lighting cash on fire. On the campaign front, national Democrats have put a target on my back, hammering us with daily attacks. The last thing they want is our movement to get bigger. With your help, we can handle anything they throw at us. [Help me fend off the attacks](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan11&n=2) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwbze1k6deStYNWybwwHKKe02UobPN2XKYrLrIO9esc_g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan11&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[ElectKevinKiley.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltV7bfMPCE9ZT2udr1wr_AxY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan11&n=4)

name: Team Booker
subject: Rand got called out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Rand Paul once again used his position on the Senate Health Committee to
attack Dr. Fauci. But this time, he got called out for exactly what we’ve
all known for months: he is using the pandemic for his own political gain.

He even brought screenshots of Rand’s website, which shows how the Senator
is trying to fundraise off of getting Dr. Fauci fired.

Take a look:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14536?refcode=em20220111-1439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1439%2E346206%2E3TvYHV ][IMG]

Today’s committee hearing with Dr. Fauci was intended to be a meeting for
lawmakers, to figure out how to best support the American people during
this recent surge of the coronavirus.

But instead of making important headway in that conversation, Rand once
again chose to focus his time on levying irrelevant, personal attacks on
Dr. Fauci.

We’re all tired,
Peter — and we’re especially
tired of Rand Paul’s obsession with spreading COVID-19 misinformation, all
while voting against even the most basic aid for Kentuckians. We’re tired
of his political games for political gain.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14536?refcode=em20220111-1439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1439%2E346206%2E3TvYHV ]Please take a moment to watch and share this video. And after you’re
done watching, will you please chip in $5 or whatever you
can so we can end Rand Paul’s failed leadership in the Senate once and for
all this year? Kentuckians deserve better than this, plain and simple.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14536?refcode=em20220111-1439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1439%2E346206%2E3TvYHV ]Contribute $5

— Team Booker

name: John Fetterman
subject: stonks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Lawmakers should not be making profits off of the same companies they are supposed to be regulating.
#
Derek, let me be *extremely* clear here:
**Allowing members of Congress + their spouses to trade stocks is a clear conflict of interest.**
Lawmakers should not be making profits off of the same companies they are supposed to be regulating, ESPECIALLY when their actions are based on closed-door information that isn’t available to the public.
For example... Just a few weeks before markets crashed in February of 2020, multiple sitting U.S. Senators sold off *millions* in stock. Meanwhile, everyday Americans were financially gutted just one month later when COVID-19 shut down the country.
I can promise you now that when you send me to the U.S. Senate, I will NEVER use insider information or political privilege for personal gain.
In fact, even today, I’ve never taken a gift, meal, trip, or per diem. My family is the *only* one in Pennsylvania history to decline living in the lieutenant governor’s mansion. Instead, we opened its pool to Pennsylvania’s children. 🌊
So when you send me to the U.S. Senate, you know that I will always put the people first and foremost, just like I’ve done my entire political career. **It’s why this campaign relies on grassroots donors like you, Derek, and why I’m asking:**
**[If you agree that Members of Congress should be banned from buying or trading stocks, add your name to my petition](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-stocks-2022/?source=ema20220111-4164&t=1&akid=4164%2E434096%2ETrJ4gh) 👇 👇 👇**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-stocks-2022/?source=ema20220111-4164&t=2&akid=4164%2E434096%2ETrJ4gh)**
Thank you for your support, Derek. Together, we’ll be able to defend Democrats’ majority in the Senate and bring our people-first politics to Washington.
–John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

clean_body: Lawmakers should not be making profits off of the same companies they are supposed to be regulating. Derek, let me be extremely clear here: Allowing members of Congress + their spouses to trade stocks is a clear conflict of interest. Lawmakers should not be making profits off of the same companies they are supposed to be regulating, ESPECIALLY when their actions are based on closed-door information that isn’t available to the public. For example... Just a few weeks before markets crashed in February of 2020, multiple sitting U.S. Senators sold off millions in stock. Meanwhile, everyday Americans were financially gutted just one month later when COVID-19 shut down the country. I can promise you now that when you send me to the U.S. Senate, I will NEVER use insider information or political privilege for personal gain. In fact, even today, I’ve never taken a gift, meal, trip, or per diem. My family is the only one in Pennsylvania history to decline living in the lieutenant governor’s mansion. Instead, we opened its pool to Pennsylvania’s children. 🌊 So when you send me to the U.S. Senate, you know that I will always put the people first and foremost, just like I’ve done my entire political career. It’s why this campaign relies on grassroots donors like you, Derek, and why I’m asking: 👇 👇 👇 Thank you for your support, Derek. Together, we’ll be able to defend Democrats’ majority in the Senate and bring our people-first politics to Washington. –John John Fetterman Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
